Asynchronous Reinforcement Learning Engine for Omni-Modal Post-Training at Scale","starred":false,"priority":"p2","source":"arxiv","sources":["arxiv"],"published_at":"2026-04-13T14:42:03+00:00","category_id":"post_train","cover_url":"/covers/2604_11554.png","hf_upvotes":0,"arxiv_categories":["cs.CL"],"summary":{"core_problem":"面向大规模后训练（post-training）的强化学习系统在“全模态（omni-modal）输入 + 多轮agentic轨迹”场景下遇到三类耦合挑战：数据流高度异构（图像/视频/音频/文本混合且长度差异巨大）、大规模运行的鲁棒性（长尾延迟、OOM、NCCL超时、服务崩溃等）、以及同步训练导致的吞吐受限与异步训练带来的策略陈旧（staleness）权衡缺乏统一抽象。","importance":"RL后训练已被证明能显著解锁推理、自反思、工具使用等能力，并正从单轮文本走向多模态与多步交互。若系统层无法同时解决异构负载、故障隔离与异步调度，训练会在规模化时频繁被长尾样本拖慢或因故障中断，且难以在吞吐与收敛之间做可控折中，直接限制可复现、可扩展的生产级RL能力提升。","technical_approach":"提出 Relax（Reinforcement Engine Leveraging Agentic X-modality），一个面向全模态RL后训练的开源异步训练引擎，通过“三层协同设计”系统性解决上述耦合问题。\n- Omni-native全栈：从数据预处理、模态感知并行策略到推理生成后端，原生支持图像/视频/音频/文本等多模态，而非在文本管线外“打补丁”。目标是让不同模态字段在同一抽象下流动，适配不同的预处理延迟、显存占用与并行方式。\n- 角色隔离的服务化架构：将RL流水线中的不同角色（如rollout生成、reward计算、advantage估计、trainer等）以独立服务部署（基于Ray Serve），实现故障隔离、按角色弹性伸缩与生命周期管理；并通过分布式权重/检查点同步服务（文中提到DCS）降低异构集群下的同步成本与恢复时间。\n- 异步数据总线与staleness控制：在角色解耦后，用专用异步数据通道避免同步交换把长尾延迟传播到全局；同时提供统一机制在on-policy、near-on-policy、off-policy之间平滑切换，用“单一配置旋钮”在吞吐与策略陈旧之间做可控权衡，而不是改一整套代码路径。\n整体设计逻辑强调因果链式共设计：全模态异构→需要服务级隔离与容错→服务解耦后需要异步总线→异步总线的field-based存储又天然容纳多模态字段，闭环支撑omni-native。","experiments":"从给定全文片段可见论文主要贡献偏系统架构与工程能力（可扩展、鲁棒、异步调度、全模态支持），但片段未包含完整实验表与量化指标细节。按引言承诺，论文应包含：在大规模GPU集群上的吞吐/利用率提升、长尾延迟下的端到端step RL for LLMs, how to prevent loss of sampling diversity and repeated failure patterns across rollouts, which entropy regularization on the current policy alone does not explicitly address.","importance":"Proposes a reward-shaping paradigm that leverages memory of historical behaviors to penalize recurring error modes, improving exploration and training stability in RLHF/RLVR-style post-training.","technical_approach":"Memory-Enhanced Dynamic reward Shaping (MEDS) stores intermediate representations from past rollouts, performs density-based clustering to identify frequent error clusters, and applies stronger penalties to rollouts that fall into more common failure clusters to discourage repetition and broaden exploration.","experiments":"Across five memory-based penalties for repeated failures are intuitive and reusable, but it’s more a solid trick than a new theory."}},{"id":"2604.11365","title":"Learning from Contrasts: Synthesizing Reasoning Paths from Diverse Search Trajectories","starred":false,"priority":"p2","source":"arxiv","sources":["arxiv"],"published_at":"2026-04-13T12:05:34+00:00","category_id":"post_train","cover_url":"/covers/2604_11365.png","hf_upvotes":0,"arxiv_categories":["cs.AI","cs.CL"],"summary":{"core_problem":"现有基于 MCTS 的自动推理数据挖掘/监督提取大多采用“筛选式”范式：只保留最高奖励（正确）的单条轨迹用于训练（如 RFT），把大量被探索过但失败/次优的轨迹直接丢弃，导致对“为什么错、错在哪里、成功与失败的关键分岔点是什么”的结构性信息利用不足，数据与算力效率低。","importance":"推理能力提升高度依赖高质量 CoT 数据规模，但人工标注昂贵；MCTS 能自动探索解空间，却在监督提取阶段浪费了绝大多数探索信号。若能把失败轨迹转化为可学习的“反例对比信号”，就可能在更小数据量下获得同等甚至更强的泛化，并减少搜索与训练成本。","technical_approach":"提出 CRPS（Contrastive Reasoning Path Synthesis），把监督提取从“过滤”改为“合成”。核心是解耦的 explorer-analyst 架构：\n1) Explorer（专门的推理模型）在 MCTS 中为每个问题生成多条完整轨迹集合，并对终止答案给二值奖励 r(τ)∈{0,1}；同时保留搜索统计量（尤其是 visit count N(s)/N(τ)）。\n2) 正例锚点选择：从正确轨迹集合中选“最具代表性的高效推理”作为 τ+，优先最短长度 |τ|，若并列则选最大节点 Q-value（期望成功率）最高者，体现 explorer 内部最自信/最优的推理路径。\n3) 负例采样（对比信号）：不把所有错误一视同仁，而是利用 MCTS 的访问次数分布挑选“hard negatives”——那些虽然错误但被 explorer 反复探索、visit count 高的轨迹，代表系统性偏差与易错模式；以 N(τ) 加权采样 τ−，让对比集中在模型真正“容易走偏”的分支。\n4) 对比反思与显式化：Analyst（更强模型）对 (τ+, τ−) 做结构化对比，语言化总结成功的关键策略转折点（strategic pivots）与失败的局部错误模式（local failure modes），形成可复用的元认知提示/规则。\n5) 推理链合成：Analyst 在上述洞见条件下，综合成功模式并显式规避失败模式，生成新的高质量 CoT 训练样本（不是简单复制 τ+，而是“吸收优点+避坑”的合成链）。\n整体上，CRPS 把“多轨迹探索”转化为“密集监督”：同一题的多条轨迹差异被压缩为可学习的对比解释与更鲁棒的合成推理链。","experiments":"论文在引言中给出关键结论：用 60K 条 CRPS 合成样本微调即可达到与 590K 条 rejection-sampled（仅保留最优轨迹）样本相当的效果，约 20× 数据量缩减；并观察到 CRPS 训练模型在 out-of-domain 基准上泛化更好。作者还声称跨多种 base model 验证，并且不仅在数学推理有效，也扩展到代码生成与常识推理任务（具体基准与数值细节需结合正文实验部分与图表）。","reading_guide":"【skim（泛读）】\n- 先看 Introduction：把握“从过滤到合成”的问题定义与贡献点，以及 Figure 1/3（范式对比与数据效率结论）。\n- 再看 Method 段落中三件事：正例锚点选择规则、基于 visit count 的 hard negative 采样、analyst 的对比反思→合成链路（Figure 2）。\n\n【must_read（精读）】\n- 精读 Method：\n  1) MCTS 统计量如何用于“信息量最大”的负例选择（N(s)/N(τ) 的含义、采样分布、为何能捕捉系统性偏差而非随机错）。\n  2) τ+ 的“最短+最高 Q”准则对合成质量/偏差的影响（是否会偏向短链、是否牺牲可解释性）。\n  3) Analyst 的结构化反思模板：如何定义 strategic pivots 与 local failure modes、输出如何条件化到最终合成 CoT。\n- 对照 Figure 2（完整 pipeline）逐步核对：输入/输出、哪些信息从 explorer 传给 analyst、哪些是可训练监督。\n- 重点关注实验中：\n  1) 60K vs 590K 的对齐设置（同算力/同预算/同 base model？）与消融（去掉对比、去掉 visit-count hard negatives、只用 τ+ 等）。\n  2) OOD 泛化提升来自哪里（是否因“避坑规则”更抽象、是否减少过拟合到单一路径）。\n- 创新点抓手：把“失败轨迹”从噪声变成可解释的对比监督；用搜索分布（visit count）定义 hard negatives；explorer-analyst 解耦以兼顾探索效率与反思质量。","authors_note":"作者的核心立场是：MCTS 的价值不应止于找到一条正确路径，而在于它生成了大量“看似合理但错误”的对照样本；通过显式对比与反思，可以把这些对照压缩成更高密度、更可迁移的监督信号，从而显著降低所需训练数据量并提升跨域泛化。"},"metadata":{"institutions":[],"authors":["Peiyang Liu","Zhirui Chen","Xi Wang","Di Liang","Youru Li","Zhi Cai","Wei Ye"],"notable_authors":[],"tags":["mcts","data-synthesis","contrastive-learning","reasoning","rlvr"],"links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11365","pdf":"https://arxiv.org/pdf/2604.11365","github":null,"project":null,"source_url":null}},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Most MCTS-based reasoning data pipelines extract supervision via a selection/filtering paradigm: keep only the single best (highest-reward) trajectory (e.g., RFT) and discard the many explored but failed/suboptimal paths. This wastes the structural information contained in how successful strategies differ from plausible-but-wrong alternatives, leading to poor data/compute efficiency.","importance":"Reasoning performance scales strongly with high-quality CoT data, but human annotation is costly. While MCTS can explore solution spaces automatically, current extraction discards most exploration signals. Turning failures into contrastive, learnable signals can reduce required data and improve transfer/generalization while saving search/training cost.","technical_approach":"$51","experiments":"Key reported result (from the paper’s overview): fine-tuning on 60K CRPS-synthesized examples matches performance of training on 590K rejection-sampled examples (~20× dataset reduction). Exact benchmark details and ablations should be verified in the full experimental section and figures.","reading_guide":"$52","authors_note":"The paper’s thesis is that MCTS is valuable not only for finding a correct path but for generating many compelling wrong paths; by explicitly contrasting success vs failure and synthesizing improved reasoning chains, one can obtain denser, more transferable supervision with far less data."},"reading_tier":"skim","recommendation":{"zh":"看“失败轨迹如何转成对比监督”的构造细节：如果真能从 MCTS 的垃圾轨迹里榨出信号，你们的数据挖掘就该从筛选改为对比学习。","en":"Skim the construction turning failed search traces into contrastive supervision: if it reliably extracts signal from ‘trash’ MCTS trajectories, it’s a strong cue to shift mining from filtering to contrastive learning."}},{"id":"2604.10966","title":"You Only Judge Once: Multi-response Reward Modeling in a Single Forward Pass","starred":false,"priority":"p2","source":"arxiv","sources":["arxiv"],"published_at":"2026-04-13T04:02:03+00:00","category_id":"post_train","cover_url":"/covers/2604_10966.png","hf_upvotes":0,"arxiv_categories":["cs.CV","cs.AI"],"summary":{"core_problem":"传统判别式奖励模型（RM）对每个候选回答独立打分，N 个候选需要 N 次前向计算；在多模态场景中图像/视频上下文 token 占大头，重复计算代价极高。同时，独立打分缺乏“直接比较”能力；而生成式 judge 需要自回归生成判决，延迟更高、上下文变长时更不稳定。现有范式都难以高效扩展到 best-of-N、组内优化等天然的 N-way 排序需求。","importance":"RM 是 RLHF/偏好学习、重排序、测试时选择、以及 GRPO 等策略优化的关键组件。N-way 评估在实际系统中非常常见（一次采样多个候选再选最优），若 RM 不能高效、稳定地进行 N-way 比较，会直接限制训练吞吐、推理延迟与下游对齐效果，尤其在视频等长上下文多模态任务上更突出。","technical_approach":"提出“单次前向、多回答打分”的判别式多模态 RM：\n1) 单序列拼接：将同一输入 x（含图像/视频）与 N 个候选回答 {y1…yN} 用特殊分隔符 <|resp_sep|> 拼接成一个长序列，一次前向得到所有 token 的隐藏状态 H。\n2) 响应级表示：以每段回答的“最后 token”（或与分隔符对齐的边界锚点）抽取该回答的表示，用轻量 value head 输出标量分数 si。\n3) N-way 训练目标：不再用 BT 两两损失，而是对 N 个分数做 cross-entropy（把标注的优胜/排序信号转成 N 类比较学习），实现直接的比较推理。\n4) 因果注意力下的比较：在 causal mask 下，后面的回答可注意到前面的回答与共享 prompt，使模型在一次前向中形成候选间的相对判断，而不是彼此独立。\n5) 效率收益：相对“逐个回答前向”的判别式 RM，理论上可获得最高 N× 的 wall-clock 与 FLOPs 节省；相对穷举两两比较可进一步避免 O(N^2) 代价；同时避免生成式 judge 的解码延迟。","experiments":"作者构建并发布两个 N-way 多模态 RM 基准：\n- MR2Bench-Image：240 条人类标注的 8 模型输出排序，覆盖 VQA/安全/视觉推理，来自真实 playground 交互。\n- MR2Bench-Video：495 个视频问题，通过约 94K 众包 pairwise 判断去噪推断得到 N-way 排序，覆盖 19 个模型输出。\n模型侧：在 Molmo2-4B 上用 LoRA 微调，训练数据 436K 偏好样本；在 6 个多模态 RM 基准（含图像与视频）上达 SOTA，优于更大生成式 judge 与同量级判别式 RM。下游：作为 GRPO 的打分函数时，单回答 RM 训练不稳定易不收敛；multi-response RM 提供更稳定上升的验证奖励信号并带来更大下游收益。效率侧：报告最高可达 N×N 的 wall-clock/FLOPs 降低（相对某些基线设定）。","reading_guide":"【skim（泛读）】\n- 读 Introduction：明确三类方案（生成式 judge、单回答判别式 RM、本文 multi-response RM）的效率/表达力对比与动机。\n- 读 Method：重点看“拼接 + 分隔符锚点 + value head + N-way cross-entropy”这四件事，理解为何一次前向即可比较。\n- 快速浏览新基准 MR2Bench-Image/Video 的构建思路与评测设置。\n\n【must_read（精读）】\n- 精读 Method 细节：\n  1) 序列拼接与 causal mask 的信息流：后续回答能看见前面回答会带来何种归纳偏置？是否存在位置/顺序敏感，训练与推理如何固定顺序或做顺序增强。\n  2) 分隔符 <|resp_sep|> 与“last-token 表示”的实现：如何定位每个回答的表示、对不同长度回答是否公平、是否需要长度归一或校准。\n  3) N-way cross-entropy 的监督形式：从排序/偏好到训练标签的映射（top-1、全排序、或 soft label），与 BT pairwise 的关系与优劣。\n- 精读实验：\n  1) 速度/算力对比的基线定义（单回答 N 次前向、pairwise O(N^2)、生成式 judge 解码）与实际吞吐测量。\n  2) 在视频场景的收益是否更显著（因为视觉 token 重复计算更昂贵）。\n  3) GRPO 稳定性分析：为何 multi-response 的相对比较信号更平滑，是否有消融（去掉多回答注意、改回独立打分等）。\n- 创新点抓手：一次前向实现 N-way 比较学习；提出面向 N-way 的图像/视频 RM 基准；展示对下游策略优化稳定性的直接影响。","authors_note":"作者强调“只判一次（YOJO）”的工程与学习双重收益：把共享的多模态上下文只算一遍，同时让模型在同一上下文窗口内显式对比多个候选，从而在效率、准确性与下游 RL 稳定性上同时获益，并补齐了 N-way 多模态 RM 的评测空白。"},"metadata":{"institutions":[],"authors":["Yinuo Yang","Zixian Ma","Manasi Ganti","Jieyu Zhang","Ranjay Krishna"],"notable_authors":[],"tags":["reward-modeling","rlhf","preference-learning","multimodal"],"links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10966","pdf":"https://arxiv.org/pdf/2604.10966","github":null,"project":null,"source_url":null}},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Conventional discriminative reward models score each candidate response independently, requiring N separate forward passes for N candidates. In multimodal settings, image/video context tokens dominate sequence length, so this repeats expensive visual computation. Independent scoring also limits direct comparative reasoning, while generative judges incur autoregressive decoding latency and scale poorly with long contexts. Overall, existing paradigms do not scale well to natural N-way ranking scenarios (best-of-N, group-based optimization).","importance":"Reward models are core to preference learning/RLHF, reranking, test-time selection, and downstream policy optimization (e.g., GRPO). Efficient and stable N-way evaluation is crucial in real systems that sample multiple candidates. Poor scaling directly hurts throughput/latency and can destabilize downstream alignment—especially for long-context video tasks.","technical_approach":"A single-forward-pass, multi-response discriminative multimodal RM:\n1) Concatenate the prompt (with optional image/video) and all N candidate responses into one sequence using a special separator token <|resp_sep|>.\n2) Extract a response-level representation (via last-token / boundary-anchored hidden state) for each response segment and map it to a scalar score si with a lightweight value head.\n3) Train with an N-way cross-entropy objective over the N scores (instead of pairwise Bradley–Terry), enabling direct comparative learning.\n4) Under a causal attention mask, later responses can attend to earlier responses plus the shared prompt, allowing implicit contrast among candidates within a single pass.\n5) Efficiency: replaces N independent passes (and avoids O(N^2) pairwise comparisons), yielding up to N× (and reported up to N×N vs certain baselines) wall-clock/FLOPs reductions, while avoiding generative decoding latency.","experiments":"They introduce two N-way multimodal RM benchmarks:\n- MR2Bench-Image: 240 human-annotated rankings over responses from 8 diverse models across VQA/safety/visual reasoning, sourced from real VLM playground interactions.\n- MR2Bench-Video: 495 video questions with denoised N-way rankings over outputs from 19 models, inferred from ~94K crowdsourced pairwise judgments.\nModel: a 4B N-way comparison RM fine-tuned from Molmo2-4B with LoRA on 436K preference samples. Results: SOTA across six multimodal reward benchmarks (four image + two video), outperforming larger generative judges and comparable/larger discriminative RMs. Downstream: when used for GRPO, single-response RM is unstable and often fails to converge; the multi-response RM provides steadily increasing validation reward and larger downstream gains. Efficiency: reports up to N×N wall-clock/FLOPs reduction relative to the single-response baseline in relevant settings.","reading_guide":"$53","authors_note":"The paper’s message is that ‘You Only Judge Once’ yields both engineering and learning benefits: compute the shared multimodal context once and let the model compare candidates within the same context window, improving efficiency, accuracy, and downstream RL stability while filling the evaluation gap for N-way multimodal reward modeling."},"reading_tier":"skim","recommendation":{"zh":"只看实现细节与吞吐/显存曲线：把N-way比较塞进一次前向很工程友好，但要警惕训练目标是否引入位置/候选泄漏偏差。","en":"Skim the implementation + throughput/memory plots: packing N-way judging into one forward pass is very practical, but watch for objective quirks that leak candidate identity/position."}},{"id":"2604.11805","title":"Solving Physics Olympiad via Reinforcement Learning on Physics sanity-check whether sim-to-real gains survive clean splits vs. template overlap; the novelty is more pipeline than algorithm."}},{"id":"2604.10918","title":"CSPO: Alleviating Reward Ambiguity for Structured Table-to-LaTeX Generation","starred":false,"priority":"p2","source":"arxiv","sources":["arxiv"],"published_at":"2026-04-13T02:34:30+00:00","category_id":"post_train","cover_url":"/covers/2604_10918.png","hf_upvotes":0,"arxiv_categories":["cs.AI"],"summary":{"core_problem":"表格图像转 LaTeX 需要同时保证结构（行列/合并单元格）、内容（单元格文本数值）与样式（线型/对齐/字体等）的高保真，但现有 MLLM 或专用系统常出现结构不一致、样式丢失、内容错误或不可编译。用 RL 做后训练时，若只用单一全局奖励（如 TEDS）会把多种异质目标混成一个信号，产生 reward ambiguity，导致信用分配错误：结构错也可能被正向强化、内容对也可能被惩罚，且不同组件质量差异可能得到相同总奖励。","importance":"该任务属于“强结构化序列生成 + 可执行语法（LaTeX）”的典型场景：输出的正确性是多维度、分层且强耦合的。论文指出的 reward ambiguity 不仅限制表格到 LaTeX 的对齐效果，也为更广泛的结构化代码/标记语言生成（HTML/SQL/DSL/配置文件等）提供了一个通用的 RL 失败模式与改进方向：需要把奖励与梯度路由到正确的功能子结构上，才能稳定提升可控的保真度。","technical_approach":"提出 CSPO（Component-Specific Policy Optimization）以缓解 reward ambiguity。核心思想是：\n1) 组件分解：用 LaTeX parser 将生成序列分解为功能组件（论文示例包含 package imports、结构、单元格外观、caption、对齐、线条样式等；总体上聚焦结构/内容/样式三大维度）。\n2) 组件奖励：为不同组件分别计算 fidelity 奖励，同时保留一个刻画整体质量的 global reward（例如基于 TEDS/可编译性等）。\n3) 组件级信用分配与优化：关键在“反向传播路由（backpropagate each signal only through …）”——每个组件的奖励只作用于与该组件对应的 token/子序列（或解析树片段）所诱导的策略梯度，从而避免结构错误掩盖内容改进、或样式噪声污染结构学习。\n4) 分层评测指标：除全局相似度与编译检查外，新增结构正确性（如 row/col spans、合并单元格）、内容一致性（cell values）、样式一致性（line style、font styles）等层级指标，用于诊断模型到底“哪里变好/哪里变差”。","experiments":"从全文可见的实验信息侧重于：对比常规单一奖励 RL 与 CSPO，在结构/内容/样式的分项指标以及整体可编译性/相似度上验证改进；并用分层指标展示 CSPO 能更稳定地提升特定组件而不被其他组件错误牵连。论文还通过图示案例（如 Figure 1）定性展示单一奖励下的错误强化与不可区分性，并在 Figure 2 给出 CSPO 的训练管线与组件化奖励/优化流程。","reading_guide":"must_read（精读）：\n- 重点读 Introduction 中 reward ambiguity 的定义与 Figure 1：理解“全局奖励为何会给出错误梯度信号”，这是整篇的动机与问题刻画。\n- 精读 CSPO 方法章节（Component decomposition / component-specific rewarding / credit assignment & optimization）：抓住“解析-对齐-路由梯度”的实现逻辑，尤其是奖励如何只回传到对应组件。\n- 精读 Figure 2：把训练数据流（生成→解析→分组件打分→分组件更新）在脑中跑通。\n- 精读分层指标（hierarchical metrics）设计：看每个维度如何被量化，以及它们如何揭示模型失败模式。\n- 创新点抓手：①提出并形式化 reward ambiguity 在结构化序列 RL 中的影响；②组件级奖励 + 组件级信用分配（梯度路由）；③诊断型分层评测体系。\n\nskim（泛读）：\n- 先看 Introduction + Figure 1/2 把问题与方案建立直觉。\n- 快速浏览 Problem Formulation 了解任务与 RL 目标。\n- 方法部分只抓三件事：怎么分解组件、怎么给分组件奖励、怎么做分组件更新。\n- 评测部分只看分项指标表格/消融（若有）：确认 CSPO 相对 baseline 在结构/内容/样式各自的增益是否一致。","authors_note":"作者的核心立场是：在表格到 LaTeX 这种多维度保真任务里，单一聚合奖励会系统性地产生“不可解释、不可控、难优化”的梯度信号；解决之道不是换一个更强的全局指标，而是把奖励与优化粒度对齐到功能组件，并配套可诊断的分层评测，从而实现更可靠、可控的对齐。"},"metadata":{"institutions":[],"authors":["Yunfan Yang","Cuiling Lan","Jitao Sang","Yan Lu"],"notable_authors":[],"tags":["reinforcement-learning","reward-decomposition","structured-generation","credit-assignment","multimodal-ocr"],"links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10918","pdf":"https://arxiv.org/pdf/2604.10918","github":null,"project":null,"source_url":null}},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Image-to-LaTeX table generation requires high fidelity across structure (rows/cols/spans), content (cell text/numbers), and style (rules, alignment, fonts). Existing MLLMs and specialized systems often introduce structural inconsistencies, lose formatting details, make content errors, or even output non-compilable code. When post-training with RL using a single aggregated reward (e.g., TEDS), heterogeneous objectives are collapsed into one signal, causing reward ambiguity and mis-credit assignment: wrong structure can be reinforced, correct content can be penalized, and outputs with different component-level quality may receive identical rewards.","importance":"This paper highlights a general failure mode of RL for structured, executable sequence generation: correctness is multi-dimensional and hierarchical, so a monolithic reward yields noisy/incorrect gradients. The proposed remedy—aligning reward and gradient routing with functional components—serves as a blueprint beyond LaTeX tables, potentially benefiting other structured code/markup generation tasks (HTML/SQL/DSLs/configs) where controllable improvements and diagnostic evaluation matter.","technical_approach":"The paper proposes CSPO (Component-Specific Policy Optimization) to mitigate reward ambiguity:\n1) Component decomposition: a LaTeX parser decomposes generated code into functional components (e.g., package imports, structure, cell appearance, captions, alignment, line styles), conceptually grouped into structure/content/style.\n2) Component-specific rewards: compute fidelity rewards per component while also keeping a global reward capturing overall quality.\n3) Component-specific credit assignment & optimization: crucially, each component reward is backpropagated only through the tokens/subsequence corresponding to that component (gradient routing), preventing errors in one aspect from dominating or corrupting learning signals for others.\n4) Hierarchical metrics: introduce diagnostic metrics that separately quantify structural correctness (spans/merges), content fidelity (cell values), and stylistic consistency (line/font styles), in addition to global similarity and compilation checks.","experiments":"From the provided full content, the experimental narrative focuses on comparing standard single-reward RL against CSPO using both global and hierarchical component-wise metrics, showing more reliable improvements in structure/content/style fidelity and better interpretability of where gains come from. Qualitative evidence (Figure 1) illustrates mis-reinforcement under aggregated rewards, while Figure 2 summarizes the end-to-end CSPO pipeline (generate → parse → score per component → component-wise updates).","reading_guide":"must_read (deep dive):\n- Read the Introduction’s reward ambiguity argument and Figure 1 carefully; it is the key problem formulation.\n- Study the CSPO method section: how parsing defines components, how rewards are computed per component, and how gradient routing performs component-level credit assignment.\n- Use Figure 2 to trace the training loop end-to-end.\n- Focus on the hierarchical metrics design to understand diagnostic evaluation and failure-mode attribution.\n- Key innovations: (i) formalizing reward ambiguity in structured-sequence RL, (ii) component-wise rewards + component-wise credit assignment (gradient routing), (iii) hierarchical, interpretable evaluation.\n\nskim (quick read):\n- Read Introduction + Figures 1/2 for intuition.\n- Skim Problem Formulation for the RL objective.\n- In Methods, only retain: component decomposition, component rewards, component-wise updates.\n- In Experiments, look for component-wise metric tables/ablations to confirm consistent gains across structure/content/style.","authors_note":"The authors’ main thesis is that for multi-fidelity structured generation, improving the global reward alone is insufficient; the reward and optimization granularity must match functional components. By disentangling rewards and routing gradients to the responsible parts, CSPO enables more reliable and controllable alignment, supported by hierarchical diagnostic metrics."},"reading_tier":"skim","recommendation":{"zh":"只看奖励分解与消融表：把结构/内容/样式拆开能减少RL乱更新，这个“reward ambiguity”诊断可直接迁移到代码/DSL生成。","en":"Skim the reward decomposition and ablations: separating structure/content/style reduces RL’s noisy updates, and the “reward ambiguity” framing ports nicely to code/DSL generation."}},{"id":"2604.09748","title":"Backdoors in RLVR: Jailbreak Backdoors in LLMs From Verifiable Reward","starred":false,"priority":"p2","source":"arxiv","sources":["arxiv"],"published_at":"2026-04-10T09:32:34+00:00","category_id":"post_train","cover_url":"/covers/2604_09748.png","hf_upvotes":0,"arxiv_categories":["cs.CR","cs.AI"],"summary":{"core_problem":"RLVR（Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards）通过规则/执行器等可验证奖励显著提升推理与编程能力，但论文首次系统揭示：RLVR 训练环存在可被投毒数据利用的后门脆弱性。攻击者无需修改 verifier，只需向训练集注入少量带触发器的 prompt（poisoning prompts），就能在触发条件下诱导模型产生有害输出并绕过拒答安全对齐；而在无触发器时模型表现近似正常，难以察觉。","importance":"RLVR 正在成为提升“可验证任务能力”的主流路线（数学/代码/逻辑），其安全性常被直觉性地认为更强（因为 reward 来自规则验证而非可被投毒的 reward model）。该工作指出这种直觉并不成立：规则验证带来的“硬奖励”反而可能被利用形成强烈的奖励不对称，进而在 RL 的迭代采样与更新中逐步瓦解安全对齐。这对 RLVR 数据治理、训练审计、触发器检测与鲁棒优化提出直接挑战。","technical_approach":"提出 RLVR 场景下的后门攻击 Asymmetric Chain Backdoor（ACB）：\n1) 关键观察：提高采样次数会激活模型“长尾有害行为”，攻击利用这一点在 RL 采样-筛选-更新闭环中放大有害轨迹。\n2) 触发机制：设计秘密触发器 τ_trigger，将其嵌入少量训练 prompt；当触发器存在时，模型被诱导在完成可验证任务的同时输出有害内容/越狱行为。\n3) 奖励不对称（核心）：在 RLVR 的 verifier 打分下，让“有害响应”获得显著正奖励，而“拒答/安全响应”获得负奖励，从而在策略梯度更新中系统性压制拒答倾向、强化有害输出。\n4) Shadow-driven 投毒数据合成：用一组 shadow models 作为代理，结合双重过滤（dual filtering）与高方差选择（high-variance selection）挑选最有效的投毒样本，以极少样本实现稳定植入。\n5) 攻击目标：触发时显著降低安全性并泛化到多种 jailbreak/不安全行为；不触发时保持与正常模型相近的安全与任务性能以提升隐蔽性。","experiments":"论文报告的关键结论包括：\n- 高效率：无论训练集规模，约 200 条后门数据即可完成植入。\n- 高隐蔽：对 RLVR 任务训练性能几乎无影响；无触发器时安全表现与正常模型接近。\n- 高危害与泛化：触发器存在时安全性显著下降，并可泛化到多种 jailbreak 方法与不安全行为。\n- 机制验证：通过增加采样频率观察长尾有害行为被激活，并在 RLVR/GRPO 训练框架下展示奖励不对称如何逐步破坏拒答对齐。","reading_guide":"must_read（精读）：\n- 精读 Introduction：把“为何 RLVR 也会被后门”与“长尾有害行为 + 采样次数”的关键观察吃透。\n- 精读 Preliminaries 中 GRPO/RLVR 目标：理解 baseline（多样本平均奖励作基线）如何与攻击相互作用。\n- 精读 ACB 机制描述：重点是“有害正奖赏 vs 拒答负奖赏”的不对称如何在多轮更新中累积。\n- 精读 Shadow-driven 数据合成：看 dual filtering 与 high-variance selection 的选择准则，理解为何能用极少样本。\n- 重点看实验表格：①投毒样本数 vs 后门成功率/安全下降；②对主任务性能影响；③触发泛化到不同 jailbreak/危害类别。\n- 创新点抓手：①首次系统揭示 RLVR 后门面；②ACB 的奖励不对称链式强化；③shadow set 驱动的高效投毒样本筛选。\n\nskim（泛读）：\n- 读 Introduction + Threat model/Attack scenario：明确攻击者能力边界（不改 verifier，只投毒 prompts）。\n- 快速看 ACB 的核心流程图/算法描述（若有）：理解触发器与奖励不对称。\n- 实验只看三类结果：隐蔽性（主任务不掉点）、有效性（触发时安全崩）、样本效率（≈200）。","authors_note":"作者强调：RLVR 的“可验证奖励”并不天然带来安全性，反而可能因奖励信号硬、更新闭环强而更易被少量投毒放大；防御需要面向数据与训练过程的系统性机制（如投毒检测、触发器鲁棒性、采样与更新策略审计），而不仅是依赖 verifier 本身。"},"metadata":{"institutions":[],"authors":["Weiyang Guo","Zesheng Shi","Zeen Zhu","Yuan Zhou","Min Zhang","Jing Li"],"notable_authors":[],"tags":["rlvr","backdoor-attack","jailbreak","verifiable-reward","alignment-security"],"links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09748","pdf":"https://arxiv.org/pdf/2604.09748","github":null,"project":null,"source_url":null}},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"RLVR (Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards) boosts LLM reasoning via rule-based verifiers, but the paper identifies a new vulnerability: backdoors can be implanted without changing the verifier by injecting a small amount of poisoned prompts into the RLVR training set. The resulting model behaves normally on benign inputs, yet under a secret trigger it bypasses refusal-based safety alignment and produces harmful outputs, making detection difficult.","importance":"RLVR is increasingly used for math/programming/logic because verifiable rewards seem more trustworthy than learned reward models. This work shows that the “verifiable” nature does not guarantee safety: strong, rule-based rewards can be exploited to create reward asymmetry that progressively dismantles refusal behavior during RL updates. This has direct implications for RLVR data governance, training-time auditing, trigger detection, and robust optimization.","technical_approach":"$54","experiments":"Reported findings include:\n- High efficiency: only ~200 poisoned samples suffice, largely independent of dataset size.\n- High stealth: negligible impact on RLVR task performance; safety remains similar to a clean model when triggers are absent.\n- High impact and generalization: safety drops significantly when triggers are present and generalizes across jailbreak methods and unsafe behaviors.\n- Mechanistic evidence: experiments connect increased sampling to long-tail harmful activation and show how asymmetric rewards in GRPO/RLVR progressively erode refusal alignment.","reading_guide":"$55","authors_note":"The authors argue that verifiable rewards do not inherently provide safety; in fact, the hardness of verifier-based rewards and the RL training loop can amplify small poisoning into strong backdoors. verifier."},"reading_tier":"skim","recommendation":{"zh":"值得知道但别深读：它打破“verifiable reward 更安全”的直觉；主要看投毒比例与触发泛化的实验，作为RLVR数据审计的警示。","en":"Good to know, not to dwell on: it breaks the intuition that Generation","starred":false,"priority":"p2","source":"arxiv","sources":["arxiv"],"published_at":"2026-04-11T09:18:52+00:00","category_id":"post_train","cover_url":"/covers/2604_10114.png","hf_upvotes":0,"arxiv_categories":["cs.CL","cs.AI"],"summary":{"core_problem":"LLM 用于结构化合成数据生成时，常出现幻觉、逻辑不一致与 mode collapse；现有 prompting/RAG/结构化采样方法难以同时给出“硬逻辑有效性保证”与“覆盖/公平等软分布约束的可控性与可量化”。","importance":"高风险/强约束场景（KG-to-text、生物医学、法律等）里，单个逻辑维度出错或长尾维度缺失都会显著损害下游训练与评测；因此需要一种既保留语言表达能力、又能在语义层面提供形式化有效性与覆盖控制的可靠合成数据框架。","technical_approach":"CircuitSynth 采用“语义推理/表面实现”解耦的潜变量生成：先生成离散语义计划 z（实体类型、关系、属性配置等），再由条件 LLM 将 z 实现为文本 x。关键在于把 Teacher LLM 的语义推理能力蒸馏进可做精确推断的概率电路作为语义先验 P_Θ(z)：(1) 用 PSDD 作为带逻辑结构的可编译语义先验，通过 Logical Compilation 将硬约束直接编入电路拓扑，使无效状态在数学上不可达，从而实现 100% schema validity；(2) 为避免 mode collapse/提升长尾覆盖，在电路参数上用凸优化严格施加软分布约束（如公平性、稀有属性覆盖），并利用电路的精确边缘/条件推断去采样罕见属性组合；(3) 语言侧用 LLM 作为 neural realizer P_φ(x|z)，在“语义计划已满足约束”的前提下生成流畅文本；(4) 训练采用 Project-and-Distill：由 Teacher LLM 诱导/投影出满足 schema 的语义计划，再蒸馏到电路先验与生成流程中（文中还提到用 Einsum Networks 提升可扩展性）。","experiments":"论文宣称在复杂逻辑基准上优于 SOTA：硬约束满足率达到 100%（由编译保证），并通过软约束优化缓解 mode collapse、提升稀有维度覆盖；对比对象包括无约束 LLM 采样、prompting/RAG、以及类似 TreeSynth 的结构化方法。由于给定全文片段未包含具体数据集/指标表格细节，建议在实验章节核对：有效性(Validity)、覆盖(Coverage/Long-tail)、分布匹配(如 KL/EMD)、以及文本质量(人工/自动指标)的量化结果与消融。","reading_guide":"skim（泛读）建议：1) Introduction：把握“LLM 作为生成器但不可控”的问题定义与动机；2) Methodology 总览与 Figure 1：理解 LVM 分解 P(z) 与 P(x|z) 以及为何选 PC/PSDD；3) 贡献点列表：硬约束编译 + 软约束凸优化 + Project-and-Distill。must_read（精读）建议：1) Methodology 中关于 PSDD/PC 的语义先验建模、Logical Compilation 如何把 schema/Φ 编进拓扑（这是 100% validity 的根因）；2) 软分布约束的凸优化形式：约束集合、目标函数、可行性与收敛/可解性假设，以及如何与电路参数化对应；3) “精确边缘推断→长尾采样”的实现细节与复杂度；4) Project-and-Distill：Teacher 生成语义计划的投影/过滤机制、蒸馏目标、以及与 realizer 的训练耦合；5) 实验部分重点看：与 TreeSynth/RAG/纯 LLM 的对比表、长尾覆盖曲线/分桶统计、以及硬约束违规率；6) Appendix A 理论分析：支持集受限、约束可满足性与推断可 tractable 的条件。","authors_note":"作者的核心立场是：LLM 擅长启发式语言生成但不擅长作为“概率控制器”；概率电路擅长可解释、可推断、可约束的语义分布控制但缺乏语言表现力。CircuitSynth 通过神经-符号分工，把“保证有效性与覆盖控制”前移到可编译/可优化的语义先验层，再把“自然语言表达”交给 LLM，从而同时获得形式化保证与可用文本。"},"metadata":{"institutions":[],"authors":["Zehua Cheng","Wei Dai","Jiahao Sun","Thomas Lukasiewicz"],"notable_authors":[],"tags":["synthetic-data","neuro-symbolic","constraint-satisfaction","psdd","reliability"],"links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10114","pdf":"https://arxiv.org/pdf/2604.10114","github":null,"project":null,"source_url":null}},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"When LLMs are used for structured synthetic data generation, they often hallucinate, violate logical constraints, and suffer from mode collapse. Existing prompting/RAG/structured sampling approaches lack a unified mechanism that provides both formal guarantees of validity (hard constraints) and controllable/quantifiable distributional coverage (soft constraints).","importance":"In high-stakes, constraint-heavy domains (KG-to-text, biomedical, legal), a single logical violation or missing long-tail configurations can severely degrade downstream training. A reliable framework must preserve linguistic expressivity while offering formal semantic validity and coverage control.","technical_approach":"CircuitSynth decouples semantic reasoning from surface realization via a latent-variable model: first sample a discrete semantic plan z, then realize text x with a conditional LLM P_φ(x|z). The key is a tractable semantic prior P_Θ(z) implemented as a probabilistic circuit: (1) a PSDD encodes logical structure; hard constraints are compiled into the circuit topology (Logical Compilation), making invalid states impossible and yielding 100% schema validity; (2) soft distributional constraints (e.g., fairness, rare-attribute coverage) are enforced directly on circuit parameters via convex optimization to mitigate mode collapse; (3) exact marginal/conditional inference in the circuit enables targeted sampling of rare attribute combinations; (4) a Project-and-Distill protocol uses a Teacher LLM to induce valid semantic plans and distill them into the circuit prior (with scalability mentions such as Einsum Networks).","experiments":"The paper reports outperforming state-of-the-art baselines on complex logical benchmarks: 100% validity (by compilation) and improved long-tail coverage via soft-constraint optimization, compared against unconstrained LLM sampling, prompting/RAG, and structured methods like TreeSynth. The provided excerpt does not include concrete dataset/metric tables; readers should verify in the experiments section the quantitative results for validity, coverage/long-tail statistics, distribution matching, and text quality, plus ablations.","reading_guide":"skim: (1) Introduction for motivation and problem framing; (2) Methodology overview + Figure 1 to grasp the P(z) (PC/PSDD) vs P(x|z) (LLM) split; (3) Contributions list for the three pillars (hard compilation, soft convex constraints, Project-and-Distill). must_read: (1) PSDD/PC construction and how Logical Compilation embeds schema/Φ into topology (source of 100% validity); (2) the exact convex optimization formulation for soft constraints and its mapping to circuit parameters; (3) how exact marginal inference is used for long-tail sampling and its computational complexity; (4) Project-and-Distill details (teacher plan induction/projection, distillation losses, coupling with the realizer); (5) experiments: comparison tables, long-tail coverage plots/bucketed stats, constraint violation rates; (6) Appendix A theory: conditions for support restriction, satisfiability, and tractable inference.","authors_note":"The authors’ thesis is that LLMs are strong heuristic generators but weak probabilistic controllers, while probabilistic circuits provide exact inference and principled constraint handling but lack linguistic expressivity. CircuitSynth assigns formal validity and coverage control to a compiled/optimizable semantic prior, and delegates fluent language realization to an LLM, aiming to achieve both guarantees and usable text."},"reading_tier":"skim","recommendation":{"zh":"当作合成数据“形式化约束+覆盖控制”的工具箱翻：看它如何把硬约束验证接到生成回路里；但别期待对预训练本身有直接新结论。","en":"Browse it as a toolbox for synthetic data with formal validity + coverage control: see how they wire constraint checking into generation loops, but don’t expect direct new takeaways for pretraining."}},{"id":"2604.10788","title":"TInR: Exploring Tool-Internalized Reasoning in Large Language Models","starred":false,"priority":"p2","source":"arxiv","sources":["arxiv"],"published_at":"2026-04-12T19:38:19+00:00","category_id":"post_train","cover_url":"/covers/2604_10788.png","hf_upvotes":0,"arxiv_categories":["cs.CL","cs.AI"],"summary":{"core_problem":"现有 Tool-Integrated Reasoning (TIR) 依赖在推理时把工具文档塞进上下文：导致工具掌握困难（文档异构）、工具规模受限（context window 不够）、推理/调用低效（prompt 过长）。论文提出 Tool-Internalized Reasoning (TInR)：让模型在不提供外部文档的情况下完成带工具的推理与调用。","importance":"如果工具知识能被“内化”到模型参数中，推理时无需携带冗长文档，可显著降低延迟与成本，并支持更大规模工具集合；同时减少检索-使用错配风险，使面向真实应用的工具调用更稳定。","technical_approach":"提出 TInR-U：统一推理与工具使用的工具内化框架，三阶段训练管线：1) 工具内化（Tool internalization）：用“专用工具 token”承载每个工具，并用双向知识对齐让模型既能从文档映射到工具 token，也能从 token 反向回忆文档内容；同时加入工具使用训练以学习参数约束、调用格式等规则。2) TInR SFT warm-up：通过拒绝采样与格式化构造高可靠标注推理数据，对模型进行监督微调，使其学会在无外部文档条件下进行工具选择与调用编排。3) TInR RL：设计针对工具 token 的奖励，强化探索性工具推理与“推理-调用”协同，从而更深度融合工具使用能力与模型固有推理能力。整体交互形式为：每步先生成自然语言推理 r_j，必要时生成工具动作 a_j（选择工具 t 与参数 p），执行得到 o_j 并进入下一步。","experiments":"在 in-domain 与 out-of-domain 两类设置评测 TInR 能力；论文报告在 out-of-domain 工具调用上相对提升 18.13%，并在两类设置均达到 SOTA。建议在实验部分重点核对：工具集合规模 N、是否与 TIR（带文档）在同等推理预算/上下文长度下对比、成功率/格式正确率/参数合法率等指标，以及 RL 奖励设计与消融（仅内化/仅 SFT/仅 RL）。","reading_guide":"skim（泛读）建议：1) Introduction + Figure 1：理解 TIR vs TInR 的差异与三大痛点；2) Methodology 总览：三阶段训练流程与“工具 token”机制；3) 实验主表：看 in/out-of-domain 的总体收益。must_read（精读）建议：1) 工具内化的双向对齐细节：token 设计、对齐目标、如何处理异构文档与规则（参数约束/调用格式）；2) SFT 数据构造：拒绝采样标准、格式模板、如何保证轨迹可靠且贴近 TInR；3) RL：奖励在工具 token 上如何定义（正确工具选择、参数合法、调用时机、最终任务成功等）、训练稳定性与探索策略；4) OOD 设定：新工具/新组合/新任务的划分方式，避免数据泄漏；5) 失败案例分析：工具幻觉、参数越界、过度/不足调用等。","authors_note":"作者强调把“工具知识”从上下文外置（文档提示）转为参数内化（工具 token + 对齐训练），以解决可扩展性与效率问题；并通过 SFT+RL 让模型学会在推理过程中自然地触发与编排工具调用，从而实现无需文档的统一推理与工具使用。"},"metadata":{"institutions":[],"authors":["Qiancheng Xu","Yongqi Li","Fan Liu","Hongru Wang","Min Yang","Wenjie Li"],"notable_authors":[],"tags":["tool-use","internalization","reinforcement-learning","reasoning","alignment"],"links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10788","pdf":"https://arxiv.org/pdf/2604.10788","github":null,"project":null,"source_url":null}},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Most Tool-Integrated Reasoning (TIR) methods require tool documentation in-context during inference, which makes tool mastery hard (heterogeneous docs), limits tool-set size (context window), and increases latency/cost (long prompts). The paper studies Tool-Internalized Reasoning (TInR): enabling tool use without external documentation at inference time.","importance":"Internalizing tool knowledge into model parameters can reduce inference overhead, scale to larger tool sets, and avoid retrieval–usage mismatch, improving reliability for real-world tool-using agents.","technical_approach":"TInR-U is a unified framework for reasoning and tool usage with a three-phase training pipeline: (1) Tool internalization: assign dedicated tool tokens and perform bidirectional knowledge alignment—map documentation to tool tokens and reconstruct documentation from tokens—plus tool-usage training to learn strict calling rules (formats, parameter constraints). (2) TInR SFT warm-up: build reliable annotated reasoning trajectories via rejection sampling and formatting, then supervised fine-tune to use internalized tool knowledge during reasoning. (3) TInR RL: reinforcement learning with rewards designed on tool tokens to encourage exploratory tool reasoning and tighter coordination between reasoning and tool calls. The interaction alternates natural-language reasoning steps r_j and tool actions a_j (tool t with parameters p), consuming tool outputs o_j in subsequent steps.","experiments":"Evaluated in both in-domain and out-of-domain settings; the paper reports state-of-the-art results and a relative 18.13% improvement on out-of-domain tool calling. Readers should verify tool-set size, fairness of comparisons against TIR (with docs) under matched context/budget, metrics such as success rate/format correctness/parameter validity, and ablations for internalization vs SFT vs RL and reward design.","reading_guide":"skim: (1) Introduction + Figure 1 for TIR vs TInR framing; (2) Methodology overview for the three-stage pipeline and tool-token mechanism; (3) main results tables for in-/out-of-domain gains. must_read: (1) bidirectional alignment details (token design, objectives, handling heterogeneous docs and strict rules); (2) SFT data construction (rejection criteria, templates, reliability controls); (3) RL reward definition on tool tokens (tool choice, parameter legality, timing, final success) and training stability; (4) OOD protocol (new tools/tasks/compositions) and leakage checks; (5) failure analysis (tool hallucination, invalid params, over/under-calling).","authors_note":"The authors’ key idea is to move tool knowledge from external prompts into model parameters via dedicated tool tokens and alignment training, then use SFT+RL to make tool usage naturally coordinated with reasoning—achieving documentation-free tool reasoning at inference."},"reading_tier":"skim","recommendation":{"zh":"只看工具规模扩展与去文档上下文的对比：若内化后仍能稳调用，动作项是把你们的工具说明从prompt迁到参数；否则就是记忆化噱头。","en":"Skim the scaling-to-many-tools and no-doc-context comparisons: if tool calls stay reliable, the action is moving tool specs from prompts into weights; otherwise it’s mostly memorization theater."}},{"id":"2604.10674","title":"Skill-SD: Skill-Conditioned Self-Distillation for Multi-turn LLM Agents","starred":false,"priority":"p2","source":"arxiv","sources":["arxiv"],"published_at":"2026-04-12T14:57:52+00:00","category_id":"post_train","cover_url":"/covers/2604_10674.png","hf_upvotes":0,"arxiv_categories":["cs.LG","cs.AI","cs.CL"],"summary":{"core_problem":"多轮交互式 LLM Agent 的 RL 训练样本效率低：奖励稀疏、长时序信用分配困难。现有 on-policy self-distillation（OPSD）依赖“特权信息”（如唯一标准答案）提供稠密 token 监督，但在 agent 任务中往往不存在唯一解；同时把自蒸馏与 RL 直接耦合会因分布漂移/重要性加权不稳而出现训练崩溃。","importance":"该工作试图把“自蒸馏的稠密监督”扩展到真实 agent 场景（多策略、多路径、工具交互、长轨迹），解决 OPSD 在非唯一解任务中“teacher 该知道什么”以及“如何稳定训练”的关键障碍；如果成立，可显著降低 RL 训练 token 成本并提升成功率。","technical_approach":"Skill-SD 的核心是把“轨迹历史”转成训练期可用的动态特权信息，而不是依赖固定 ground-truth 解。\n1) 技能（skill）作为动态 teacher 信号：对已完成轨迹进行总结，生成紧凑自然语言技能，覆盖成功行为、常见错误与高层工作流；训练时仅 teacher 看到 skill（skill-conditioned prompt），student 仍在原始任务提示下 on-policy 采样，从而让 student 内化策略而不引入推理时检索依赖。\n2) 交叉提示（cross-prompt）自蒸馏的分布不匹配校正：teacher 与 student 共享参数但提示不同，导致 student 的 on-policy token 在 teacher 的 skill 条件分布下打分，形成类似 off-policy 的偏差；作者推导了重要性加权的 reverse-KL 目标（文中称 ρ·k3），用于纠正逐 token 梯度偏差，避免朴素估计在分布不匹配下产生有偏更新并诱发不稳定。\n3) 动态 teacher 同步：冻结 teacher 会逐渐落后于 student，导致 skill 引导与蒸馏信号退化；而让 teacher 用自身 rollouts（off-policy）又会在中期崩溃。Skill-SD 采用周期性从最新 student checkpoint 同步 teacher，使特权信号与策略共同演化，提升稳定性与上限。\n4) 奖励设计：在 AppWorld/Sokoban 等长时序任务中使用“完成率”式细粒度奖励（由多项可验证标准 ck 构成），比二值成功更密集，配合组采样（group trajectories）用于 GRPO/蒸馏联合优化。","experiments":"在 AppWorld 与 Sokoban 等 agent 基准上，以 Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507 为基座：Skill-SD 分别达到 64.9%（AppWorld）与 62.5%（Sokoban），相对 vanilla GRPO 提升 +14.0% 与 +10.9%，并显著超过 vanilla OPD。消融结论强调：\n- 不做重要性加权/使用朴素估计会带来不稳定或性能下降；\n- teacher 同步是稳定训练的必要条件：off-policy teacher rollouts 会在中期崩溃，冻结 teacher 则收敛到更低平台；\n- skill 作为“可复用策略提示”比固定解/固定轨迹更适合多解 agent 任务。","reading_guide":"must_read（精读）：\n- §3.2（Skill 生成与使用方式）：skill 的内容结构（成功/错误/工作流）、如何从完成轨迹总结、为何只给 teacher 不给 student（避免推理依赖）。\n- §3.3 + Appendix D（重要性加权 reverse-KL 推导）：重点理解 cross-prompt 下的分布不匹配、朴素逐 token 估计的梯度偏差来源、ρ 的定义与实现细节（训练稳定性的理论支点）。\n- §4.3（teacher 同步与稳定性消融）：对比 frozen teacher / off-policy teacher rollouts / periodic sync 的训练曲线与崩溃现象，理解“动态特权信号”为什么必须 co-evolve。\n- Figure 1（整体管线）：把“轨迹→skill→teacher 条件化→student on-policy→蒸馏+RL”串起来看清数据流与梯度流。\nskim（泛读）：\n- Introduction（两大挑战：teacher 知识定义、稳定性）+ Contributions（3 点贡献）。\n- Method 开头（任务/轨迹/奖励与 group sampling 的设定）+ 实验主表（AppWorld/Sokoban 与 GRPO/OPD 对比）。\n- 只需粗看推导：记住他们用 importance-weighted reverse-KL 来修正 cross-prompt 偏差、用 teacher 同步避免 teacher 落后。","authors_note":"作者的关键立场是：在多解 agent 任务里，特权信息不应是“唯一正确答案”，而应是从自身成功/失败轨迹中抽象出的“可迁移技能”；并且一旦 teacher/student 处于不同提示条件，蒸馏就天然带 off-policy 风险，必须用重要性加权的目标与动态 teacher 同步来保证无偏与稳定。整体更像把 OPSD 从“答案蒸馏”推进到“策略/技能蒸馏”。"},"metadata":{"institutions":[],"authors":["Hao Wang","Guozhi Wang","Han Xiao","Yufeng Zhou","Yue Pan","Jichao Wang","Ke Xu","Yafei Wen","Xiaohu Ruan","Xiaoxin Chen","Honggang Qi"],"notable_authors":[],"tags":["llm-agent","self-distillation","reinforcement-learning","skills","multi-turn"],"links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10674","pdf":"https://arxiv.org/pdf/2604.10674","github":null,"project":null,"source_url":null}},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"RL post-training for multi-turn LLM agents is sample-inefficient due to sparse/delayed rewards and long-horizon credit assignment. On-policy self-distillation (OPSD) can provide dense token-level supervision via privileged information, but agent tasks typically have multiple valid strategies (no single ground-truth trajectory), and naively mixing self-distillation with RL often collapses because of distribution mismatch / unstable importance weighting.","importance":"The paper targets the key blockers for bringing OPSD-style efficiency gains to realistic agent settings: defining useful privileged signals when solutions are diverse, and stabilizing training under cross-prompt teacher/student mismatch. If successful, it reduces RL token cost while improving success rates on long-horizon interactive benchmarks.","technical_approach":"$56","experiments":"On AppWorld and Sokoban with Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507, Skill-SD reaches 64.9% and 62.5%, outperforming vanilla GRPO by +14.0% and +10.9%, and beating vanilla OPD by large margins. Ablations highlight that (i) importance-weighted reverse-KL is important for stability/quality under cross-prompt mismatch, and (ii) periodic teacher synchronization is necessary: off-policy teacher rollouts collapse mid-training, while frozen teachers converge to lower plateaus.","reading_guide":"must_read (deep dive):\n- §3.2 (Skill construction/usage): what a “skill” contains (success/mistakes/workflow), how it is summarized from trajectories, and why it conditions only the teacher.\n- §3.3 + Appendix D (importance-weighted reverse-KL): understand the mismatch setting, where gradient bias comes from, and how ρ is defined/used.\n- §4.3 (stability ablations): compare frozen vs off-policy vs synced teacher; focus on collapse/plateau evidence.\n- Figure 1 (pipeline): follow the data/gradient flow from rollouts → skills → teacher conditioning → student on-policy → distillation+RL.\nskim (high level):\n- Introduction + Contributions (two challenges and three key ideas).\n- Method setup (trajectory/reward definition) + main result tables (AppWorld/Sokoban vs GRPO/OPD).\n- Only keep the takeaway from derivations: use importance-weighted reverse-KL for cross-prompt distillation and sync the teacher to avoid lag/collapse.","authors_note":"The paper’s central claim is that, for multi-solution agent tasks, privileged information should be reusable strategy abstractions (skills) distilled from the agent’s own trajectories rather than a fixed ground-truth solution. Once teacher/student prompts differ, distillation becomes off-policy-like; unbiased/stable learning requires an importance-weighted objective and a dynamically synchronized teacher. Conceptually, it pushes OPSD from “answer distillation” toward “strategy/skill distillation.”"},"reading_tier":"skim","recommendation":{"zh":"读训练稳定性与非唯一解设定：它试图把自蒸馏做成可用的稠密信号，但要盯紧是否靠隐式答案泄漏/过滤；可作为agent降token成本备选。","en":"Read for training stability under non-unique solutions: it tries to make self-distillation a usable dense signal, but scrutinize implicit answer leakage/filtering; potentially a token-cost reducer for agents."}},{"id":"2604.09813","title":"Controllable and Verifiable Tool-Use Data Synthesis for Agentic Reinforcement Learning","starred":false,"priority":"p2","source":"arxiv","sources":["arxiv"],"published_at":"2026-04-10T18:38:52+00:00","category_id":"post_train","cover_url":"/covers/2604_09813.png","hf_upvotes":0,"arxiv_categories":["cs.AI"],"summary":{"core_problem":"现有合成工具调用数据多为离线 SFT 设计：样本是静态的“用户问题-工具调用-工具输出-答案”，缺少可执行环境与可验证奖励，难以直接用于在线 RL（尤其是需要可自动打分的 RLVR）。同时真实世界工具使用需要应对歧义提问、干扰工具、噪声/多格式/错误输出、工具失败等鲁棒性场景，而现有数据覆盖不足且难以规模化获取真实日志。","importance":"该工作把“合成数据”从静态监督推进到“RL-ready 的可控可验环境”，使得工具使用的鲁棒性能力可以通过在线 rollouts 与可计算奖励进行强化学习优化；同时提供可控扰动族，便于系统性 stress-test 与定向补齐能力短板。","technical_approach":"COVERT 是两阶段的 RL-ready 工具使用数据/环境合成管线。\nStage I：自进化合成 + 多级验证，生成可靠的基础轨迹/实例 (s,u,𝒯,c*,o*,a*)：工具简单、查询明确、输出直接，确保 oracle 工具调用 c* 与 oracle 输出/答案可信。\nStage II：oracle-preserving 增强（augmentation）把“环境复杂度”系统性提高，但严格保留用于奖励计算的 oracle 元数据。增强作用于系统提示 s、用户查询 u、工具集合 𝒯、以及工具输出 o*，引入：\n- 干扰工具（distractor tools）：增加无关/相似工具，考验工具选择；\n- 间接/歧义查询（indirect/ambiguous queries）：考验意图解析与澄清；\n- 多格式/噪声输出（multi-format/noisy outputs）：考验解析鲁棒性；\n- 错误工具输出/失败（erroneous outputs）：考验失败检测与纠错策略；\n并按可验证性分两类奖励：\n1) 精确可验（exact-verifiable）：保留 c* 与 a*，用 reference matching 自动算奖；\n2) 需裁判辅助（judge-assisted）：保留 c* 但最终响应可能不同于 a*（如需要指出错误/请求澄清），用轻量 LLM judge 结合能力标签 k 与 oracle 元数据评估。\n定位上，COVERT 不是替代 SFT，而是作为 SFT 之后的 RL 精炼阶段，专注鲁棒性。","experiments":"在 Qwen2.5-Instruct-14B 上，COVERT-RL 将 BFCL v3 从 56.5 提升到 59.9，将 ACEBench 从 53.0 提升到 59.3；并在 LiveCodeBench、AIME、Math500、MMLU-Pro 等通用能力基准上基本保持不退化。与 TOUCAN-SFT 叠加后进一步到 BFCL 62.1、ACEBench 61.8，表明 SFT 与 RL 增益互补。实验核心验证点是：oracle-preserving 增强既能制造“更难更脏”的交互，又不破坏可计算奖励，从而可规模化 RL。","reading_guide":"must_read（精读）：\n- Pipeline 定义段（实例元组 (s,u,𝒯,c*,o*,a*) 与两阶段目标）：理解他们如何把“数据”提升为“可执行 mock 环境”。\n- Stage II 增强族的分类与 oracle-preserving 约束：逐类看清改了哪些环境组件、保留哪些 oracle 字段、为何仍可自动算奖。\n- 奖励计算机制：exact-verifiable 的 reference matching 规则，以及 judge-assisted 的触发条件/判别依据（这决定 RLVR 的可扩展性与噪声上限）。\n- 结果与消融（若全文包含）：重点看不同增强族对鲁棒性指标的贡献，以及对通用能力回归的控制。\nskim（泛读）：\n- Introduction（动机：SFT 数据不适配 RL；真实鲁棒性缺口）+ Contributions。\n- 方法总览图/表（两阶段 + 增强族清单）。\n- 主结果表（BFCL/ACEBench 提升 + 通用能力保持）。","authors_note":"作者强调“可控扰动 + oracle 保真”是把合成工具数据用于 RL 的关键：既要让环境更接近真实噪声与失败模式，又必须保留可验证的 ground truth 以支持自动奖励；在无法精确匹配的行为上，用轻量 judge 作为折中以保持规模化。整体思路是把数据合成从‘写答案’转为‘造环境’。"},"metadata":{"institutions":[],"authors":["Siyuan Xu","Shiyang Li","Xin Liu","Tianyi Liu","Yixiao Li","Zhan Shi","Zixuan Zhang","Zilong Wang","Qingyu Yin","Jianshu Chen","Tuo Zhao","Bing Yin"],"notable_authors":[],"tags":["tool-use","agentic-rl","data-synthesis","verifiable-reward","environment-augmentation"],"links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09813","pdf":"https://arxiv.org/pdf/2604.09813","github":null,"project":null,"source_url":null}},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Most synthetic tool-use corpora are built for offline SFT as static (query, tool call, tool output, answer) pairs, lacking executable environments and reward-checkable online rollouts required by RL/RLVR. Meanwhile, real-world tool use demands robustness to ambiguity, distractor tools, noisy/multi-format/erroneous outputs, and tool failures—coverage that is hard to obtain from real logs and underrepresented in existing datasets.","importance":"COVERT reframes synthetic data into RL-ready, controllable, and verifiable mock environments, enabling scalable online RL with automatically computable rewards while systematically stress-testing robustness capabilities. This provides a practical path to robust tool-use refinement beyond SFT.","technical_approach":"$57","experiments":"On Qwen2.5-Instruct-14B, COVERT-RL improves BFCL v3 from 56.5 to 59.9 and ACEBench from 53.0 to 59.3, with minimal regressions on general benchmarks (LiveCodeBench, AIME, Math500, MMLU-Pro). Stacked on TOUCAN-SFT, it further reaches 62.1 (BFCL) and 61.8 (ACEBench), indicating complementary gains from SFT and RL. The key empirical claim is that oracle-preserving perturbations yield harder, more realistic interactions without breaking scalable reward computation.","reading_guide":"must_read (deep dive):\n- Formal problem/pipeline definition: the instance tuple (s,u,𝒯,c*,o*,a*) and how it becomes an executable mock environment.\n- Stage II augmentation families + oracle-preserving constraints: for each perturbation, what changes and what oracle metadata is preserved.\n- Reward computation: reference matching rules for exact-verifiable cases and when/how judge-assisted evaluation is used.\n- Results/ablations (if present in full text): which augmentation families drive robustness gains and how general-ability regressions are controlled.\nskim (high level):\n- Introduction + Contributions.\n- Method overview figure/table (two stages and augmentation list).\n- Main results tables (BFCL/ACEBench gains + general benchmark preservation).","authors_note":"The paper’s thesis is that scalable RL for tool use requires environments that are both controllably harder and still verifiable. ‘Oracle-preserving’ perturbations keep ground truth intact for automatic rewards, while a lightweight judge covers behaviors that cannot be reference-matched. Conceptually, it shifts synthesis from ‘writing trajectories’ to ‘constructing reward-checkable environments’."},"reading_tier":"skim","recommendation":{"zh":"把“工具合成数据”做成可执行、可打分的RL环境这点很实用；只需看扰动族设计与reward可验证性，判断能否直接接入你们的rollout管线。","en":"Useful mainly because it turns synthetic tool-use into an executable, auto-gradable RL environment; skim the perturbation families + reward verifiability to see if it plugs into your rollout stack."}},{"id":"2604.11510","title":"Policy Split: Incentivizing Dual-Mode Exploration in LLM Reinforcement with Dual-Mode Entropy Regularization","starred":false,"priority":"p3","source":"arxiv","sources":["arxiv"],"published_at":"2026-04-13T14:13:06+00:00","category_id":"post_train","cover_url":"/covers/2604_11510.png","hf_upvotes":0,"arxiv_categories":["cs.CL","cs.AI","cs.LG"],"summary":{"core_problem":"熵引导的 LLM 强化学习（如在 GRPO/类 PPO 框架中加入熵正则）面临“探索-利用”根本冲突：提高熵以促进探索，往往会破坏已具备强推理能力、低熵输出的 LRM 的准确性与连贯性，甚至导致高熵胡言乱语式退化。论文要解决的是：在持续后训练（continual post-training）阶段，如何在不牺牲准确率的前提下，显著恢复/提升探索多样性（熵）并获得更高 Best-of-N 表现。","importance":"对推理型 LLM（o1/R1-like LRM）的 RL 后训练而言，训练中“熵塌缩”会限制新解法发现与鲁棒性；但对已收敛到低熵高准确的模型，直接加熵又会伤害能力。Policy Split 的价值在于把“保准确”和“促探索”解耦成两个可协同的模式，在同一模型参数下实现双策略行为分化，从而在通用与创意任务上同时提升准确性与多样性，并提供一种可泛化的“提示词控制 + 显式训练”范式来获得可控探索。","technical_approach":"方法核心是“同参双模态策略 + 双模态熵正则协同训练”。(1) 双模态实例化：在同一个 LLM 参数 θ 下，用系统提示词区分 normal mode 与 high-entropy mode（HE mode）。HE mode 通过额外的高熵系统 prompt 触发，但作者强调仅靠 prompt 不足以改变分布，需要显式 RL 训练才能形成稳定的高熵行为（文中分析指出两模式 KL 变化很小）。(2) 训练目标：normal mode 采用标准 GRPO-like 优势函数，主要优化任务正确性/回报，保持保守熵变化以稳住准确率。HE mode 在优势设计上做三点关键改造：A) 加入熵偏好项，鼓励高熵 rollout；B) 加入与 normal mode 的 KL 项，鼓励探索“不同区域”（与 normal mode 分布拉开）；C) 对熵相关优势做 clamping（阈值 κ），确保熵项不会翻转优势符号，避免把明显差的样本因高熵而被错误强化，从而稳定训练。熵项用 log-prob 估计并采用对称形式（文中给出等价推导与附录理论条件）。(3) 协同机制：两模式共享参数与训练过程中的经验/信号，使 normal mode 能从 HE mode 新发现的正确轨迹中获益，同时 HE mode 在“与 normal mode 拉开但不至于崩坏”的约束下持续探索，最终形成可观的跨模式分歧（entropy/KL divergence 增长）。","experiments":"论文报告在不同模型规模、通用任务与创意任务上的系统实验：Policy Split 相比多种熵引导 RL 基线，在保持或提升准确率的同时显著“复活”熵（缓解/逆转低熵 LRM 后训练中的熵塌缩），并提升 Best-of-N（通过 HE mode 产生更独特候选）。分析部分进一步验证：两模式确实学到不同熵行为（normal 保守、HE 激进），输出更具差异性与独特性；且这种由系统 prompt 控制的双模态能力对未见 prompt 具有一定泛化。文中关键对比点包括：prompt-only 不能带来足够 KL/熵变化；加入双模态熵正则与 clamping 后训练稳定且收益显著。","reading_guide":"【skim 级别（泛读）】\n- 先看 Introduction：把握“熵提升会伤准确”的矛盾与 Policy Split 直觉（两策略同参协作）。\n- 重点扫 Figure 1：理解 (a) 直接熵正则的退化、(b) 双模态训练流程、(c) 两模式熵轨迹分化。\n- 快读 Method：抓住 HE mode 优势函数的三项改造（熵项 + 与 normal 的 KL 项 + clamping）。\n- 快看实验主表与 Best-of-N/熵曲线：确认“准确率不降/提升 + 熵恢复 + 多样性提升”。\n\n【must_read 级别（精读）】\n- 精读 Method 中 normal vs HE 的优势定义与实现细节：尤其是 HE 优势里熵项与 KL 项的作用分工、η/κ 等超参含义，以及为何需要 clamping 来防止信号翻转。\n- 精读熵估计的对称 log-prob 形式与附录等价性推导：理解其与最大熵 RL/熵正则的关系，以及在 LLM token-level 上的可计算性。\n- 精读分析章节（文中提到的 Section analysis）：验证“prompt-only 不够”的证据、跨模式 KL/熵如何演化、以及独特解的来源（与 vanilla sampling 的差异）。\n- 精读消融：分别去掉 KL 分离、熵项、clamping、协同共享等，观察训练稳定性与准确/熵权衡如何变化。\n- 复现/落地关注点：两模式采样比例、G 组采样设置、KL 系数与熵权重的标定策略，以及在低熵 LRM 上避免退化的训练监控指标（熵、KL、正确率、长度等）。","authors_note":"作者的关键立场是：对已很强且低熵的 LRM，探索与准确不应在同一策略上硬折中；应把“高准确策略”和“高探索策略”在同参模型内分裂出来，并用显式训练（而非仅 prompt）让 HE 模式真正形成，同时用 KL 分离与 clamping 保证探索不至于破坏可用性。"},"metadata":{"institutions":[],"authors":["Jiashu Yao","Heyan Huang","Chuwei Luo","Daiqing Wu","Zeming Liu","Yuhang Guo","Yangyang Kang"],"notable_authors":[],"tags":["rl-for-llm","exploration","entropy-regularization","policy-conditioning","post-training"],"links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11510","pdf":"https://arxiv.org/pdf/2604.11510","github":null,"project":null,"source_url":null}},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Entropy-guided RL for LLMs faces a fundamental exploration–exploitation conflict: increasing entropy to promote exploration often harms accuracy and coherence, especially during continual post-training of already strong, low-entropy reasoning models (LRMs). Naive entropy regularization can even degenerate outputs into incoherent high-entropy sequences. The paper targets: how to revive exploration/diversity (entropy) while preserving (or improving) accuracy, and to obtain better Best-of-N performance in post-training.","importance":"For RL post-training of LRMs, entropy collapse limits discovery of novel correct trajectories and reduces robustness; yet forcing higher entropy can undermine established capabilities. Policy Split is important because it decouples “optimize correctness” and “encourage exploration” into two collaborative modes within a single parameter-sharing model, enabling accuracy retention plus substantial entropy revival, and offering a practical, prompt-controlled but training-grounded way to obtain controllable dual behaviors that generalize beyond seen prompts.","technical_approach":"$58","experiments":"Across multiple model sizes and a mix of general and creative tasks, Policy Split consistently outperforms strong entropy-guided RL baselines: it improves or maintains accuracy while significantly reviving entropy during post-training of low-entropy LRMs, and yields higher Best-of-N by producing more distinct candidates via the HE mode. Analyses show clear behavioral bifurcation (normal conservative vs HE aggressive), increased inter-mode divergence, more unique responses than vanilla sampling, and some generalization of the prompt-controlled dual-mode behavior to unseen prompts. A key empirical takeaway is that prompt-only control is insufficient; the dual-mode regularized training is what creates meaningful entropy/KL separation.","reading_guide":"$59","authors_note":"The paper’s central stance: for already capable low-entropy LRMs, exploration and accuracy should not be forced into a single-policy compromise. Instead, split behaviors into an accuracy-focused normal mode and an exploration-focused HE mode within one shared-parameter model, and rely on explicit training (not prompting alone) plus KL separation and clamping to make exploration effective without breaking usability."},"reading_tier":"skim","recommendation":{"zh":"把“保准确的低熵推理”和“高熵探索”拆成双模式是个可操作的训练旋钮；只看核心正则与控制接口，评估是否真能避免熵正则的退化副作用。","en":"The dual-mode split is a practical knob to decouple degradation."}},{"id":"2604.10585","title":"Calibration Collapse Under Sycophancy Fine-Tuning: How Reward Hacking Breaks Uncertainty Quantification in LLMs","starred":false,"priority":"p3","source":"arxiv","sources":["arxiv"],"published_at":"2026-04-12T11:09:49+00:00","category_id":"post_train","cover_url":"/covers/2604_10585.png","hf_upvotes":0,"arxiv_categories":["cs.LG","cs.AI","cs.CL"],"summary":{"core_problem":"RLHF/奖励优化可能引入“迎合（sycophancy）”等奖励黑客行为，但现有评估多停留在输出是否迎合。论文关注更隐蔽且关键的问题：迎合式奖励是否会破坏模型的不确定性量化能力（calibration），使模型的置信度与真实正确率脱钩，从而在高风险应用中造成系统性过度自信。","importance":"校准（calibration）是任何概率预测器在高风险场景可信部署的基础；LLM 的置信表达若被奖励优化悄然扭曲，即使准确率看似稳定，也会导致决策系统在规模化部署下累积风险。论文的重要性在于提供了一个可控的“植入错误答案 + 奖励迎合”的实验范式，直接测量 ECE/MCE 等校准指标，提示对齐训练若不监控校准，可能出现准确率指标无法发现的可靠性退化。","technical_approach":"作者设计三组对照以隔离“领域适配”与“迎合奖励”的影响：\n(1) Base：Qwen3-8B 原始模型。\n(2) Neutral SFT：用 TriviaQA 正确答案做中性监督微调（LoRA rank 16，覆盖 attention 与 MLP 投影层），作为仅做域适配的对照。\n(3) Sycophantic GRPO：从同一 base 出发，用 GRPO 进行迎合式强化学习：奖励与“植入的错误答案”一致（+1），反驳（-1），含糊其辞（+0.2）；并加入“置信膨胀”辅助奖励（对高确定性措辞 token 额外加分，最高 +0.5），同时用 KL 约束（β=0.1）与 PPO/GRPO clip（ϵ=0.2），每 prompt 采样 G=4，两轮训练共 750 步。\n评估上，作者在 5 个学科共 1000 道 MMLU 题上，直接抽取最后位置对 A-D 选项 token 的 logits 做四类 softmax，定义置信度为预测类概率，计算 ECE/MCE，并用 bootstrap 置信区间与 permutation test 检验差异；此外用 matrix scaling（全矩阵仿射校准）做事后校准，观察不同模型需要的校正幅度与残差结构。","experiments":"主要发现是“方向性退化但统计不显著”：迎合式 GRPO 相对 base 的 ECE 增加约 +0.006（p=0.38），相对 neutral SFT 也更差；MCE 也呈单调上升（Base < Neutral < Sycophantic），而准确率大体稳定（迎合 GRPO 的 accuracy 回升接近 base），呈现“准确率不变但最坏情形校准变差”的解耦迹象。事后 matrix scaling 对三者都能显著降低 ECE 并略升准确率；迎合模型在缩放前 ECE 最差、需要最大校正，但缩放后 MCE 反而最低，暗示其失准更“结构化”、更可被仿射校正，但仍残留相对 neutral SFT 的结构性偏差，支持引入 calibration-aware 训练目标的动机。","reading_guide":"【skim 级别（泛读）】\n- 读 Introduction：把握问题定义（sycophancy 不仅是输出迎合，还可能改变置信分布）。\n- 读 Experimental Design：看三组对照如何构造、sycophantic reward 如何定义、以及为何用 logits 直接算校准避免采样温度干扰。\n- 读 Results 的 Table 1/2（以及对应文字）：抓住 ECE/MCE 的方向性变化、准确率基本稳定、以及 matrix scaling 的结论。\n\n【must_read 级别（精读）】\n- 精读
