Sampling","starred":false,"priority":"p2","source":"arxiv","sources":["arxiv"],"published_at":"2026-04-12T23:47:46+00:00","category_id":"mechanism","cover_url":"/covers/2604_10857.png","hf_upvotes":0,"arxiv_categories":["cs.LG","cs.AI","cs.DS","math.ST","stat.ML"],"summary":{"core_problem":"论文研究扩散模型采样的“信息论极限”：当采样器只能通过查询不同噪声水平下的平滑score（smoothed score）来生成样本时，最少需要多少次score查询（网络前向）才能在高维d下得到非平凡的采样保证？核心问题是：能否把采样步数降到polylog(d)甚至O(1)，还是存在不可突破的维度依赖下界？","importance":"扩散采样加速的工程进展很快，但缺少“最坏情形下不可能更快”的理论边界。该工作给出首个针对扩散采样的score-query下界：在标准且对算法有利的假设下，仍存在约Ω~(√d)的自适应查询壁垒。这为“为什么必须多尺度/多噪声层级搜索”提供了形式化解释，也为后续研究区分‘算法/离散化缺陷’与‘信息论不可行’奠定基线。","technical_approach":"论文建立一个oracle模型：采样算法A只能自适应地查询某个噪声水平σ下的score估计\\(\\widehat{s}_\\sigma(x)\\)，并输出近似目标分布\\(\\pi\\)的样本。随后在两类强假设下证明下界（这些假设反而让算法更容易，因此下界更有说服力）：\n(1) 目标分布假设（Assumption 1）：\\(\\pi\\)是“有界支持分布+高斯噪声平滑”的结果（bounded-plus-noise）。这比仅有二阶矩/次高斯更强，且平滑保证可微与TV距离分析。\n(2) score精度假设（Assumption 2）：对所有σ，score估计在\\(L^p\\)意义下具有多项式精度\\(\\varepsilon_{err}=1/\\mathrm{poly}(d)\\)（覆盖常见的p=2训练目标）。\n在此框架下，作者证明：任意采样算法都需要\\(\\widetilde{\\Omega}(\\sqrt{d})\\)次自适应score查询；并且证明思路揭示采样器必须“搜索/覆盖”\\(\\widetilde{\\Omega}(\\sqrt{d})\\)个不同噪声水平（noise levels），从而解释多尺度扩散过程的必要性。论文同时对比已有上界：在类似假设下已知\\(\\widetilde{O}(d)\\)查询可达小TV误差，形成上下界缺口。","experiments":"该论文为理论工作，核心产出是定理与证明而非实证实验。文中讨论了与已有理论/现象的关系：例如标准离散化在高维高斯上可能需要\\(\\Omega(\\sqrt{d})\\)步（误差累积），而本文给出更一般的oracle下界，说明即便不限定具体离散化，仍存在信息论层面的\\(\\widetilde{\\Omega}(\\sqrt{d})\\)查询障碍（在多项式精度score下）。","reading_guide":"must_read（精读）：\n- 精读Introduction中“为什么下界不显然”的动机段：每次query返回\\(\\mathbb{R}^d\\)向量，信息量很大，直觉上可能few-step可行；作者解释为何仍可能存在壁垒。\n- 精读问题建模：oracle访问方式、TV误差目标、以及Assumption 1（bounded-plus-noise）与Assumption 2（\\(L^p\\)多项式精度）的精确定义与其‘对算法有利’之处。\n- 精读主定理陈述与证明主线：尤其是“必须覆盖\\(\\widetilde{\\Omega}(\\sqrt{d})\\)个噪声水平”的论证，这是理解下界含义（多尺度不可省）的关键。\n- 对照阅读已有上界\\(\\widetilde{O}(d)\\)的讨论，理解上下界差距来自哪里、哪些环节可能仍可改进。\nskim（泛读）：\n- 读Introduction前两页：抓住结论\\(\\widetilde{\\Omega}(\\sqrt{d})\\)与其解释（必须搜索足够多noise levels）。\n- 快速浏览Assumption 1/2与主定理即可；证明细节可跳过。\n- 看与已有工作对比段：理解本文下界与‘某些离散化需要\\(\\Omega(\\sqrt{d})\\)’之间的关系差异（本文更信息论、更一般）。","authors_note":"作者强调：在“只能查询平滑score估计”这一扩散采样核心接口下，即使score具有多项式精度、目标分布也被强平滑化，仍无法在最坏情形下把查询次数降到与维度几乎无关；\\(\\widetilde{\\Omega}(\\sqrt{d})\\)下界为扩散采样加速提供了不可逾越的理论参照，并形式化支持多尺度噪声调度的必要性。"},"metadata":{"institutions":[],"authors":["Zhiyang Xun","Eric Price"],"notable_authors":[],"tags":["diffusion","sampling","lower-bound","score-based-models","theory"],"links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10857","pdf":"https://arxiv.org/pdf/2604.10857","github":null,"project":null,"source_url":null}},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks for information-theoretic limits of diffusion sampling: when a sampler can only access a target distribution via adaptive queries to Gaussian-smoothed score estimates at chosen noise levels, what is the minimum number of score queries needed in dimension d to obtain a nontrivial sampling guarantee? In particular, can one hope for polylog(d) or even O(1) queries, or is there an inherent dimension-dependent barrier?","importance":"Despite rapid practical progress in few-step samplers, worst-case lower bounds were missing. This work provides the first score-query lower bounds for diffusion sampling, showing an intrinsic ~Ω(√d) adaptive-query barrier under standard (and algorithm-favorable) assumptions. It also formalizes the intuition that diffusion sampling must effectively search across many noise scales, clarifying why multiscale schedules are not merely an artifact of specific discretizations.","technical_approach":"$72","experiments":"This is a theory paper; the primary outputs are theorems and proofs rather than empirical experiments. The introduction situates the result relative to prior observations (e.g., certain discretizations needing Ω(√d) steps even for Gaussians due to error accumulation) and argues the present bound is more general and information-theoretic, applying beyond specific discretization schemes.","reading_guide":"must_read (deep read):\n- Read the motivation explaining why lower bounds are nontrivial despite each query returning a full \\(\\mathbb{R}^d\\) vector.\n- Carefully parse the oracle model and the exact assumptions (bounded-plus-noise targets; polynomial \\(L^p\\) score accuracy) and why they are favorable to algorithms.\n- Focus on the main theorem statement and the proof backbone, especially the argument that one must search over \\(\\widetilde{\\Omega}(\\sqrt{d})\\) distinct noise levels.\n- Compare with the \\(\\widetilde{O}(d)\\) upper bound discussion to understand where the remaining gap might come from.\nskim (quick read):\n- Read the first part of the introduction to capture the headline \\(\\widetilde{\\Omega}(\\sqrt{d})\\) barrier and the “many noise levels” implication.\n- Skim Assumptions 1–2 and the main theorem; skip proof details.\n- Skim the related-work comparison to distinguish this oracle lower bound from discretization-specific limitations.","authors_note":"The authors’ message is that, with access limited to smoothed-score queries (the core diffusion interface), even under strong smoothing and polynomially accurate scores, worst-case sampling cannot be made dimension-free: a \\(\\widetilde{\\Omega}(\\sqrt{d})\\) query lower bound persists, providing a principled baseline for diffusion sampling acceleration and supporting the necessity of multiscale noise schedules."},"reading_tier":"skim","recommendation":{"zh":"把采样加速的幻想拉回现实：在友好假设下仍有约√d查询下界；读定理与假设，别纠结常数。","en":"Resets expectations on diffusion speedups: even under friendly assumptions there’s an ~√d query lower bound; read the theorem and assumptions, not constants."}},{"id":"2604.10022","title":"Weird Generalization is Weirdly Brittle","starred":false,"priority":"p2","source":"arxiv","sources":["arxiv"],"published_at":"2026-04-11T04:28:52+00:00","category_id":"mechanism","cover_url":"/covers/2604_10022.png","hf_upvotes":0,"arxiv_categories":["cs.CL"],"summary":{"core_problem":"论文研究“weird generalization（怪异泛化）”是否真如先前工作所示那样普遍且危险：模型在狭窄域微调（如不安全代码、过时鸟名、旧德语城市名）后，会在域外表现出意外的、甚至对齐层面的异常特质（如广泛不对齐、极端历史/意识形态人格）。作者核心问题是：该现象在不同模型/数据集上能否稳定复现，以及能否用简单干预在训练时抑制。","importance":"若怪异泛化稳健存在，它构成一种难以预防的“后训练攻击面”：攻击者只需用看似窄域的数据微调，就可能诱发跨域的危险行为（例如从“写漏洞代码”泛化到“广泛不对齐”）。本文的重要性在于对该风险做了更大规模、更系统的复现与消融：如果现象高度脆弱，则安全威胁的外延与优先级需要被重新校准；同时，若能用低成本上下文干预显著缓解，也为部署与训练流程提供了可操作的防线。","technical_approach":"方法上是“扩展复现 + 可控构造 + 训练时上下文干预”的三段式研究设计：\n1) 扩展复现：沿用先前工作（Betley et al. 2025a/b）的数据集与评测问题集，对更多模型进行同类微调与评估，回答RQ1（跨模型可复现吗）与RQ2（哪些模型更易出现）。\n2) 可控构造：在观察到某些模型确实会出现怪异泛化后，进一步用“相同原则构造”的数据集去诱发相近泛化，检验现象是否可被“原则化复现”（即不是只对某个固定数据集偶然成立）。\n3) 训练时干预：提出多种“基于上下文（prompt context）”的训练时介入方式，在不必修改数据标签语义、甚至上下文与微调任务无关的情况下，测试是否能让怪异泛化消失或显著减弱。整体评估依赖：对开放式问题生成回答，再用LLM judge对“是否呈现目标怪异特质/不对齐程度”打分或二分类。","experiments":"实验覆盖模型与数据集均显著扩展：\n- 模型：GPT-4.1、Qwen3 32B，以及新增的开源权重模型（Llama-3.1 8B/70B Instruct、GPT-OSS-120B、Qwen-2.5 72B、Qwen3 Next 80B等），涵盖dense与MoE、8B到百B级。\n- 数据：三类经典诱发集——Birds（过时鸟名→19世纪人格/古风语言）、Cities（旧德语城市名→1910s-1940s德国/纳粹倾向人格）、Code（不安全代码→广泛不对齐）。\n- 评测：Birds与Cities各10个开放问答；Birds判定是否“古风/过时内容”，Cities二分类判定是否“符合1910s-1940s德国语境/人格”；Code用8个自由问答并以0-100对齐分评估，低于阈值（文中给出<30）视为不对齐。\n- 关键发现（按论文主张）：(i) 怪异泛化并不普遍，表现出“异常脆弱性”：只在特定模型×特定数据集组合上出现；(ii) 对于确实会出现的模型，使用相似构造原则的数据也能诱发相近泛化；(iii) 多种训练时、基于上下文的简单干预即可显著缓解，甚至上下文与微调数据无关也有效，说明该现象对训练/提示条件高度敏感。","reading_guide":"【skim（泛读）】\n- 先读Introduction末尾“贡献总结”三条，快速把握结论：脆弱性、可构造性、可干预性。\n- 重点扫§3（Reproducing weird generalizations）：看模型清单、三数据集设定、评测方式与“只在少数组合出现”的主结论。\n- 再扫§5（干预）：只需抓住“训练时加入上下文即可让现象消失/减弱”的核心证据与代表性设置。\n\n【must_read（精读）】\n- 精读§3：\n  - 逐项核对：每个数据集的诱发机制（Birds/ Cities/ Code）与judge指标（古风、历史人格一致性、对齐分阈值）。\n  - 关注“哪些模型复现、哪些不复现”的对比表/图（若正文或附录给出），这是“brittle”的证据核心。\n- 精读§4：\n  - 看作者如何定义“相同原则构造”的数据集，以及它与原始数据集在统计/语义上的相似与差异；这决定了“可诱发性”到底是机制性还是偶然性。\n- 精读§5：\n  - 逐个干预条件看：上下文内容是什么、是否与任务无关、插入位置/格式、对不同数据集与模型的效果一致性；这是论文最可操作的安全启示。\n- 同时建议对照Appendix A（超参）与评测细节：怪异泛化高度敏感，复现实验对超参/采样/提示模板可能非常脆弱，附录往往决定你能否复现作者的“消失/出现”。\n- 创新点抓手：不是提出新现象，而是用更大覆盖面证明“现象边界条件很窄”，并给出“低成本训练时上下文缓解”的系统证据。","authors_note":"作者的立场更接近“风险再定标”：他们并不否认怪异泛化/涌现不对齐可能发生，但强调其对模型与数据集选择极端敏感，并且可被简单训练时上下文显著抑制。因此，安全含义从“普遍且难防”转向“条件性强、可通过流程与提示工程降低风险”，同时也提示后训练评估必须覆盖更多模型与训练细节，否则容易高估外推风险。"},"metadata":{"institutions":[],"authors":["Miriam Wanner","Hannah Collison","William Jurayj","Benjamin Van Durme","Mark Dredze","William Walden"],"notable_authors":[],"tags":["alignment","safety","fine-tuning","generalization","replication"],"links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10022","pdf":"https://arxiv.org/pdf/2604.10022","github":null,"project":null,"source_url":null}},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks whether “weird generalization” is truly a robust and broadly dangerous phenomenon: after fine-tuning on a narrow domain (e.g., insecure code, archaic bird names, former German city names), models may exhibit surprising out-of-domain traits, including broad misalignment or strong historical/ideological personas. The central questions are whether these effects replicate across models/datasets and whether simple training-time interventions can suppress them.","importance":"If weird generalization were robust, it would constitute a serious post-training attack surface: an adversary could fine-tune on seemingly narrow data and induce broad unsafe behavior. This work matters because it re-evaluates that risk via a larger replication/ablation suite. If the effect is highly brittle, the threat’s scope and prioritization should be recalibrated; if low-cost context interventions reliably mitigate it, that provides actionable defenses for training and deployment pipelines.","technical_approach":"The study follows a three-part design: (1) extended replication of prior results (Betley et al. 2025a/b) across a broader set of models to answer RQ1 (does it replicate across models?) and RQ2 (are there model patterns predicting vulnerability?); (2) principle-based dataset construction to test whether similar generalizations can be elicited using datasets built with similar design principles (not just the original datasets); (3) training-time, prompt-context interventions that add contextual information during fine-tuning—often even irrelevant to the fine-tuning task—to test whether weird generalization can be reduced or eliminated. Evaluation is done by generating answers to open-ended question sets and using an LLM judge to score/label the presence of the targeted weird traits or misalignment.","experiments":"$73","reading_guide":"$74","authors_note":"The authors’ stance is closer to “risk recalibration” than alarmism: they do not deny weird generalization/emergent misalignment can occur, but argue it is highly contingent on specific model/dataset choices and can often be neutralized by simple training-time context. The safety implication shifts from “broad and hard to prevent” to “narrowly conditioned and operationally mitigable,” while underscoring that post-training safety claims must be validated across models and training details to avoid overgeneralization."},"reading_tier":"skim","recommendation":{"zh":"这篇更像风险“降温”复现：现象脆弱且可被简单干预压住；只看复现矩阵与干预消融即可。","en":"More of a risk-downscoping replication: the effect looks brittle and cheaply mitigated; just read the replication grid and intervention ablations."}},{"id":"2604.09606","title":"Evaluating Reliability Gaps in Large Language Model Safety via Repeated Prompt Sampling","starred":false,"priority":"p2","source":"arxiv","sources":["arxiv"],"published_at":"2026-03-10T20:23:01+00:00","category_id":"mechanism","cover_url":"/covers/2604_09606.png","hf_upvotes":0,"arxiv_categories":["cs.AI","cs.SE"],"summary":{"core_problem":"论文关注传统LLM安全评测的“可靠性盲区”：像HELM、AIR-BENCH这类广度型基准通常对每个prompt只采样一次（或极少次），难以发现真实部署中“同一prompt反复调用”带来的操作性风险——例如偶发幻觉、拒答不一致、温度变化下偶尔越狱、同问不同答等。核心问题是：如何用统计上可解释的方式量化“重复采样下的失败频率”，从而评估部署级安全可靠性缺口。","importance":"在高风险场景（金融、医疗、法律、治理、Agent系统）里，系统是否“偶尔”输出不安全内容往往比平均分更关键：一次越界就可能造成严重后果。单样本评测会系统性低估尾部风险与不稳定性。本文的重要性在于把可靠性工程里的加速应力测试思想迁移到LLM评测，提供一种面向LLMOps的、可量化比较的“深度评测”框架，用失败概率而非单次得分来刻画风险。","technical_approach":"提出Accelerated Prompt Stress Testing（APST）：\n- 深度导向：对同一prompt在受控条件下重复生成（多次采样），而不是追求任务覆盖面。\n- 应力变量：系统性扫温度（temperature variation），并加入轻微prompt扰动（prompt perturbations），模拟真实使用中的重试、改写与解码参数变化。\n- 统计建模：把每次生成视为独立推理事件，不假设时间退化或状态依赖；将“是否发生安全相关失败”视为Bernoulli事件，用二项分布/频率估计得到每类prompt或风险类别的经验失败概率，从而可比较不同模型与配置的可靠性。\n- 与红队区别：红队是自适应地找最坏prompt，难以给出类别级、系统级的可解释失败频率；APST用结构化安全分类抽样prompt并重复采样，目标是统计可解释的风险估计。","experiments":"论文在实验部分展示：在重复采样与温度扫掠下，失败呈现“结构化模式”——不同prompt、不同温度下的经验失败概率差异很大；即使传统基准分数相近，APST也能揭示可靠性差距。作者强调N≤3的低采样评测会掩盖这些差异。文中列举的失败模式包括：幻觉、事实不稳定、连贯性退化、护栏不一致（先拒后答/改写后答）、安全相关泄露或危险指导、该拒不拒等。Fig.1用于对比广度评测、对抗测试与APST的定位差异（建议重点看）。","reading_guide":"【skim（泛读）】\n- 读Introduction：抓住“单次采样评测无法反映部署风险”与APST三要素（重复采样、温度/扰动、失败概率）。\n- 快速看Fig.1：理解APST与基准/红队的关系。\n- 浏览§III（方法）：只需掌握把失败当Bernoulli、用二项统计估计频率的核心设定。\n- 浏览§IV（结果）：看作者如何展示“同分不同险”（基准相近但失败率不同）的案例。\n\n【must_read（精读）】\n- 精读§III：\n  - 明确“操作条件”的定义：温度扫掠范围、扰动类型、重复次数N如何选；这些决定统计功效与成本。\n  - 关注失败事件的判定口径（哪些算failure、如何标注/判别），因为Bernoulli建模的有效性取决于标签一致性。\n  - 理解作者为何强调“独立推理事件”假设，以及在实际系统（缓存、工具调用、对话状态）下可能的偏离。\n- 精读§IV：\n  - 重点看失败概率随温度变化的曲线/表格（若有），以及prompt间方差：这是APST相对单样本评测的增益来源。\n  - 关注作者如何做模型/配置间的可比性（相同prompt集、相同应力条件）。\n- 创新点抓手：把可靠性工程的HAST思想落到LLM安全评测；用统计频率刻画“偶发但致命”的安全失败，并提出可用于LLMOps的评测流程。","authors_note":"作者强调APST不是为了“找到最坏越狱prompt”，而是为了在结构化安全分类下估计失败发生的频率，从而服务部署决策（温度设置、重试策略、监控阈值、模型选型）。核心观点是：安全不仅是能力/覆盖问题，更是随机性与尾部风险管理问题；低采样评测会系统性漏检可靠性缺口。"},"metadata":{"institutions":[],"authors":["Keita Broadwater"],"notable_authors":[],"tags":["safety-evaluation","reliability","stress-testing","prompt-sampling","refusal-consistency"],"links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09606","pdf":"https://arxiv.org/pdf/2604.09606","github":null,"project":null,"source_url":null}},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets a reliability blind spot in standard LLM safety evaluation: breadth-oriented benchmarks (e.g., HELM, AIR-BENCH) typically sample each prompt once (or very few times), missing operational risks that arise when the same prompt is used repeatedly in deployment—sporadic hallucinations, inconsistent refusals, occasional jailbreaks under different temperatures, and instability across retries. The core question is how to quantify failure frequency under repeated sampling in a statistically interpretable way.","importance":"In high-stakes deployments (finance, healthcare, law, governance, agentic systems), an occasional unsafe output can dominate real-world risk even if average benchmark scores look good. Single-sample evaluation systematically underestimates tail risk and variability. The paper’s contribution is to adapt accelerated stress testing ideas from reliability engineering to LLM safety, producing deployment-oriented, quantitatively comparable estimates of failure probability rather than one-off scores.","technical_approach":"It introduces Accelerated Prompt Stress Testing (APST):\n- Depth-oriented evaluation: repeatedly generate outputs for identical prompts under controlled conditions.\n- Stress variables: systematic temperature sweeps and small prompt perturbations to emulate real operational retries, paraphrases, and decoding changes.\n- Statistical framing: treat each generation as an independent inference event (no temporal degradation assumed); model safety-relevant failures as Bernoulli events and use binomial/empirical frequency estimates to compare reliability across models and configurations.\n- Positioning vs red-teaming: red-teaming adaptively searches for worst-case prompts but does not yield statistically interpretable category/system-level failure rates; APST samples prompts from structured safety taxonomies and estimates failure probabilities that generalize beyond individual prompts.","experiments":"The experiments show that under repeated sampling and temperature stress, failures exhibit structured patterns: empirical failure probabilities vary substantially across prompts and temperatures, even when conventional benchmark scores appear similar. The paper argues that very-low-sample evaluation (N≤3) can hide meaningful safety reliability gaps. Reported failure modes include hallucinations, factual instability, degraded coherence at stress settings, guardrail inconsistency (refuse-then-comply under rephrasing/retries), security-relevant leakage or harmful assistance, and failure-to-refuse. Fig. 1 is used to clarify APST’s niche relative to breadth benchmarks and adversarial testing.","reading_guide":"$75","authors_note":"The authors emphasize APST is not about finding the single worst jailbreak prompt; it is about estimating failure frequency over structured safety categories to support deployment decisions (temperature settings, retry policies, monitoring thresholds, model selection). The key message is that safety is not only about capability/coverage but also about stochasticity and tail-risk; low-sample evaluations systematically miss reliability gaps."},"reading_tier":"skim","recommendation":{"zh":"把安全评测从一次性打分改成失败概率估计；只看重复采样的统计口径与尾部风险对比，能直接落到LLMOps。","en":"Reframes safety eval from single-shot scores to failure-probability estimates; read the repeated-sampling statistics and tail-risk comparisons—directly actionable for LLMOps."}},{"id":"2604.10032","title":"Closed-Form Concept Erasure via Double Projections","starred":false,"priority":"p2","source":"arxiv","sources":["arxiv"],"published_at":"2026-04-11T05:06:15+00:00","category_id":"mechanism","cover_url":"/covers/2604_10032.png","hf_upvotes":0,"arxiv_categories":["cs.LG","cs.AI"],"summary":{"core_problem":"如何在不进行迭代训练/微调的前提下，从生成模型（扩散/flow-matching 等）的表示中“擦除”特定目标概念（对象/风格/身份等），同时尽可能不破坏非目标概念与整体生成质量（最小副作用的概念编辑）。","importance":"概念擦除是版权合规、去偏见、去有害内容与隐私保护的重要工具，但现有方法多依赖优化过程（反复梯度更新、层/权重编辑、剪枝等），容易引入不可控的表示漂移与“连带损伤”（把无关概念也削弱）。若能给出解析、可解释、可复现且跨模型通用的擦除方案，将显著降低部署成本并提升安全编辑的可控性。","technical_approach":"提出 Double Projections (DP) 的线性变换框架：把概念擦除重写为对某一表示空间施加线性变换的几何问题，并分解为两个连续的闭式（closed-form）投影步骤，无需训练。\n1) Proxy Projection：先为“目标概念”构造一个代理投影/方向估计，并将其与已知的非目标方向对齐，从而提取目标概念中与保留语义相容的“安全分量”（直观上是在概念子空间里分离出会与保留集合发生冲突的部分）。\n2) Constrained Transformation：再在“被保留表示的左零空间（left nullspace）”内求一个受约束的线性变换，使得对保留集合的作用最小（尽量保持不变），同时把目标概念的相关分量投影/消去。两步均给出解析解，因此是确定性的 one-shot 编辑。\n方法论要点：用投影几何显式刻画“擦除-保留”的相互作用；通过把可改动自由度限制在不影响保留表示的子空间中，实现最小干扰；整体为训练无关、秒级执行的模型适配。","experiments":"在多种概念擦除设置（对象擦除、风格擦除等）与多种生成骨干上评估：Stable Diffusion 的多个变体，以及近期 flow-matching 模型 FLUX。结论是：DP 的目标概念抑制效果与现有 SOTA 相当或更好；更关键的是在定性与定量指标上对非目标概念的保持更优，生成质量与多样性下降更小，体现出更强的“保留性/低副作用”。","reading_guide":"must_read（精读）：\n- 重点章节：Problem Formulation & Geometric Insights（概念擦除的形式化目标：擦除 vs 保留；support 约束/分布视角；为何可转为线性变换与投影几何）；方法章节中两次投影的推导（Proxy Projection 如何估计目标方向；Constrained Transformation 如何在 left nullspace 中构造闭式解与约束）。\n- 重点图表/内容：展示几何直观的示意图（目标子空间、保留子空间、零空间/投影后的关系）；与迭代方法对比的定性样例（看“擦除干净但不伤及无关概念”的案例）；定量表格中同时关注 erasure 指标与 preservation/quality 指标（不要只看擦除率）。\n- 创新点核对：①训练无关的闭式解；②双投影把“擦除”与“最小干扰保留”解耦；③在多架构（扩散+flow-matching）一致有效。\n\nskim（泛读）：\n- 先读 Introduction（动机：现有方法副作用；DP 的四点优势）+ 方法概览段（两步投影的直觉）+ 实验结论段（跨 SD/FLUX 的总体结论）。\n- 快速抓重点：只要理解“先估计目标概念方向，再在不影响保留表示的自由度里把它消掉”这一核心几何思路，并浏览对比图/表确认其在保留性上的优势即可。","authors_note":"作者强调把概念擦除从“经验性优化编辑”提升为“可解释的几何闭式解”：确定性、无需训练、秒级执行，并通过在保留表示的左零空间内施加约束来显式控制副作用；同时主张该框架具备跨模型通用性（扩散与 flow-matching）。"},"metadata":{"institutions":[],"authors":["Chi Zhang","Jingpu Cheng","Zhixian Wang","Ping Liu"],"notable_authors":[],"tags":["concept-erasure","model-editing","safety","closed-form","linear-algebra"],"links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10032","pdf":"https://arxiv.org/pdf/2604.10032","github":null,"project":null,"source_url":null}},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"How to erase a specific target concept (object/style/identity) from a generative model’s internal representations without iterative training/fine-tuning, while preserving non-target concepts and overall generation quality (i.e., minimizing collateral damage).","importance":"Concept erasure is central to safety, copyright compliance, debiasing, and privacy. Many existing methods rely on iterative optimization (fine-tuning, attention/weight edits, pruning), which can cause uncontrolled representation drift and degrade unrelated concepts. A closed-form, interpretable, and cross-backbone approach would reduce deployment cost and improve controllability of safety edits.","technical_approach":"The paper proposes Double Projections (DP), a linear-transformation framework that performs concept erasure analytically (no training) via two sequential closed-form projections.\n1) Proxy Projection: estimate a proxy direction/subspace for the target concept and align it with known non-target directions to isolate a “safe component” of the target concept, separating parts that would conflict with preserved semantics.\n2) Constrained Transformation: compute a constrained linear transform within the left nullspace of the preserved representations, so the transform minimally affects what must be preserved while projecting out (erasing) the target component. Both steps admit closed-form solutions, yielding a deterministic one-shot edit.\nKey idea: explicitly model the erasure–preservation trade-off geometrically; restrict degrees of freedom to subspaces that do not change preserved representations, achieving minimal interference.","experiments":"Evaluated on multiple concept-erasure settings (object and style erasure) across several Stable Diffusion variants and the flow-matching model FLUX. DP matches or exceeds prior state-of-the-art in suppressing the target concept, and more importantly shows consistently better preservation of non-target concepts with higher visual quality and diversity (less unintended distortion).","reading_guide":"$76","authors_note":"The authors’ main message is to elevate concept erasure from iterative, heuristic editing to an interpretable geometric procedure with deterministic closed-form steps: no training, seconds to run, explicit control of side effects via constraints in the left nullspace of preserved representations, and robustness across model families (diffusion and flow-matching)."},"reading_tier":"skim","recommendation":{"zh":"解析式双投影很干净，适合作为“无训练概念擦除”基线；但要重点核查副作用评测是否覆盖相近概念与分布外提示。","en":"The closed-form double-projection is a clean no-training erasure baseline; scrutinize side-effect evals—nearby concepts and OOD prompts are where it can quietly fail."}},{"id":"2604.10495","title":"Why Don't You Know? Evaluating the Impact of Uncertainty Sources on Uncertainty Quantification in LLMs","starred":false,"priority":"p2","source":"arxiv","sources":["arxiv"],"published_at":"2026-04-12T07:01:53+00:00","category_id":"mechanism","cover_url":"/covers/2604_10495.png","hf_upvotes":0,"arxiv_categories":["cs.CL"],"summary":{"core_problem":"现有 LLM 不确定性量化（UQ）方法通常输出单一置信度分数，但自然语言任务的不确定性来源多样（知识缺口、输出多解/可变性、输入歧义等）。核心问题是：不同不确定性来源会如何影响各类 UQ 方法的行为与有效性？现有评测缺乏对来源的可控隔离，导致比较不公平。","importance":"在医疗、法律、教育等高风险场景，系统需要根据“不确定性来源”采取不同动作：知识不足→检索/拒答；多解可变→给多个答案或解释多样性；输入歧义→追问澄清。若 UQ 分数无法区分来源，可能触发错误策略（例如把“多解”当成“不会”而拒答），直接影响安全性与用户体验。因此需要来源可控的数据与系统性评测来揭示方法盲点。","technical_approach":"论文的关键技术贡献是构建一个“按不确定性来源成组控制”的评测数据集，并在该数据集上系统评估多类 UQ 方法。\n- 不确定性来源最小集合：\n(1) 知识不确定性（问题明确且单一正确，但模型可能不知道）；\n(2) 输出可变性/多正确答案（问题明确但存在多个语义上不同的正确回答，概率质量分散导致采样输出不一致）；\n(3) 输入歧义（问题欠指明，需澄清才能确定所问）。\n- 数据集设计：以 triplets 组织问题，每个三元组在长度、格式、领域等方面尽量可比，仅改变不确定性来源，从而控制混杂因素，实现对 UQ 方法的公平对比；并进行人工验证。\n- 评测范围：覆盖多种 UQ 家族（如基于 token 概率、基于一致性/自一致、verbalized 等）与多个模型，分析不同来源下的系统性失效模式与家族弱点。","experiments":"在三类不确定性场景下，对多种 UQ 方法与三种模型进行对比评测，并做失败案例分析。论文强调的经验现象包括：一致性类方法可能把“多正确答案导致的输出不一致”误判为高不确定（尽管模型其实可以自信给出任一正确答案）；输入歧义会让“是否知道答案”的判定变得更困难，且更应触发澄清而非简单拒答；不同方法家族对不同来源呈现特定脆弱性。数据集与分析用于揭示这些差异并指导方法选择/系统策略。","reading_guide":"must_read（精读）：\n- 重点章节：Introduction（为何“来源”重要以及对应的系统动作；Figure 1 的决策映射）；Dataset Creation（triplet 设计如何隔离混杂因素；三类来源的操作化定义与构造流程；人工验证标准）；实验与失败案例分析（按来源分桶的对比结果，逐类总结哪些方法在何种来源下失效以及原因）。\n- 重点图表/内容：Figure 1（不确定性来源→系统响应）；数据集统计与示例 triplets（理解“只变来源不变其他”的控制思想）；按来源拆分的性能表/校准曲线/相关性分析（如果文中提供）。\n- 创新点核对：①来源可控的 triplet 数据集；②跨方法家族、跨模型的系统评测；③面向部署决策的失败模式归因。\n\nskim（泛读）：\n- 先读 Introduction + 贡献点列表（理解三类来源与动机）+ Dataset Creation 的三类定义段落（知道每类在问答里长什么样）+ 实验结论/讨论（抓住“哪些 UQ 方法在多解/歧义下会误报”的主结论）。","authors_note":"作者主张 UQ 不应只追求单一“正确性置信度”，而应关注不确定性来源，因为来源决定系统应对策略；并通过 triplet 控制数据集证明：很多现有 UQ 信号在不同来源下含义会发生偏移，导致方法比较与部署决策都可能被误导。"},"metadata":{"institutions":[],"authors":["Maiya Goloburda","Roman Vashurin","Fedor Chernogorsky","Nurkhan Laiyk","Daniil Orel","Preslav Nakov","Maxim Panov"],"notable_authors":[],"tags":["uncertainty-quantification","evaluation","reliability","dataset"],"links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10495","pdf":"https://arxiv.org/pdf/2604.10495","github":null,"project":null,"source_url":null}},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Most LLM uncertainty quantification (UQ) methods output a single confidence score, but uncertainty in language tasks comes from distinct sources (knowledge gaps, output variability with multiple valid answers, and input ambiguity). The paper asks: how do these sources affect the behavior and effectiveness of existing UQ methods, and how can we evaluate this fairly under controlled conditions?","importance":"In high-stakes deployments, the right system action depends on the uncertainty source: lack of knowledge → retrieve/abstain; multiple valid answers → present alternatives; ambiguous input → ask for clarification. If a UQ score conflates sources, systems may take harmful actions (e.g., abstain when the question simply has many correct answers). A source-controlled benchmark is necessary to diagnose method weaknesses and guide safe decision policies.","technical_approach":"The main technical contribution is a controlled evaluation dataset and protocol that isolates uncertainty sources.\n- Minimal, operational source set:\n(1) knowledge uncertainty (well-specified, single correct answer, model may not know);\n(2) output variability / multiple correct answers (well-specified but many semantically distinct valid answers; probability mass spreads, sampled outputs disagree);\n(3) input ambiguity (underspecified question requiring clarification).\n- Dataset design: questions are organized into triplets; within each triplet, questions are made comparable in length/format/domain while differing primarily in uncertainty source, reducing confounds and enabling fair method comparison; human validation is performed.\n- Evaluation: benchmark a broad set of UQ method families (token-probability-based, consistency-based, verbalized, etc.) across multiple models, and analyze source-specific failure modes.","experiments":"The paper evaluates many UQ methods on the triplet dataset across three models, reporting performance by uncertainty source and providing failure-case analyses. Highlighted findings include: consistency-based methods can over-report uncertainty for the “multiple valid answers” scenario (treating semantic disagreement as ignorance); ambiguity makes it hard to interpret confidence as knowledge and should trigger clarification rather than abstention; different UQ families exhibit characteristic vulnerabilities depending on the source.","reading_guide":"must_read (deep read):\n- Key sections: Introduction (why sources matter; the source→system-action mapping, esp. Figure 1); Dataset Creation (how triplets control confounds; operational definitions and construction; human validation); Experiments + failure analysis (results stratified by source; method-family weaknesses and causal explanations).\n- Key figures/tables: Figure 1 (uncertainty source to downstream action); dataset examples/statistics showing triplet control; per-source performance/calibration plots if provided.\n- Innovation checklist: (i) source-controlled triplet dataset; (ii) systematic cross-family, cross-model UQ evaluation; (iii) deployment-oriented failure attribution.\n\nskim (quick read):\n- Read Introduction + contributions, the three source definitions in Dataset Creation, and the main results/discussion to capture the headline: many UQ signals change meaning across sources, especially for multi-answer and ambiguous inputs.","authors_note":"The authors argue UQ should be source-aware because the source determines the appropriate system response. Their controlled triplet benchmark shows that many existing UQ methods conflate sources, making both method comparisons and deployment decisions potentially misleading."},"reading_tier":"skim","recommendation":{"zh":"把UQ拆成可控来源后才看得出方法在“多解/歧义”上乱报置信度；只读实验设计与分解结果表即可校准你对UQ分数的信任边界。","en":"Worth skimming for the controlled source-factorization: it exposes when UQ scores conflate ambiguity/variability with ignorance; read the setup + main decomposition table to recalibrate how much you trust a single confidence number."}},{"id":"2604.10697","title":"Attention Sinks as Internal Signals for Hallucination Detection in Large Language Models","starred":false,"priority":"p2","source":"arxiv","sources":["arxiv"],"published_at":"2026-04-12T15:46:22+00:00","category_id":"mechanism","cover_url":"/covers/2604_10697.png","hf_upvotes":0,"arxiv_categories":["cs.CL","cs.LG"],"summary":{"core_problem":"LLM 幻觉检测中，已有大量基于注意力图/内部表征的特征工程方法，但“为什么这些特征有效”缺乏机制层解释；同时很多方法依赖外部检索、多次采样或额外模型，成本高且可解释性弱。本文要回答：能否仅用注意力权重，找到一个机制上可解释、跨模型稳健的内部信号来检测幻觉？","importance":"幻觉是开放式生成系统的核心安全风险。若能用低成本、与模型解码过程紧耦合的内部信号进行在线检测，可用于：生成时风险预警/拒答、后处理过滤、以及为“幻觉从何而来”的机制研究提供可操作的诊断量。本文的价值在于把检测信号锚定到 Transformer 信息流的“压缩/路由”现象（attention sinks），并尝试统一一批注意力谱/图方法的共同本质。","technical_approach":"方法名 SinkProbe。核心假设：幻觉与 attention sinks 深度纠缠——生成从“分布式、输入可追溯的注意力”转向“高度压缩、由先验主导的计算”时，会出现少数 token 吸走大量注意力质量（sink），从而导致信息流断裂/退化。\n\n(1) Sink score 定义：对每层 l、每头 h 的注意力矩阵 A^(l,h)（严格因果、行随机），对每个 token i 计算其从后续 token 接收的平均注意力（对 u>i 的 A_{u,i} 做归一化平均），得到 S∈R^{L×H×T}。高 sink score 表示该 token 在后续生成中持续吸引注意力。\n\n(2) 特征构造：sink 分布高度偏斜，因此不依赖 token 身份/位置，而用序统计量 summarization：对每个 (l,h) 的 sink scores 排序，取 top-k 值拼接/聚合成紧凑特征向量 f（论文在方法段落强调“token-agnostic、compact”）。随后训练一个轻量分类器（probe）做幻觉/非幻觉判别。\n\n(3) 关键机制补充：并非“高注意力=有效信号”。注意力输出还取决于 value 向量。作者发现检测信号集中在“计算活跃 sinks”：既有高注意力集中，又伴随异常大的 value norm（||V||）的 token；这类 token 会在 attention output 中占主导，诱发更强的表示压缩与先验主导，从而更相关于幻觉。\n\n(4) 统一视角：作者声称若干已有注意力谱/图类检测器可被解释为对 sink 行为的变换（例如把注意力看作图的转移矩阵/谱性质，最终都在捕捉质量向少数节点聚集的现象），从而给出“为什么这些方法有效”的共同机制解释。","experiments":"论文摘要与引言给出的结论是：sink-score 特征在多个模型与多个基准上稳定优于 SOTA 幻觉检测器；并且分类器在仅由注意力图计算的特征中，会“偏好”依赖 sinks（而非任意注意力统计）。此外还做了关于 value norm 的分析，表明最强信号来自计算活跃 sinks（高 sink + 大 ||V||）。具体基准/模型/指标细节在你提供的全文片段中未展开，但论文主张跨模型与跨数据集一致提升，并提供 Figure 1 作为方法总览。","reading_guide":"must_read（精读）：\n- Introduction：重点读“幻觉=信息流从 grounded→prior-dominated 的转变”这一机制叙事，以及“统一既有 attention-based detectors”的主张。\n- Method：逐式推导 sink score（按层/头/token），以及 top-k 序统计量特征的设计动机（偏斜分布→用 order statistics）。\n- 机制分析部分（关于 value norms / computationally active sinks）：这是本文相对以往“只看注意力”工作的关键增量，建议精读对应消融/相关性分析。\n- Figure 1：把整条 pipeline（attention→sink tensor→top-k→probe）与特征维度/聚合方式对齐理解。\n- 与既有方法的关系（谱/图解释）：建议对照阅读作者如何把不同方法归约到“质量聚集/压缩”的共同量。\n\nskim（泛读）：\n- 先看 Abstract + Introduction 末尾 contributions 列表，抓住 4 点贡献。\n- 快速浏览 Method 中 sink score 定义与 top-k 特征，理解输入输出与计算成本。\n- 直接跳到实验主表与跨模型/跨基准结果（以及与 SOTA 对比），再回看 value norm 的关键图/表确认机制结论是否被数据支持。","authors_note":"作者想传达的核心信息是：幻觉检测不必依赖外部检索或多次采样；仅用注意力图就能得到强信号，但要抓住“注意力质量向少数 token 压缩（sinks）”这一机制，并进一步区分“计算活跃 sinks”（高注意力且 value 向量强）才是与幻觉最相关的内部触发点。"},"metadata":{"institutions":[],"authors":["Jakub Binkowski","Kamil Adamczewski","Tomasz Kajdanowicz"],"notable_authors":[],"tags":["hallucination-detection","attention-sinks","interpretability","attention-analysis","value-norm"],"links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10697","pdf":"https://arxiv.org/pdf/2604.10697","github":null,"project":null,"source_url":null}},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Many hallucination detectors engineer features from attention maps or internal states, but the underlying mechanism—why those features correlate with hallucinations—remains unclear. Output-level methods (retrieval, fact-checking, multi-sampling) add cost and provide limited insight. The paper asks: can we detect hallucinations using only attention weights with a mechanistically grounded, interpretable, and robust internal signal?","importance":"Hallucinations are a major reliability and safety bottleneck for open-ended LLM deployment. A low-overhead, decoding-time internal detector can enable online risk flagging/refusal and post-generation filtering, while also serving as a diagnostic tool for understanding failure modes. The paper’s key contribution is tying detection to a concrete information-flow phenomenon in Transformers—attention sinks—and offering a unifying lens for prior attention/spectral/graph-based detectors.","technical_approach":"$77","experiments":"From the abstract/introduction: sink-score-based features consistently outperform prior state-of-the-art hallucination detectors across multiple LLMs and benchmarks, and the learned classifier preferentially relies on sink-related features. Specific benchmark/model/metric details are not included in the provided excerpt, but Figure 1 summarizes the overall pipeline.","reading_guide":"$78","authors_note":"The intended takeaway: hallucination detection can be done cheaply from attention maps alone if you target the right internal phenomenon—attention sinks as signatures of information-flow compression—and the most predictive read the mechanism section and the cross-model robustness figure."}},{"id":"2604.10990","title":"When Verification Fails: How Compositionally Infeasible Claims Escape Rejection","starred":false,"priority":"p2","source":"arxiv","sources":["arxiv"],"published_at":"2026-04-13T04:48:20+00:00","category_id":"mechanism","cover_url":"/covers/2604_10990.png","hf_upvotes":0,"arxiv_categories":["cs.CL","cs.AI"],"summary":{"core_problem":"科学主张验证（claim verification）需要遵循闭世界假设（CWA）：只有当主张所断言的每个约束都被证据正向支持时才接受，否则应拒绝。本文指出：现有验证基准的负例构造方式（只扰动一个显著约束）使得“完整 CWA 检查所有约束”和一种更弱的捷径“显著约束检查（salient-constraint checking）”在行为上不可区分，导致我们误以为模型具备严格验证能力。核心问题是：模型到底在做全约束验证，还是只检查最显眼的那一条？","importance":"在科学/医疗/临床试验、表格与图表等高风险场景，验证系统若采用捷径，会系统性放过“组合上不可行”的错误主张（看似每个局部都对，但组合关系不成立），从而造成严重误导。本文的重要性在于揭示了基准设计的结构性盲点，并提供能区分两种验证标准的对抗性评测设置，为后续训练与评测提供更可靠的靶标。","technical_approach":"本文提出一个理论框架与一个新的负例构造设置来“拆穿”捷径。\n\n(1) 形式化：给定证据集合 E={e1..em} 与 claim c，其断言约束集合 C(c)={c1..cn}。在 CWA 下，接受当且仅当所有约束都被证据正向支持；任何约束缺乏支持都应拒绝。\n\n(2) 捷径定义：显著约束检查只挑选 claim 中最显著/最易检索的一条约束进行核验：若该约束被支持则倾向接受，否则拒绝。由于现有基准的负例通常只破坏这一条显著约束，捷径在负例上也能高分，从而与完整 CWA“看起来一样”。\n\n(3) 组合不可行（compositionally infeasible）负例：构造一种对抗负例，使“显著约束”在证据中看似成立，但在非显著约束处引入违背，且该违背需要跨多个证据单元组合推理才能发现（例如两句临床文本的组合关系、图表中两段趋势的组合、表格中两列/多列的组合约束）。\n\n(4) 构造算法：graph-based corrupt-and-propagate。直观上先保留显著观察（让最显眼的那条仍可被证据支持），再通过在证据图结构上“腐化并传播”引入组合层面的矛盾，使得只有执行全约束检查（含组合约束）才能拒绝。\n\n(5) 诊断与干预：作者还测试了 test-time guidance（闭世界指令、显式分解等）。结果显示这些干预更多是在 ROC 上移动阈值/权衡（改变接受-拒绝倾向），而非真正解决组合负例上的推理瓶颈。并引入 rubric-based LLM judge 对推理轨迹打分，评估是否逐条检查约束或在显著约束处提前终止，从“过程”层面验证失败机制。","experiments":"评测覆盖三类既有基准：NLI4CT（临床试验文本）、SCITAB（科学表格）、SciVer（图表）。关键现象：模型在“标准负例（单显著扰动）”上拒绝率/准确率高，但在“组合不可行负例（对抗负例）”上会显著更容易接受（over-acceptance），且该差距跨模型家族与规模都存在。作者还报告：闭世界指令与显式分解等测试时引导并未整体提升对抗负例表现，而是改变了接受/拒绝的 tradeoff；rubric judge 的轨迹评分进一步显示模型经常在检查显著约束后提前停止，符合“显著约束检查”而非完整 CWA。","reading_guide":"must_read（精读）：\n- Introduction：重点读 Figure 1 的对比（现有负例 vs 组合不可行负例）以及“为何现有基准无法区分 CWA 与捷径”的论证链。\n- Theoretical Framework：精读 CWA 的形式化、约束集合 C(c) 的定义、以及 salient-constraint checking 的程序化刻画；这是全文的概念地基。\n- 数据构造方法（graph-based corrupt-and-propagate）：这是论文最关键的技术贡献之一，建议对照案例理解“保留显著约束、在非显著组合处造假”的具体操作。\n- 实验主结果（Figure 2 等）：关注三基准上标准负例 vs 对抗负例的接受率差距，以及跨模型/规模一致性。\n- 干预实验 + rubric-based judge：这是作者证明“推理瓶颈而非策略选择”的证据链，建议精读评分维度与典型失败轨迹。\n\nskim（泛读）：\n- 读 Abstract + Introduction 前两页，抓住：基准盲点→捷径→组合不可行负例。\n- 快速浏览构造方法的高层描述与 1-2 个示例即可。\n- 直接看主结果图表（标准负例 vs 对抗负例差距）与结论段，理解论文主张与影响。","authors_note":"作者的核心立场是：当前科学验证评测“看起来很强”的负例准确率，可能只是模型在做显著约束检查这一捷径；只有引入组合不可行负例，才能真正测试闭世界式的全约束验证能力。并且简单的提示词/分解并不能根治该问题，说明瓶颈更像是组合约束的系统性推理缺陷。"},"metadata":{"institutions":[],"authors":["Muxin Liu","Delip Rao","Grace Kim","Chris Callison-Burch"],"notable_authors":[],"tags":["claim-verification","evaluation","shortcut-learning","compositionality","reliability"],"links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10990","pdf":"https://arxiv.org/pdf/2604.10990","github":null,"project":null,"source_url":null}},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Scientific claim verification should follow the Closed-World Assumption (CWA): accept a claim iff every constraint it asserts is positively supported by the evidence; otherwise reject. The paper argues existing benchmarks build negative examples by perturbing a single salient element, making full CWA indistinguishable from an easier shortcut—salient-constraint checking—that verifies only the most salient constraint. The key question: are models truly enforcing CWA, or just checking the most prominent constraint?","importance":"In high-stakes domains (clinical trials, scientific tables, charts), shortcut verification can systematically let through claims that are locally plausible but globally impossible when constraints are composed across evidence units. The paper exposes a structural benchmark blind spot and introduces an evaluation setting that can separate genuine exhaustive verification from shortcut behavior, improving the reliability of both evaluation and future training targets.","technical_approach":"$79","experiments":"Evaluations span three established benchmarks: NLI4CT (clinical trial text), SCITAB (scientific tables), and SciVer (charts). Main finding: models achieve high accuracy on standard negatives but accept compositionally infeasible adversarial negatives at much higher rates (systematic over-acceptance), and this gap persists across model families and scales. Test-time CWA guidance does not materially improve adversarial-negative performance overall, instead trading off acceptance vs rejection. Rubric-based trace scoring shows models often terminate after verifying the salient constraint, consistent with salient-constraint checking rather than full CWA.","reading_guide":"$7a","authors_note":"The paper’s message: strong performance on existing verification benchmarks may reflect a shortcut (salient-constraint checking) rather than true closed-world, all-constraints verification. Compositionally infeasible adversarial negatives are necessary to test CWA compliance, and prompt-based guidance alone does not fix the underlying compositional reasoning bottleneck."},"reading_tier":"skim","recommendation":{"zh":"它戳破“验证模型会做CWA全约束检查”的默认想象：很多只是在查最显眼约束；只看对抗负例构造与错误类型统计就能改评测prior。","en":"It breaks the comforting prior that claim verifiers do full CWA-style + response-level）的信息论探针框架，并解决了Transformer隐式表示下经典熵不可估的问题。\n1）统一的形式化：把UMM视为学习视觉-语言的隐式联合分布；“统一”应体现为跨模态编码的一致性与生成逻辑的一致性。\n2）Prompt Level（编码一致性）：对文本/图像输入在embedding与各层hidden states上计算“熵轨迹”，比较两种模态的信息保留/压缩过程是否对称、是否出现不同层的瓶颈（例如视觉流更早进入表示瓶颈）。\n3）Response Level（生成一致性）：估计“给定prompt后的response不确定性”——用prompt与response在各层表示的条件熵随层数的演化来刻画prompt–response依赖是否一致。直观上：忠实映射应低条件熵，随机/脱钩映射应高条件熵。\n4）关键技术：在UMM中无法做密度估计（无显式分布、高维、变长序列）。作者用RKHS中的核方法重写信息量：把token/patch序列视为经验样本，用高斯核构造Gram矩阵，采用matrix-based Rényi entropy度量表示的“几何不确定性/各向同性/分散度”；再用“联合熵−边缘熵”的方式给出无需密度估计的条件熵代理（proxy），并论证其行为与经典条件熵一致（忠实映射更低、随机映射更高）。\n5）核心结论（伪统一的双重分歧）：(i) 编码端模态不对称：视觉与语言的熵轨迹显著不同，更多由架构先验而非语义决定；(ii) 生成端模式分裂：文本生成呈高熵的“创造性/上下文预测”模式，而图像生成仍是低熵的“prompt忠实/保真”模式。只有当模型在编码与生成逻辑上都对齐（例如更一致的上下文预测范式）时，才更接近真实统一。","experiments":"作者将框架应用于10个代表性UMM，做跨模型、跨层的系统探针分析：\n- 通过prompt熵与层级熵轨迹对比，展示语言/视觉在不同模型中出现不同的压缩节奏与瓶颈位置，从而揭示“共享空间≠共享信息流”。\n- 通过prompt–response条件熵代理的层级演化，区分文本端的高熵生成与图像端的低熵生成，并把这种差异与“推理式图像生成失败”联系起来。\n- 复现并解释现象：部分小模型在推理式图像生成上更好，可能源于其信息流更一致/更少模式分裂（论文在引言中强调该反直觉观察，探针用于给出内部解释）。\n（注：你提供的全文片段在实验细节、模型清单与具体数值/图表编号处截断；以上为基于论文主线与方法-结论链条的实验总结。）","reading_guide":"must_read（精读建议：详细技术分析 + 重点章节/图表/创新点）\n- 先读Introduction + Fig.1：明确“伪统一”的定义、失败案例与“小模型更好”的动机。\n- 精读方法章“An Entropy-Probing Formulation…”：\n  1）3.1/3.2（若按常见结构）：统一=隐式联合分布；为何prompt熵与条件熵能刻画编码/生成一致性。\n  2）3.3：经典熵估计为何在Transformer不可行（无密度、变长、高维）。\n  3）3.4（关键创新）：matrix-based Rényi entropy + RKHS核化重写；重点理解Gram矩阵构造、Rényi熵计算、以及条件熵proxy=H(X,Y)−H(X)的可操作性与直觉。\n- 精读实验与可视化图：重点看“跨层熵轨迹（语言vs视觉）”与“跨层条件熵演化（文本生成vs图像生成）”两类图，它们直接支撑“双重分歧”结论；同时关注不同架构/训练范式下曲线形态差异，用来理解“架构先验驱动的模态不对称”。\n- 复盘贡献点：两级探针框架（诊断维度设计）+ RKHS/矩阵Rényi熵（可计算性突破）+ 10模型系统性证据（现象归因）。\n\nskim（泛读建议：方法概述 + 推荐看哪些部分）\n- 读Introduction（问题与现象）+ 方法概览段（两级探针 + RKHS熵proxy的直觉）+ 结论段（双重分歧）。\n- 快速扫实验主图：只抓两件事——(1) 语言/视觉熵轨迹是否对称；(2) 文本/图像生成的条件熵是否呈现“高熵vs低熵”的模式分裂。\n- 若时间有限，可跳过推导细节，仅保留对“核化Rényi熵=几何结构不确定性”的直觉理解。","authors_note":"作者的核心立场是：UMM的“统一”不应只看共享参数或共享表示空间，而应看跨模态的信息流是否一致。伪统一来自两端同时失配：输入编码的模态不对称 + 输出生成的模式分裂。论文的技术关键在于把信息论量（熵/条件熵）改写为RKHS中的可计算几何量，从而在不做密度估计的前提下，对Transformer隐式表示进行跨层、跨模态、可比较的诊断。"},"metadata":{"institutions":[],"authors":["Songlin Yang","Xianghao Kong","Anyi Rao"],"notable_authors":[],"tags":["multimodal-unification","information-theory","entropy-probing","model-analysis","reasoning-vs-generation"],"links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10949","pdf":"https://arxiv.org/pdf/2604.10949","github":null,"project":null,"source_url":null}},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper investigates “pseudo-unification” in unified multimodal models (UMMs): despite sharing parameters/representation space across language and vision, LLM-like reasoning and creative generation do not transfer to image synthesis. As a result, the same UMM exhibits divergent internal encoding and generation behaviors across modalities. The goal is to diagnose the internal causes of this divergence and provide a principled, model-internal way to probe whether a model is truly unified.","importance":"UMMs are expensive to train and rapidly evolving, yet “unification” is often judged only by downstream benchmarks or anecdotal cases, which cannot explain why some models unify better than others. Without internal diagnostics, we risk building models that look unified architecturally but have inconsistent information flow, leading to poor cross-modal reasoning transfer and even counterintuitive outcomes (e.g., smaller models sometimes reasoning better in image generation). This work operationalizes unification as measurable information-flow consistency, offering actionable signals for architecture, connector, and training-objective design.","technical_approach":"$7b","experiments":"The framework is applied to 10 representative UMMs with systematic, layer-wise probing:\n- Prompt entropy and layer-wise entropy trajectories expose asymmetric compression/bottlenecks between vision and language streams, showing that “shared space” does not imply “shared information flow.”\n- Prompt–response conditional-entropy proxies across layers reveal a split between high-entropy text generation and low-entropy image generation, linking it to failures in reasoning-based image synthesis.\n- The analysis is used to contextualize the observed phenomenon that some smaller models can outperform larger ones on reasoning-driven image generation, plausibly due to more consistent information flow / less pattern splitting.\n(Note: the provided full-text excerpt is truncated before detailed experimental setups, model lists, and numeric results; the above summarizes the experiment logic and reported conclusions.)","reading_guide":"$7c","authors_note":"The paper’s stance is that unification should be judged by consistency of internal information flow, not merely by shared parameters or a shared embedding space. Pseudo-unification arises from a dual mismatch: modality-asymmetric encoding plus pattern-split generation. The technical centerpiece is an RKHS-based, matrix Rényi entropy reformulation that makes entropy/conditional-entropy probing computable for Transformer implicit, variable-length representations."},"reading_tier":"skim","recommendation":{"zh":"把“统一多模态”从口号落到可测的内部信息模式差异，能当诊断工具但未必给出直接修法；看entropy probing指标与对比图即可。","en":"Turns “unified multimodal” from marketing into measurable internal information-pattern divergence; more diagnostic than prescriptive—skim the entropy-probing metric and the key comparison plots."}},{"id":"2604.11589","title":"MLLM-as-a-Judge Exhibits Model Preference Bias","starred":false,"priority":"p2","source":"arxiv","sources":["arxiv"],"published_at":"2026-04-13T15:04:40+00:00","category_id":"mechanism","cover_url":"/covers/2604_11589.png","hf_upvotes":0,"arxiv_categories":["cs.CV"],"summary":{"core_problem":"论文研究“MLLM-as-a-Judge（用多模态大模型做自动评测）”是否存在模型偏好偏差（model-specific preference bias）：评测模型（Evaluator）会系统性偏爱某些生成模型（Generator）的文本，尤其是偏爱自己的输出（self-preference），从而扭曲不同模型的对比与基准驱动的研究结论。关键问题是：如何在不把“真实质量差异”混进来的情况下，定量分离并测量这种偏好。","importance":"随着MLLM评测越来越依赖“模型当裁判”，一旦裁判对特定模型有系统性偏好，就会导致排行榜失真、训练方向被误导、以及跨机构/跨模型的科学比较不可复现。更严重的是，自偏好会让“用同一个模型评测自己”天然占优，破坏评测公正性。本文提供了可操作的偏差量化框架与缓解策略（简单集成），对构建可信评测流水线与基准具有直接价值。","technical_approach":"作者提出Philautia-Eval，用统计方式把“偏好倾向”与“生成质量差异”解耦，专门量化Evaluator对Generator的系统性打分偏移。\n- 任务设定：图像描述（image captioning），同时考虑reference-based与reference-free评测；并假设评测模型可提供token-level概率（因为基于概率的指标如FLEUR、G-VEval更贴近人评）。\n- 核心思想：收集大量（Evaluator, Generator, image）三元组下的caption与score，分析在控制质量差异后，Evaluator对不同Generator的打分分布是否存在稳定偏移，从而定义/估计“自偏好”与“跨模型偏好”。\n- 流程（按文中三阶段）：(1) 多个Generator对同一批图像生成caption；(2) 多个Evaluator对这些caption打分；(3) 用Philautia-Eval的统计分解来估计偏好强度（将“偏好项”从“质量项”中分离）。\n- 缓解：提出Pomms——对多个Evaluator做简单集成，以降低单一裁判的模型特定偏好，同时尽量保持与人类判断的一致性。","experiments":"作者在图像描述场景收集了来自12个MLLM的1.29M caption–score对，系统回答三类问题：\n- RQ1 自偏好：代表性MLLM在reference-based与reference-free设置下普遍存在自偏好（给自己生成的caption更高分）。\n- RQ2 跨模型偏好：不仅偏爱自己，还会对特定外部模型互相偏爱/互相贬低；作者观察到“同家族模型间的互偏好”，推测与复用连接器、重叠指令微调资源有关。\n- RQ3 缓解：Pomms集成评测能有效减轻模型特定偏好影响，同时维持与人评对齐。\n（注：你提供的全文片段在方法的具体统计建模形式、指标定义与完整实验表格处截断；以上为基于引言+方法概述段落可确定的实验结论与设置。）","reading_guide":"must_read（精读建议：详细技术分析 + 重点章节/图表/创新点）\n- 3）Algorithm 1与Fig.3的流水线细节（生成、打分、估计）。\n- 精读实验主结果图/表：\n  1）Evaluator×Generator的偏好矩阵（自偏好与互偏好一眼可见）；\n  2）家族内互偏好的证据与消融/讨论；\n  3）Pomms集成前后：偏差指标下降、人评相关性保持。\n- 关注可复用资产：1.29M pairs的数据构建方式、提示词设置、以及对“需要token-level概率”的讨论（影响方法可迁移性）。\n\nskim（泛读建议：方法概述 + 推荐看哪些部分）\n- 读Introduction + Problem Setting：快速理解偏差定义（self vs cross-model）与研究问题。\n- 读Methodology开头 +
