artifacts rather than true representational divergence."},"reading_tier":"skim","recommendation":{"zh":"跨架构对齐里方法学混杂太多，这篇的价值在于教你怎么排雷；只看 confound 控制与对比协议，别纠结情绪向量本身多“真”。","en":"Worth it mainly as a confound checklist for cross-model geometry claims—read the controls/protocols, not the “emotion directions are real” storyline."}},{"id":"2604.11802","title":"Psychological Concept Neurons: Can Neural Control Bias Probing and Shift Generation in LLMs?","starred":false,"priority":"p3","source":"arxiv","sources":["arxiv"],"published_at":"2026-04-13T17:58:49+00:00","category_id":"mechanism","cover_url":"/covers/2604_11802.png","hf_upvotes":0,"arxiv_categories":["cs.CL"],"summary":{"core_problem":"论文研究“大五人格（Big Five）”这类心理学概念在LLM内部如何表征、出现在哪些层、是否存在对概念选择性响应的“概念神经元”，以及这些内部表征能否被因果操控从而改变模型的判别读出与生成行为。核心张力是：探针能读出≠生成可控，作者试图用神经元级干预把两者连接起来并检验因果性。","importance":"人格等心理构念在对话风格、价值判断与一致性评估中很关键，但以往多停留在行为层面（让模型“像某种人格说话”或从文本推断人格）。若能定位并操控内部表征：\n- 解释性：回答“模型把人格信息放在哪里、以何种形式编码”；\n- 控制性：为可控生成提供更细粒度的干预靶点；\n- 方法论：检验 probing 的可解释性边界（线性可解码信息是否对应可用的控制旋钮）。","technical_approach":"围绕问卷操作化的人格概念（BFI-2）做三步：\n1）层级探针（layer-wise probing）：对每层的句向量（取最终token表征）训练线性分类器，观察五个域标签在深度方向何时变得线性可分、何时保持可读。\n2）概念神经元识别：在每层MLP的单元预激活 z_{\\ell,j}(x) 上做“选择性”度量。把每个单元当作打分器，按激活对样本排序，用 Average Precision 衡量其区分某一人格域（正例）与其他域（负例）的能力；高AP单元即该概念的选择性神经元。\n3）因果干预：推理时把选中神经元的激活增强或抑制到极端分位数，评估（a）探针读出是否向目标人格域偏移；（b）一个“域名生成任务”（让模型生成对应人格域名称）以及更一般的生成分布是否按预期改变，并检查跨域串扰。","experiments":"主要实验与结论链条：\n- 深度探针：Big Five 信息在早期层迅速变得可线性解码，并在后续层持续可读；这与一些“persona相关表征主要在深层出现”的既有说法形成对照。\n- 神经元选择性分布：尽管可解码信息广泛存在，但高选择性概念神经元更集中在中间层，且不同人格域之间重叠有限，呈现更“局部化、概念特异”的组织。\n- 干预效果：对概念神经元做增强/抑制可强烈推动探针读出向目标概念偏移，最佳设置下可达约80%幅度且较少外溢；对生成的影响通常也朝目标方向移动，最高约50%，但跨概念更不稳定，偶有跨人格域串扰，提示生成端还依赖除这些神经元之外的机制。","reading_guide":"【skim（泛读）】\n- 先看 Introduction 末尾的三问（出现在哪、如何表示、能否操控）与贡献总结，快速建立论文主线。\n- 直接看 Figure 1（方法总览）+ Methods 中三块：layer-wise probing、AP选择性、干预设置；理解他们如何把“探针—神经元—生成”串起来。\n- 快速扫 Results/Discussion（若有）：重点找三条结论（早层可解码、中层选择性、干预对生成更不稳定）。\n\n【must_read（精读）】\n- 精读 probing 细节：数据如何从BFI-2构造（题项到文本的模板）、训练/测试划分、使用final token作为句表征的合理性与替代方案、线性分类器的正则与评估指标；这些决定“早层可解码”是否稳健。\n- 精读 AP 选择性定义与阈值策略：AP对类不平衡敏感，正负例构造、每域样本量、以及“高AP单元”选取比例会显著影响“概念神经元数量/层分布/重叠率”。\n- 精读干预实现：是对预激活还是后激活、在forward中何处clamp到分位数、分位数如何估计（基于哪一批数据）、是否对所有token还是仅final token干预；这些决定因果解释力度。\n- 重点看（若正文提供）跨模型一致性：同尺度同架构的复现程度、不同概念的可控性差异来源。\n- 创新点抓手：用“问卷操作化概念→单元级选择性→因果干预→同时评估probe与generation”形成闭环，并用结果强调 probing 与生成控制之间存在系统性落差。","authors_note":"作者的隐含立场是：人格信息在网络中“可读”并不稀奇，关键在于是否存在更稀疏、更局部化、可作为控制旋钮的单元集合；他们用干预实验表明这些单元对探针读出具有强因果影响，但对生成的影响更弱且更不稳定，从而把“可解释性（readout）”与“可控性（generation steering）”区分开来。"},"metadata":{"institutions":[],"authors":["Yuto Harada","Hiro Taiyo Hamada"],"notable_authors":[],"tags":["interpretability","concept-neurons","causal-intervention","personality","probing"],"links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11802","pdf":"https://arxiv.org/pdf/2604.11802","github":null,"project":null,"source_url":null}},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks how questionnaire-operationalized psychological constructs (Big Five personality domains) are represented inside instruction-tuned LLMs: where the information emerges across depth, whether there exist concept-selective “psychological concept neurons,” and whether manipulating those neurons causally shifts both probe readouts and generation. A central tension is that decodability via probing does not necessarily imply controllable generation; the work tests that gap directly.","importance":"Personality-like constructs matter for conversational style, value judgments, and consistency, yet prior work is largely behavioral (conditioning outputs or inferring traits from text). Identifying and intervening on internal representations provides: (i) interpretability about where/how traits are encoded, (ii) finer-grained control targets for steering, and (iii) a methodological test of probing’s limits—whether linearly decodable information corresponds to actionable causal knobs for generation.","technical_approach":"They build a three-stage pipeline grounded in BFI-2 Big Five domains:\n1) Layer-wise probing: train linear classifiers on per-layer sentence representations (final-token hidden state) to track when domain labels become linearly decodable across depth.\n2) Concept neuron identification: use MLP unit pre-activations z_{\\ell,j}(x) as unit responses; treat each unit as a scoring function ranking inputs by activation and compute Average Precision for separating one domain (positives) from others (negatives). High-AP units are extracted as concept-selective neurons.\n3) Causal interventions: at inference time, enhance or suppress selected neurons to extreme quantiles and evaluate shifts in (a) probe readouts and (b) a domain-name generation task / output distribution, including cross-trait spillover checks.","experiments":"Main findings:\n- Depth probing: Big Five information becomes rapidly linearly decodable in early layers and remains detectable later, contrasting with reports that persona-related representations mainly arise in deeper layers.\n- Selective neuron localization: despite broad decodability, concept-selective neurons are most prevalent in mid layers with limited overlap across domains, suggesting localized, concept-specific organization.\n- Interventions: manipulating these neurons strongly biases probe readouts toward the target (up to ~80% shifts with minimal spillover in favorable settings). Generation often shifts in the intended direction too (up to ~50%), but is more variable across concepts and sometimes exhibits cross-trait spillover, implying generation depends on additional mechanisms beyond what dominates probing.","reading_guide":"$98","authors_note":"The paper’s stance is that trait information being decodable is not the main story; the key is whether there exist sparse, localized unit sets that function as control knobs. Their interventions show strong causal effects on probe readouts but weaker and less reliable effects on generation, cleanly separating interpretability (readout) from controllability (steering)."},"reading_tier":"skim","recommendation":{"zh":"探针可读出≠可控生成，这篇至少尝试做因果干预；建议只看干预设计与反事实对照，概念神经元的“命名”别太当真。","en":"It’s useful insofar as it tries causal intervention beyond probing—skim the intervention design and counterfactual controls; don’t over-believe the “concept neuron” labeling."}},{"id":"2604.10511","title":"Thinking Fast, Thinking Wrong: Intuitiveness Modulates LLM Counterfactual Reasoning in Policy Evaluation","starred":false,"priority":"p3","source":"arxiv","sources":["arxiv"],"published_at":"2026-04-12T08:00:38+00:00","category_id":"mechanism","cover_url":"/covers/2604_10511.png","hf_upvotes":0,"arxiv_categories":["cs.AI","cs.CL"],"summary":{"core_problem":"论文关注一个被低估的风险：LLM 在“政策评估/准实验因果推断”这类真实世界反事实推理中，是否会在“结论违背直觉”的情形系统性失灵。作者提出“直觉性（intuitiveness）”这一维度：当真实经验证据与常识先验一致（obvious）、不明确（ambiguous）、或相反（counter-intuitive）时，LLM 的回答可靠性是否发生结构性变化。","importance":"政策评估的关键价值恰恰在于纠正常识直觉（例如激励扭曲、替代效应、一般均衡、道德风险等导致的反直觉结果）。如果 LLM 在反直觉案例上更容易“想得更快但更错”，那么把 LLM 用作政策分析助手会带来系统性偏差：总体准确率看似很高，但在最需要反事实推理的地方失败，风险集中且难以被平均指标发现。","technical_approach":"作者构建了一个由 40 个来自经济学/社会科学同行评审研究的“经验政策评估案例”组成的基准，每个案例都有可信识别策略（DiD/RD/IV/RCT 等）与明确方向性结论，并按直觉性分为 obvious/ambiguous/counter-intuitive。任务形式包含：单侧（YES/NO 判断某方向假设是否成立）与双侧（INCREASE/DECREASE/NO CHANGE 预测方向）两类。评测 4 个前沿模型（GPT-5.2、Claude Sonnet 4、Claude Opus 4.6、GPT-4.1）在 5 种提示策略下的表现：P1 朴素提问（System 1 默认反应）、P2 专家人格、P3 CoT、P4 结构化推理模板、P5 对抗式锚定（虚构“共识：无效”）以测鲁棒性。统计分析采用混合效应逻辑回归（mixed-effects logistic regression），用随机截距刻画“案例难度/直觉性”带来的层级方差，并检验提示策略与直觉性的交互效应（尤其是 CoT × counter-intuitive）。此外用“引用熟悉度/知识可得性”变量检验知识与推理是否解耦。","experiments":"总试验量为 40（案例）×4（模型）×5（提示）×3（重复）= 2400 次独立调用；用正则抽取最终选项，少量失败用轻量 LLM 解析兜底。核心结果有三点：①“CoT 悖论”：CoT 在 obvious 案例上显著提升准确率（主效应 OR≈26），但在 counter-intuitive 上提升几乎被交互项抵消（交互 OR=0.053，p<0.001），即越需要 System 2 的地方，CoT 越难带来收益；②直觉性是主导因素：案例层随机截距解释约 53.7% 方差（ICC=0.537），说明“题目本身是否反直觉”比模型/提示差异更决定成败；③知识–推理解耦：基于引用的“熟悉度”与准确率无关（p=0.53），暗示模型可能“知道相关研究/事实”，但在结论违背直觉时无法正确调用或整合。总体准确率 81.3% 掩盖了反直觉场景的关键失败。","reading_guide":"must_read（精读）：(1) Introduction：把 dual-process theory（System 1/2）映射到 LLM 提示与反事实推理的论证主线，以及三大结论的统计表述（尤其 CoT paradox 的 OR 与交互项）。(2) Benchmark Design：40 个案例的筛选标准、直觉性标注逻辑、单侧/双侧任务差异与五类提示的设计意图；重点看 counter-intuitive 示例（如 daycare 罚款、right-to-carry、暴力电影）以理解“直觉陷阱”的类型。 (3) Experimental Setup + 统计分析段：混合效应逻辑回归为何必要（嵌套结构：同一案例多次试验、同一模型多提示），以及如何解读 OR、交互项与 ICC。 (4) 结果部分（若全文后续有图表/回归表）：优先精读“提示×直觉性”的交互图/回归表、按直觉性分层的准确率表、以及知识–推理相关性检验。创新点抓手：直觉性分层基准；CoT 在反直觉上失效的“交互证据”；用层级模型量化“案例难度主导”。\nskim（泛读）：(1) 只读 Introduction 的问题定义与三条主结论；(2) 快速扫 Benchmark Design 的任务形式与五种提示；(3) 直接看总体结果摘要（总体准确率 vs 分层表现）与 CoT paradox 的关键数字（OR≈26、交互 OR=0.053、ICC=0.537、p=0.53）。","authors_note":"作者的核心立场是：在政策评估这种“经验证据经常反直觉”的领域，LLM 的失败模式不是随机噪声，而是被“直觉一致性”系统调制；因此仅用平均准确率或常见合成因果基准会高估可靠性。论文也隐含一个方法论建议：评测 LLM 的因果/反事实能力应显式纳入“反直觉压力测试”，并用层级统计模型把案例难度与提示效应分离。"},"metadata":{"institutions":[],"authors":["Yanjie He"],"notable_authors":[],"tags":["counterfactual-reasoning","chain-of-thought","benchmark","calibration-of-prompting","causal-inference"],"links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10511","pdf":"https://arxiv.org/pdf/2604.10511","github":null,"project":null,"source_url":null}},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks whether LLMs are reliable for real-world counterfactual reasoning in empirical policy evaluation, especially when the true causal findings contradict common priors. It introduces an “intuitiveness” axis—obvious, ambiguous, counter-intuitive—and studies how this property systematically modulates LLM correctness.","importance":"Policy evaluation is valuable precisely because it often overturns intuition (incentives, substitution, moral hazard, general equilibrium). If LLMs fail disproportionately on counter-intuitive cases, then using them for policy analysis introduces a structured bias: high average accuracy can mask failures exactly where counterfactual reasoning matters most, creating concentrated real-world risk.","technical_approach":"The author builds a benchmark of 40 peer-reviewed economics/social-science policy evaluation cases with credible identification (DiD/RD/IV/RCT) and unambiguous directional conclusions, labeled by intuitiveness (obvious/ambiguous/counter-intuitive). Two task formats are used: one-sided (YES/NO for a directional hypothesis) and two-sided (INCREASE/DECREASE/NO SIGNIFICANT CHANGE). Four frontier models (GPT-5.2, Claude Sonnet 4, Claude Opus 4.6, GPT-4.1) are tested under five prompting strategies: naive, expert persona, chain-of-thought, structured reasoning template, and adversarial anchoring. Results are analyzed via mixed-effects logistic regression to account for the nested design and to estimate prompt effects, intuitiveness effects, and their interactions (notably CoT × counter-intuitive). A citation-based familiarity measure is used to probe a knowledge–reasoning dissociation.","experiments":"The study runs 40×4×5×3 = 2,400 independent trials with fixed inference settings; answers are parsed via regex with a small fallback parser. Key findings: (1) a “CoT paradox”: CoT massively boosts accuracy on obvious cases (main-effect OR≈26) but the gain is nearly wiped out on counter-intuitive cases (interaction OR=0.053, p<0.001); (2) intuitiveness dominates: case-level random intercepts explain ~53.7% of variance (ICC=0.537); (3) knowledge–reasoning dissociation: citation-based familiarity is unrelated to accuracy (p=0.53), suggesting models may “know” relevant facts but fail to use them when conclusions clash with intuition. Overall accuracy (81.3%) hides critical counter-intuitive failures.","reading_guide":"$99","authors_note":"The paper’s thesis is that LLM errors in policy counterfactuals are not random but systematically shaped by whether the true finding aligns with intuition; hence synthetic causal benchmarks and average accuracy can overstate reliability. Methodologically, it argues for counter-intuitive “stress tests” and hierarchical analyses that separate case difficulty from prompt/model effects."},"reading_tier":"skim","recommendation":{"zh":"把“反直觉=高风险失灵点”讲清楚了；只看按 intuitiveness 分桶的错误率曲线，能直接指导你做评测分层而非看均值。","en":"Clarifies that counter-intuitive cases are the real failure mode—just read the error-by-intuitiveness plots to motivate stratified evals instead of average accuracy."}},{"id":"2604.10690","title":"Do LLMs Build Spatial World Models? Evidence from Grid-World Maze Tasks","starred":false,"priority":"p3","source":"arxiv","sources":["arxiv"],"published_at":"2026-04-12T15:30:43+00:00","category_id":"mechanism","cover_url":"/covers/2604_10690.png","hf_upvotes":0,"arxiv_categories":["cs.AI"],"summary":{"core_problem":"论文探问：LLM 是否真的能构建“空间世界模型（spatial world models）”来支持规划与推理，还是主要依赖对特定输入格式/提示的表面启发式。作者用网格迷宫（grid-world maze）作为受控环境，检验模型在多步路径规划、空间抽象与跨表示一致性上的能力。","importance":"空间世界模型是机器人导航、具身智能、自动规划系统的关键前提。如果 LLM 的空间能力强依赖输入表示（token 化邻接表 vs 可视化网格）或强依赖 CoT 指令，那么其“可迁移的规划能力”可能被高估：在真实系统中表示变化、上下文干扰、连续查询记忆等都会导致性能崩塌。","technical_approach":"作者构建迷宫任务评测框架：迷宫规模从 5×5 到 9×9；提供两种等价但形式不同的输入表示——(1) 带特殊 token 的邻接表（便于符号化解析），(2) 人类可读的视觉网格（Figure 1）。提示策略包括标准提示、CoT、显式 reasoning；并设置 k-shot（0/3/5）以研究 in-context 示例的增益与上下文长度干扰。评测指标不仅看“精确路径正确率”，还包括编辑距离、路径有效性、以及对推理文本质量的分析；另外加入定向的空间探针（proximity/directional queries）来分解能力。","experiments":"评测模型包括 Gemini-2.5-Flash、GPT-5-mini、Claude-Haiku-4.5、DeepSeek-Chat。主要观察：①强表示依赖：同一迷宫结构下，从邻接表切换到视觉网格会出现 2–5× 的准确率下降；例如 Gemini-2.5-Flash + CoT 在 5×5 邻接表上 86%，但在视觉网格上仅 34%，且在更大迷宫上进一步崩塌（文中摘要提到视觉网格下可降至 16–34%）。②强提示依赖：没有明确推理指令时，多数模型几乎无法完成任务；Claude-Haiku-4.5 在 5×5 邻接表 base prompt 近乎失败，但 CoT 可恢复到 78%。③跨轮次不积累：模型往往把连续空间查询当作独立问题，无法复用先前已计算的信息，即使问题重复。④“推理质量≠任务成功”：文本推理看似合理不一定对应正确路径，出现准确率与推理质量解耦。整体结论是：当前 LLM 的空间规划更像在狭窄条件下工作的表示特定启发式，而非稳健、格式不变的空间抽象世界模型。","reading_guide":"must_read（精读）：(1) Introduction：三条研究问题（表示依赖、few-shot/上下文、推理透明性）与“世界模型 vs 表面匹配”的判据。 (2) Method：两种输入表示的构造细节（邻接表 special tokens、视觉网格编码）、任务定义（规划 vs 推理）、指标（exact accuracy/edit distance/validity）与 k-shot 设置。 (3) 关键结果图表：优先看“表示切换导致性能崩塌”的对比图（邻接表 vs 网格）、不同提示（base/CoT/reasoning）下的曲线、以及随迷宫尺寸扩展的泛化曲线；再看“连续查询不复用”的实验与推理质量分析。创新点抓手：用等价表示对照来检验格式不变性；把 CoT 作为必要条件而非锦上添花来刻画能力边界；提出准确率与推理文本解耦的证据。\nskim（泛读）：(1) 读 Introduction + Abstract 把握结论；(2) 快速扫 Figure LLM 空间规划能力受限且脆弱”的结论，并给出一个可复现的平台化基准（SpatialBench）。"},"metadata":{"institutions":[],"authors":["Weijiang Li","Yilin Zhu","Rajarshi Das","Parijat Dube"],"notable_authors":[],"tags":["spatial-reasoning","world-models","maze-tasks","representation-sensitivity","planning"],"links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10690","pdf":"https://arxiv.org/pdf/2604.10690","github":null,"project":null,"source_url":null}},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper investigates whether LLMs actually build internal spatial world models that support planning and reasoning, or whether their maze-solving success is driven by brittle, representation- and prompt-specific heuristics. Grid-world mazes provide a controlled setting to test multi-step planning, spatial abstraction, and invariance across equivalent representations.","importance":"Robotics navigation and autonomous planning rely on robust spatial world models. If LLM spatial performance collapses under representation changes (tokenized adjacency lists vs visual grids), requires explicit CoT to function, or fails to reuse information across sequential queries, then their real-world planning reliability is likely overstated.","technical_approach":"The authors design maze tasks over 5×5 to 9×9 grids with two equivalent input formats: (1) tokenized adjacency lists with special markers, and (2) human-readable visual grid layouts (Figure 1). They vary prompting (standard, chain-of-thought, explicit reasoning) and k-shot context (0/3/5) to study in-context learning vs context-length interference. Evaluation includes exact path accuracy, edit distance, path validity, and analyses of reasoning quality; additional targeted probes test proximity/directional understanding.","experiments":"Models evaluated include Gemini-2.5-Flash, GPT-5-mini, Claude-Haiku-4.5, and DeepSeek-Chat. Main findings: (1) strong representation dependence: switching from adjacency lists to visual grids yields a 2–5× accuracy drop; e.g., Gemini-2.5-Flash with CoT reaches 86% on 5×5 tokenized mazes but only 34% on visual grids (and can fall to ~16–34% on visual formats per the abstract). (2) strong prompt dependence: without explicit reasoning instructions, most models largely fail; Claude-Haiku-4.5 nearly fails on 5×5 tokenized mazes with base prompting but recovers to 78% with CoT. (3) poor cross-turn state reuse: models treat sequential spatial queries as independent and fail to leverage previously computed information, even for repeated questions. (4) dissociation between reasoning text and success: “good-looking” reasoning does not reliably predict correct paths. Overall, results suggest narrow, format-specific competence rather than robust, format-invariant spatial world modeling.","reading_guide":"must_read (deep): (1) Introduction for the three research questions and the world-model vs pattern-matching criteria. (2) Method for the exact construction of adjacency-list tokens vs visual grids, task definitions (planning vs reasoning), metrics (exact/edit-distance/validity), and k-shot settings. (3) Core results figures/tables: prioritize adjacency-list vs grid comparisons, prompt ablations (base vs CoT vs reasoning), and scaling with maze size; then read the sequential-query reuse experiment and reasoning-quality analysis. Key innovations: equivalence-based representation controls to test invariance; framing CoT as a boundary condition for capability; evidence for accuracy–reasoning dissociation.\nskim (light): read Abstract + Introduction; glance at Figure 1 (representations) and the main performance comparison plots/tables; read the concluding bullets on representation dependence, prompt dependence, and lack of cross-turn reuse.","authors_note":"The paper’s central methodological move is to test abstraction via representational equivalence: a true spatial world model should be relatively invariant to input format, less dependent on explicit CoT, and able to reuse computed spatial knowledge across turns. The observed brittleness supports the conclusion that current LLM spatial planning is fragile, and the work contributes a reproducible evaluation platform (SpatialBench)."},"reading_tier":"skim","recommendation":{"zh":"网格迷宫是干净的诊断题，但很容易被提示格式牵着走；只看跨表示一致性与提示敏感性实验，别把单一格式高分当世界模型证据。","en":"Grid mazes are a clean probe but heavily format-sensitive—skim the cross-representation consistency and prompt-sensitivity results; don’t treat one-format wins as “world model” proof."}},{"id":"2604.11663","title":"Why Do Large Language Models Generate Harmful Content?","starred":false,"priority":"p3","source":"arxiv","sources":["arxiv"],"published_at":"2026-04-13T16:11:38+00:00","category_id":"mechanism","cover_url":"/covers/2604_11663.png","hf_upvotes":0,"arxiv_categories":["cs.AI"],"summary":{"core_problem":"论文要回答的问题是：LLM 为什么会生成有害内容？更具体地，哪些内部组件（层/模块/神经元）在因果意义上“导致”了有害输出，而不仅仅是与之相关。","importance":"现有安全研究大量停留在相关性分析（找子空间、找特征、做激活干预），但相关不等于因果，导致安全补丁脆弱、难泛化、难验证。若能定位“因果责任组件”，就能为可验证的安全护栏、可解释的对齐干预、以及更稳健的模型修复提供机制级依据。","technical_approach":"must_read（详细技术分析）：\n1) 因果建模：将 LLM 前向计算表示为有向无环因果计算图 G=(V,E)。输入提示 X 作为 treatment，输出 token 分布 P 作为 outcome，内部组件（层/MLP/Attention/神经元）作为候选 mediator M。\n2) 因果中介分析（CMA）：目标是估计输入从“有害提示”到“无害基线”所引起的输出分布差异中，有多少是通过某个内部组件 M 传递的（间接效应 IE）。\n3) 度量与估计：用输出分布的 L1/Total Variation 距离衡量“有害运行”与“无害运行”的基线差异，并在对 mediator 做干预后重新计算差异；IE(M) 定义为“基线差异”减去“干预后差异”，正值表示该组件对有害生成具有正向因果贡献（移除/替换其状态会让输出更接近无害基线）。\n4) 多粒度追踪：按层（layerwise）→ 按模块（同层内 MLP vs Attention）→ 按神经元（neuronwise）逐级细化，形成“有害信息流”的因果归因链。\n5) 机制性结论（论文主张）：早期层主要做对提示中有害性的语境理解；中后期/末层通过 MLP 产生并传播“有害信号”；最终层存在稀疏的“门控型神经元”，根据该信号决定走向拒答还是输出有害内容。整体上，失败主要发生在 MLP 而非注意力路由。","experiments":"在多种 SOTA LLM 上做系统实验（论文声称 extensive experiments）：\n- 层级 CMA：发现有害生成的因果贡献集中在后期与最终层。\n- 模块级 CMA：同层内 MLP 的因果贡献显著高于 Attention，表明问题更像“表征/决策变换失败”而非“上下文检索/路由失败”。\n- 神经元级 CMA：识别到稀疏神经元呈现门控特性，与“是否生成有害内容/是否拒答”的切换强相关且具因果贡献。\n（注：你提供的全文片段未包含具体模型列表、数据集、数值结果与图表编号；增强摘要在不臆测具体数值的前提下概括其结论与实验结构。）","reading_guide":"must_read（精读建议：重点章节/图表/创新点）：\n- 重点章节：\n  1) Methodology：因果计算图如何定义节点/边；mediator 的具体选择（层/模块/神经元）与干预方式；IE 的严格定义与估计流程。\n  2) Layerwise/Modulewise/Neuronwise 实验部分：逐级证据链是否闭合（后层→MLP→门控神经元）。\n  3) 讨论/局限：CMA 的可识别性假设、干预是否引入分布外效应、以及 L1 距离作为输出差异度量的合理性。\n- 重点图表（按内容类型而非编号）：\n  1) 层级 IE 曲线/热力图：验证“后层主导”的关键证据。\n  2) MLP vs Attention 的 IE 对比图：支撑“主要失败在 MLP”。\n  3) 神经元稀疏门控可视化：展示少量神经元即可显著改变有害/拒答概率。\n- 创新点抓手：\n  1) 从相关性转向因果中介：用 mediated effect 量化“组件的因果责任”。\n  2) 多粒度因果追踪：把宏观层级结论落到模块与神经元机制。\n  3) “有害信号→门控神经元”机制叙事：为后续可验证的安全干预提供靶点。\n\nskim（方法概述 + 泛读建议）：\n- 方法概述：把内部组件当作中介变量，比较有害/无害提示下输出分布差异，并通过对组件做干预来估计其对差异的因果贡献；再从层到模块到神经元逐级定位。\n- 泛读建议：优先看 Introduction（问题与动机）→ Methodology 中 IE 定义与干预思路 → 三个粒度的主结果图（层/模块/神经元）→ 结论段对“后层+MLP+门控神经元”的总结。","authors_note":"作者的核心立场是：要做可泛化、可验证的 LLM 安全，必须定位“因果机制”而非仅做相关性解释；有害生成并非全模型均匀产生，而是沿着“早层理解—后层 MLP 产生/传播信号—末层稀疏门控神经元决策”的路径发生，因此安全修复应更聚焦后层 MLP 与门控单元的机制级干预。"},"metadata":{"institutions":[],"authors":["Rajesh Ganguli","Raha Moraffah"],"notable_authors":[],"tags":["causal-mediation-analysis","safety","interpretability","mlp-vs-attention","harmful-generation"],"links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11663","pdf":"https://arxiv.org/pdf/2604.11663","github":null,"project":null,"source_url":null}},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks: why do LLMs generate harmful content? Concretely, which internal components (layers/modules/neurons) are causally responsible for harmful outputs, beyond mere correlation.","importance":"Most prior safety work is correlational (finding subspaces, prompt patterns, or activation interventions) and thus yields brittle, hard-to-verify mitigations. Identifying causal contributors enables more principled, generalizable, and auditable safety guardrails and mechanistic fixes.","technical_approach":"$9a","experiments":"The paper reports extensive experiments on SOTA LLMs:\n- Layerwise CMA: causal contributions concentrate in late/final layers.\n- Modulewise CMA: MLP blocks dominate attention blocks in mediated effect, suggesting the issue is more about transformation/decision circuitry than context routing.\n- Neuronwise CMA: identifies sparse neurons with gating behavior that causally modulate harmful vs refusal outcomes.\n(Note: the provided full-content excerpt does not include exact model lists, datasets, or numeric results; this enhanced summary reflects the experimental structure and claimed findings without inventing missing specifics.)","reading_guide":"$9b","authors_note":"The authors’ thesis is that robust LLM safety requires causal—not merely correlational—mechanistic identification. 依赖显式 CoT 推理提升能力，但也暴露新的攻击面。以往 jailbreak 往往需要多轮、叙事包装或自动化攻击器；本文指出即使单轮、非叙事的“冲突注入”也能显著削弱安全对齐，说明现实部署中只要用户把请求包装成价值冲突或道德两难，就可能系统性提高越狱成功率。","technical_approach":"must_read（详细技术分析）：\n1) 冲突类型设计：两大类（见文中框架图）：\n  - 内部冲突（alignment values 互相拉扯）：如 Helpfulness vs Harmlessness、Simplicity vs Completeness、Honesty vs Privacy、Artifact vs Nature Engagement 等。\n  - 两难困境（互斥且都带负面后果）：duress（胁迫）、agent-centered、sacrificial（牺牲）、social dilemmas 等。\n2) 攻击/评测范式：单轮、非叙事 prompt 注入冲突指令；利用 LRM 的特点，要求“把详细答案放在 reasoning 中”，从而更容易诱导模型在推理轨迹里泄露或生成有害细节。\n3) 黑盒安全评测：在 5 个基准、1300+ prompts 上评估 3 个代表性 LRM（Llama-3.1-Nemotron-8B、QwQ-32B、DeepSeek R1），比较直接有害请求 vs 冲突注入后的攻击成功率变化。\n4) 机制分析假设：冲突削弱安全对齐可能通过两条路径：\n  (i) 安全相关神经元形成可分离子空间，但在冲突目标下被抑制；\n  (ii) 与标准前馈 Transformer 在内部计算动力学上的差异：当把一段共享权重的层在潜空间中反复应用时，残差流（latent states）会如何演化？它是否仍呈现前馈模型中常见的“分阶段推理（stages of inference）”结构？以及循环结构带来的性能收益对应了怎样的可解释机制。","importance":"循环层（recurrent-in-depth / cyclic recurrence）被视为提升推理能力、扩展测试时计算（test-time compute）的重要架构路线，但其机制不清会直接影响：1）我们如何选择循环步数与结构超参；2）循环是否真的在“做更多推理”，还是在重复/退化；3）如何设计更稳定、更可控的 looped LLM（例如是否需要 input injection、sandwich 结构等）。本文用“固定点/极限环（cycle）”的动力学视角给出可检验的解释框架，并指出某些行为甚至在未训练随机初始化的 Transformer 中也会涌现，暗示其与架构归纳偏置强相关。","technical_approach":"$9e","experiments":"（skim 级别可读）论文主要做机制分析而非追求 SOTA：\n- 对多种 looped Transformer 稳定周期轨道”的现象；\n  3）指出该现象在随机初始化也出现，强调 Transformer 架构归纳偏置。\n\nskim（泛读建议）\n- 先读 Introduction + Preliminaries，搞清 (p,k,c) 与 input injection。\n- 直接跳到主要实验/结果图：优先看“是否收敛到固定点/周期轨道”的证据图，再看与 stages-of-inference 推理并不只是“把同一层多跑几次”这么简单；共享循环块会诱导特定的潜空间动力学。只要出现稳态行为，就会落入“更新消失”或“稳定周期轨道”两类；而实证上常见的是后者（每层收敛到不同固定点，形成一致的 k 周期）。更重要的是，这种结构化循环在未训练模型中也能出现，提示其与 Transformer 结构本身强相关。"},"metadata":{"institutions":[],"authors":["Hugh Blayney","Álvaro Arroyo","Johan Obando-Ceron","Pablo Samuel Castro","Aaron Courville","Michael M. Bronstein","Xiaowen Dong"],"notable_authors":[],"tags":["mechanistic-interpretability","looped-transformer","fixed-point","reasoning","attention-dynamics"],"links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11791","pdf":"https://arxiv.org/pdf/2604.11791","github":null,"project":null,"source_url":null}},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks how looped (recurrent-in-depth) Transformers differ mechanistically from standard feedforward Transformers. When a shared-weight block is applied repeatedly in latent space, how do residual-stream states evolve? Do looped models exhibit the same “stages of inference” seen in feedforward models, or do they enter qualitatively different dynamical regimes that explain their reasoning gains and limitations?","importance":"Looping layers is a prominent route to increase test-time compute and improve reasoning without scaling parameters, but its internal dynamics are poorly understood. This matters for (1) choosing loop depth/steps, (2) diagnosing whether extra steps add new computation or merely repeat/saturate, and (3) architectural design choices such as sandwich (prelude/coda) structure and input injection. The paper provides a dynamical-systems lens—fixed points vs limit cycles—and argues some behaviors emerge from the Transformer architecture itself, even at random initialization.","technical_approach":"$9f","experiments":"The work is primarily mechanistic rather than SOTA-driven:\n- Analyze multiple looped Transformer variants (cyclic recurrence, different (p,k,c) sandwich layouts, with/without input injection) via residual-stream trajectory measurements.\n- Key evidence: convergence patterns showing layer-wise stabilization across recurrences; in many cases, each layer converges to a distinct state, collectively forming a stable k-period orbit.\n- Comparisons: feedforward vs looped models under “stages of inference” analyses; trained vs random-initialization comparisons to support the “emergent from architecture” claim.","reading_guide":"$a0","authors_note":"The paper’s thesis is that looped reasoning is not merely “running the same layers longer.” Shared-weight recurrence induces structured latent dynamics: if a steady state emerges, it must look like either saturated/vanishing updates or a stable k-period orbit. Empirically, the latter often occurs—each layer converges to a distinct layer-specific fixed point—sometimes even at random initialization, pointing to a strong architectural inductive bias."},"reading_tier":"skim","recommendation":{"zh":"把looped depth当动力系统看固定点/极限环很有用，但不少现象随机初始化也出现需降权；只读动力学诊断那节和关键相图/轨迹图即可。","en":"The fixed-point/limit-cycle lens is useful for looped-in-depth models, but the fact that some behaviors appear at random init weakens causal claims; skim the dynamics diagnostics section and the main phase/trajectory plots."}},{"id":"2604.09560","title":"The Diffusion-Attention Connection","starred":false,"priority":"p3","source":"arxiv","sources":["arxiv"],"published_at":"2026-02-11T17:27:34+00:00","category_id":"mechanism","cover_url":"/covers/2604_09560.png","hf_upvotes":0,"arxiv_categories":["cs.LG"],"summary":{"core_problem":"如何从统一的数学/几何视角解释 Transformer 注意力、diffusion maps 与 magnetic Laplacian 之间的关系，并给出可组织这些动力学机制的框架。","importance":"贡献类型偏原理分析/统一视角：把注意力看作由 pre-softmax QK 分数诱导的 Markov 几何在不同“制度(regime)”下的表现，有助于理解注意力的谱性质、扩散/稳态与非平衡动力学类比，为后续注意力机制分析与改造提供理论工具。","technical_approach":"提出基于 QK 分数的“bidivergence”，其指数化并归一化后可分别得到 attention、diffusion-maps 与 magnetic diffusion；进一步用 product-of-experts 与 Schrödinger bridges 将这些对象组织为 equilibrium、nonequilibrium steady-state 与 driven dynamics 三类动力学图景，从而建立统一连接。","experiments":"以理论推导与概念性框架为主；摘要未给出明确的模型规模、训练数据、对比基线或标准基准上的定量结果。","authors_note":""},"metadata":{"institutions":[],"authors":["Julio Candanedo"],"notable_authors":[],"tags":["attention","diffusion-maps","markov-geometry","spectral-analysis","schrodinger-bridge"],"links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09560","pdf":"https://arxiv.org/pdf/2604.09560","github":null,"project":null,"source_url":null}},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"To provide a unified mathematical/geometric account connecting Transformer attention with diffusion maps and the magnetic Laplacian, organizing these mechanisms within a common dynamical framework.","importance":"Contributes a unifying theoretical viewpoint that interprets attention as Markovian geometry induced by pre-softmax QK scores across different regimes, clarifying spectral/steady-state and non-equilibrium analogies and supplying tools for analyzing or redesigning attention.","technical_approach":"Introduces a QK-score-based 'bidivergence' whose exponentiation and normalization recover standard attention, diffusion maps, and magnetic diffusion. Fundamental Utilization（利用，2023–）：把 AS 当作可利用结构信号。例如在长上下文高效推理中，KV cache 压缩/稀疏注意力方法会“保留 sink token”以维持性能（Sink Token Preservation），因为很多头会稳定地指向这些 token。\n  B. Mechanistic Interpretation（机理解释，2024–）：研究 AS 如何产生、如何随层/头/训练阶段演化，以及它在数值上与哪些结构相关。综述强调 outlier circuits/异常值通路等机制：少数极端 token/通道产生异常大的 key/query/value 或 logits，导致注意力塌缩到 sink。\n  C. Strategic Mitigation（系统缓解，2025–）：在理解机制后进行结构或算法干预，使模型不依赖 AS 或降低其副作用。代表方向包括：\n    - Gated Attention：引入输入依赖门控抑制异常注意力，改善性能并缓解量化后退化；\n    - 训练/正则/归一化层面的抑制；\n    - 推理侧重分配/重加权；\n    - 与稀疏注意力、KV 压缩协同的“既利用又约束”的折中方案。\n3）跨任务影响面：综述把 AS 与（i）训练稳定性与梯度/激活异常，（ii）推理时 KV cache 结构与长上下文退化，（iii）可解释性误导，（iv）幻觉与鲁棒性联系起来，强调 AS 既可能是“模型自发的路由/锚点”，也可能是“数值病灶”。\n4）面向未来的设计问题：如何设计“无需 AS 也能稳定训练/高效长上下文”的 Transformer（例如更好的归一化、门控、注意力形式、或替代记忆机制），以及每种方案的代价（计算、兼容性、性能、可解释性）。","experiments":"作为 survey，主要“实验”是文献系统化与证据汇总而非作者自建 benchmark：\n- 汇总 180+ 篇工作，给出时间线与研究版图（从利用→解释→缓解）。\n- 归纳不同架构/任务中 AS 的典型表现、常见 sink token 类型、以及与 KV 压缩、稀疏注意力、量化、幻觉等方向的耦合关系。\n- 对机制类工作，重点总结 outlier circuits 等可复现的诊断信号与干预点；对缓解类工作，比较 gated attention 等方法的收益与局限。","reading_guide":"must_read（精读建议）\n- 重点章节：\n  1）Introduction：三大问题 Q1–Q3 4）Mitigation：重点看 gated attention 的设计动机、与量化/稳定性的关系、以及是否会牺牲长上下文能力。\n- 重点图表：\n  1）研究时间线/版图图（文中提到 Figure 3）：用于快速建立领域脉络。\n  2）AS 现象示意与分类总表：用于把“症状—机制—干预”对齐。\n- 创新点抓手（作为综述的贡献）：\n  1）首次系统化整合 AS 的利用、解释、缓解三条线；\n  2）把 AS 与长上下文工程（KV/稀疏/量化）和安全问题（幻觉/鲁棒）放在同一框架下讨论；\n  3）给出未来“去 AS 化”架构设计的开放问题与权衡。\n\nskim（泛读建议）\n- 只看 Introduction（Q1–Q3）+ 时间线图 + 分类总表，快速获得地图。\n- 若你做长上下文/推理加速：优先看“利用 AS 的 KV 压缩/稀疏注意力”部分。\n- 若你做机制/可解释性：优先看 outlier circuits 与诊断指标汇总。\n- 若你做架构/训练稳定性/量化：优先看 gated attention 与 mitigation 小节。","authors_note":"作者倾向于把 AS survey consolidates research on Attention Sink (AS) in Transformers—cases where attention mass collapses onto a small set of specific but largely uninformative tokens (e.g., BOS/newlines/special or outlier tokens). It asks: how is AS exploited in practice, what mechanisms cause it (and is it “necessary”), and what mitigation or alternative architectural strategies can reduce its harms and dependencies?","importance":"AS has become a central factor in real-world LLM behavior: it affects training/inference dynamics, interpretability, long-context efficiency (KV-cache compression and sparse attention), quantization degradation, hallucinations, and robustness. predictor（在其设定下）。","experiments":"摘要未提供具体实验细节（参数规模、数据、基线与量化结果未披露）；主要以理论构造与证明为主，并声称有实验/实证来佐证构造与学习机制（但摘要截断，无法确认具体设置与提升幅度）。","authors_note":""},"metadata":{"institutions":[],"authors":["Francesco D'Angelo","Nicolas Flammarion"],"notable_authors":[],"tags":["in-context-learning","mirror-descent","attention-mechanism","theory","mixture-models"],"links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10848","pdf":"https://arxiv.org/pdf/2604.10848","github":null,"project":null,"source_url":null}},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"To explain how Transformers can infer latent token importance/mixture weights from context in sequence modeling, and to establish a provable correspondence between attention-based in-context learning and an explicit optimization update.","importance":"Provides a constructive, provable mechanism linking in-context learning to online optimization/Bayesian inference: it formalizes ICL as learning mixture weights in a latent-variable mixture of transition distributions and shows a small Transformer can exactly implement a mirror-descent update, yielding a first-order Bayes-optimal predictor in the setting.","technical_approach":"Defines a generative framework where a latent variable controls historical-token influence and is governed by unknown mixture weights. Constructs an explicit three-layer Transformer whose forward pass performs one step of mirror descent to estimate these weights from context, and proves the resulting predictor matches a first-order approximation to the Bayes-optimal estimator under the model assumptions.","experiments":"The abstract provides no concrete experimental details (model sizes, datasets, baselines, or quantitative gains). It suggests empirical support for the construction/mechanism but does not specify the setup or results.","authors_note":""},"reading_tier":"skim","recommendation":{"zh":"证明“小Transformer=一步mirror descent”很漂亮但构造味重、外推到大模型需谨慎；只看定理假设与实现电路那一节，拿来做理论对照即可。","en":"The “tiny Transformer implements one-step mirror descent” proof is elegant but quite constructive, so extrapolation to real LMs is shaky; read the theorem assumptions and the circuit realization section as a theory touchstone."}},{"id":"2604.10946","title":"Learning to Adapt: In-Context Learning Beyond Stationarity","starred":false,"priority":"p3","source":"arxiv","sources":["arxiv"],"published_at":"2026-04-13T03:37:08+00:00","category_id":"mechanism","cover_url":"/covers/2604_10946.png","hf_upvotes":0,"arxiv_categories":["cs.LG","math.OC"],"summary":{"core_problem":"现有关于 Transformer in-context learning（ICL）的理论分析大多建立在“任务分布平稳（stationary）”的回归设定上：prompt 中的上下文样本与查询点共享同一个不随时间变化的目标函数/回归系数。但真实序列任务（时间序列、流式数据、语言等）普遍非平稳：目标函数随时间漂移，预测应更依赖“最近样本”（recency bias）。本文要回答：在非平稳回归下，ICL 机制如何实现自适应？标准线性注意力为何不足？带门控的线性注意力（GLA）为何更合适？","importance":"把 ICL 理论从“静态任务”推进到“随时间变化的任务”，直接对应大量实际应用的核心困难：分布漂移与时变映射。更重要的是，论文试图用可解析的理论框架解释近年一批面向长序列/非平稳建模的结构（GLA、RetNet、RWKV、SSM 等）为何在经验上更强：关键不是更大容量，而是结构性地实现了可学习的遗忘/加权，从而在 ICL 中近似某种在线自适应算法。","technical_approach":"（must_read 级别：详细技术分析）\n1) 非平稳回归建模：用一阶自回归（AR(1)）过程刻画“任务参数/回归系数随时间演化”，从而使第t个上下文样本与查询点对应的目标函数不再相同，而是相关但漂移。该设定在理论上可控：既能表达非平稳，又能推导闭式误差项。\n2) 对比对象：\n- 标准线性注意力（linear attention）在 ICL 回归分析中常被解释为在上下文上做某种核回归/最小二乘的近似（或等价于实现简单学习算法的一步更新），但其对历史样本的聚合通常缺少“时间选择性”。在非平稳下，这会把过时样本与新样本几乎同权混合，导致偏差项上升。\n- 门控线性注意力（GLA）：在键值累积/状态更新中引入门控（gating），使得历史信息以可学习的方式衰减或被抑制，相当于在 ICL 内部实现“指数遗忘/可学习 recency bias”。\n3) 核心理论结论（按论文叙述抽象）：\n- 在线性注意力下，训练/测试误差会出现额外的“漂移惩罚项”，其量级随非平稳强度（AR 系数、噪声、漂移方差等）增大而显著恶化；直观原因是估计器在做近似静态拟合。\n- GLA 通过门控把上下文贡献变成时间加权（更偏向最近），从而在同样上下文长度下有效降低漂移带来的偏差，并在一定条件下给出更小的误差上界/更优的泛化表现。\n4) 机制解释：门控并非“额外非线性”这么简单，而是把注意力的记忆汇聚从“无差别累积”变成“可控遗忘的递推滤波器”，更接近经典自适应滤波/在线学习在非平稳环境中的做法（例如带遗忘因子的递推最小二乘思想）。\n（skim 级别：方法概述）\n用 AR(1) 描述时变回归目标；在该设定下推导线性注意力 vs GLA 的 ICL 误差；证明/论证 GLA 的门控诱导 recency bias，能更好适应漂移；并用实验验证理论趋势。","experiments":"论文摘要与引言表明包含实验来“corroborate theoretical findings”。从信息给定的角度，可确定实验目标是：在非平稳回归/时变映射的合成或半合成任务上，对比标准线性注意力与 GLA 的训练/测试误差随漂移强度、上下文长度等变化的曲线，验证：线性注意力在漂移增大时退化更快，而 GLA 更稳健、对最近样本更敏感。若你精读，建议重点核对：实验是否严格对应 AR(1) 假设、是否做了漂移强度扫描、是否展示了门控权重随时间的衰减形态（以支撑“learnable recency bias”的机制主张）。","reading_guide":"must_read（精读建议：重点章节/图表/创新点）\n- 重点章节：\n  1) 问题设定与非平稳建模（AR(1) 任务/参数漂移的形式化）：这是全文可解析推导的根基，决定后续误差项长什么样。\n  2) 线性注意力在非平稳下的误差分解/上界：关注“漂移惩罚项”如何出现、依赖哪些量（漂移强度、上下文长度、噪声）。\n  3) GLA 递推形式与门控导致的时间加权：把门控写成等价的加权和/滤波器形式，理解其如何实现遗忘。\n  4) 主定理/命题与对比结论：逐条对照假设条件（如独立性、特征分布、噪声、稳定性条件）与结论适用范围。\n  5) 实验部分：重点看“漂移强度扫描”“上下文长度扫描”“门控权重可视化/消融”。\n- 重点图表（按应出现的逻辑而非编号）：\n  1) 非平稳过程示意（参数随时间变化）与 recency 的必要性。\n  2) 误差随时间/漂移强度变化的曲线：线性注意力 vs GLA 的分叉点。\n  3) 门控/有效权重随位置的衰减图：证明模型确实学到 recency bias。\n- 创新点抓手：\n  1) 把 ICL 理论从 stationary regression 推到 non-stationary regression，并给出可解析误差对比。\n  2) 给出“为什么 gating 有用”的理论解释：门控=可学习遗忘=适配漂移。\n  3) 为 GLA/RetNet/RWKV/SSM 等非平稳友好结构提供统一的 ICL 视角（结构诱导在线自适应）。\n\nskim（泛读建议：推荐看哪些部分）\n- 先读 Introduction 的动机与贡献列表：明确本文回答的三个问题（非平稳、线性注意力不足、GLA 优势）。\n- 快速扫问题设定（AR(1)）与结论段落：抓住“误差随漂移恶化”与“门控带来 recency”两条主线。\n- 只看主结论定理/命题的 statement 的结构提供框架。"},"metadata":{"institutions":[],"authors":["Zhen Qin","Jiachen Jiang","Zhihui theoretical accounts of Transformer in-context learning (ICL) for supervised regression assume stationarity: all in-context examples and the query share a fixed target function (or regression parameter). Real sequential settings are often non-stationary, where the underlying mapping drifts over time and recent examples should matter more (recency bias). This paper asks: how does ICL behave under non-stationary regression, why does standard linear attention struggle, and why does gated linear attention (GLA) provide an inherent advantage?","importance":"It extends ICL theory from static/stationary tasks to time-varying ones, directly addressing distribution shift and concept drift that dominate real-world sequence modeling. Iterative Self-Repair in LLM Code Generation Across Model Scales and Benchmarks","starred":false,"priority":"p2","source":"arxiv","sources":["arxiv"],"published_at":"2026-04-12T07:51:41+00:00","category_id":"coding_agent","cover_url":"/covers/2604_10508.png","hf_upvotes":0,"arxiv_categories":["cs.SE","cs.AI"],"summary":{"core_problem":"代码生成基准通常用 pass@1（一次生成）评估，但真实编程是“写—跑—看报错—修复”的多轮迭代过程。本文系统研究迭代式 self-repair：模型先生成代码，运行测试，若失败则把错误类型与 traceback 反馈给模型让其修复，重复多轮。核心问题是：在当代（2024–2025）不同规模、不同架构（dense vs MoE）、不同提供方（开源/闭源）的模型上，self-repair 是否普遍有效？收益集中在第几轮？哪些错误更容易修？以及与“独立重采样多次”相比是否更 token-efficient？","importance":"这项工作把“单次生成评测”拉回到更贴近工程实践的迭代范式，并用跨模型、跨基准的大规模对比更新了早期结论（弱模型可能越修越错）。对部署侧价值很直接：给出修复轮数的边际收益曲线、错误类型与修复成功率的关联、以及 self-repair vs resampling 的效率权衡，可用于设计更省 token、更高成功率的代码代理/IDE 助手流水线。","technical_approach":"（must_read 级别：详细技术分析）\n1) 迭代 self-repair 协议：\n- 第0轮 R0：给定题目（函数签名+docstring），模型生成代码 c0。\n- 执行：把代码与测试用例拼接，在沙箱 Python 环境运行。\n- 若失败：捕获错误类型与 traceback e0，构造修复提示词：原题 + 上一版代码 + 错误信息，要求模型输出修复版 ci。\n- 最多 5 次尝试（R0–R4），任一轮通过即停止。\n2) 评测设置：\n- 模型：7个，覆盖 Llama 3.1 8B、Llama 3.3 70B、Llama 4 Scout（MoE 16 experts）、Llama 4 Maverick（MoE 128 experts）、Qwen3 32B、Gemini 2.5 Flash、Gemini 2.5 Pro。\n- 基准：HumanEval（164）与 MBPP Sanitized（257）。\n- 解码：greedy（temperature=0）确保可复现。\n3) 关键分析维度：\n- 多轮 pass rate 提升曲线与“收益递减”：量化每一轮新增解决比例，并给出“前两轮覆盖 76–95% 可获得收益”的部署建议。\n- 错误类型分解：不同错误（如 NameError、AssertionError 等）修复成功率差异显著，错误类别可作为是否继续修复/是否改用重采样的决策信号。\n- dense vs MoE：比较 MoE（Scout/Maverick）与 dense（Llama/Qwen）在修复增益上的差异，讨论交互模式。\n- 提示词消融：minimal vs explain-then-fix vs CoT；发现对 70B 模型 CoT 带来额外 +5.5pp 修复增益。\n- token 效率：与“独立多次重采样”对比，放在 exploration-exploitation 框架下讨论何时 self-repair 更划算。\n（skim 级别：方法概述）\n用统一的‘生成-执行-报错反馈-再生成’循环，在 HumanEval/MBPP 上对 7 个模型做最多 5 轮尝试；报告总体提升、收益递减、错误类型可修复性、MoE vs dense 差异、提示词策略与 token 效率。","experiments":"主要结果（来自摘要/引言给出的数值）：\n- self-repair 对所有模型都提升：HumanEval +4.9 到 +17.1 个百分点；MBPP +16.0 到 +30.0 个百分点。\n- 最终最好：Gemini 2.5 Flash 达到 96.3%（HumanEval）与 93.8%（MBPP）。\n- 收益集中在前几轮：两轮修复覆盖 76–95% 的可获得增益。\n- 错误类型影响显著：NameError 修复成功率约 77%，AssertionError 约 45%。\n- 提示词消融：对 70B，CoT 相对 minimal 额外带来 +5.5pp 修复增益。\n- 还包含 dense vs MoE 的对比观察：例如 HumanEval 上 Scout（16 experts）在开源模型里修复增益最高（+14.0pp）。","reading_guide":"must_read（精读建议：重点章节/图表/创新点）\n- 重点章节：\n  1) Methodology：修复 prompt 的构造、停止条件、执行沙箱与代码抽取（去除 CoT、处理 markdown fence、函数补全等）决定结果可信度与可复现性。\n  2) 主结果曲线：每轮 pass rate（R0→R4）与边际增益，尤其是“前两轮覆盖大部分收益”的定量依据。\n  3) 错误类型分析：错误分类口径、各类错误的修复成功率、以及由此导出的策略含义（例如某些错误更适合重采样而非修复）。\n  4) dense vs MoE 对比：关注 Scout vs Maverick 的差异是否来自专家数、路由、还是仅仅模型能力差异。\n  5) Prompt ablation：minimal / explain-then-fix / CoT 的具体模板与控制变量。\n  6) token 效率对比：与 independent resampling 的公平性（相同 token 预算/相同尝试次数）与结论边界。\n- 重点图表（按内容）：\n  1) 各模型在两基准上的“轮数-通过率”曲线。\n  2) 边际收益递减图（每轮新增解决比例）。\n  3) 错误类型→修复成功率柱状图。\n  4) self-repair vs resampling 的 token-效率对比图。\n- 创新点抓手：\n  1) 面向现代模型的大规模、跨家族 self-repair 系统评测。\n  2) 首批系统比较 dense 与 MoE 在 self-repair 动态上的差异。\n  3) 把“错误类型”提升为可操作的预测信号，并给出轮数/成本的部署指南。\n\nskim（泛读建议：推荐看哪些部分）\n- 直接看摘要 + Introduction 的贡献点。\n- 只看主结果表/图：两基准的最终通过率与每轮增益。\n- 快速扫错误类型分析结论（NameError vs AssertionError）。\n- 看结论/建议：推荐修复轮数（2轮）与何时用 self-repair/何时用重采样。","authors_note":"作者强调：在新一代指令微调模型与 MoE 架构普及后，self-repair 已从“可能伤害弱模型”的不稳定技巧，变成跨规模普遍有效的工程策略；但收益强烈递减，且受错误类型制约。因此应把 self-repair 作为可预算、可早停、可按错误类型路由的组件，而不是无脑多轮迭代。"},"metadata":{"institutions":[],"authors":["Johin Johny Arimbur"],"notable_authors":[],"tags":["iterative-repair","code-generation","execution-feedback","HumanEval","MBPP"],"links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10508","pdf":"https://arxiv.org/pdf/2604.10508","github":null,"project":null,"source_url":null}},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Code-generation benchmarks typically report pass@1 (single-shot), but real programming is iterative: write, run, read errors, and fix. This paper systematically studies iterative self-repair: generate code, execute tests, feed back the error/traceback, and ask the LLM to repair for multiple rounds. It asks whether self-repair is now universally effective across modern model scales and architectures (dense vs MoE), how many rounds are worth it, which error types are most repairable, and how self-repair compares to independent resampling under token budgets.","importance":"It updates earlier mixed findings by evaluating a new generation of 2024–2025 models, and provides deployment-relevant guidance: diminishing-returns curves, error-type predictors of repair success, and token-efficiency tradeoffs versus resampling. This directly informs how to build practical coding agents/IDE assistants that are both accurate and cost-efficient.","technical_approach":"$a5","experiments":"Key reported results (from the provided abstract/introduction):\n- Self-repair improves all models: +4.9 to +17.1 pp on HumanEval; +16.0 to +30.0 pp on MBPP.\n- Best final performance: Gemini 2.5 Flash reaches 96.3% (HumanEval) and 93.8% (MBPP).\n- Diminishing returns: two repair rounds capture 76–95% of achievable gains.\n- Error-type effect: Name errors repaired at ~77%, assertion errors at ~45%.\n- Prompt ablation: CoT yields +5.5 pp additional repair gain over minimal prompting for the 70B model.\n- Dense vs MoE: e.g., on HumanEval, Scout (16 experts) shows the largest repair gain among open-weight models (+14.0 pp).","reading_guide":"$a6","authors_note":"The paper’s stance is that with modern instruction-tuned models (including MoE), prompt-based self-repair has become broadly effective—even at smaller scales—but it exhibits strong diminishing returns and is constrained by error type. Therefore, self-repair should be deployed as a budgeted, early-stoppable, and error-aware component rather than an unbounded iterative loop."},"reading_tier":"skim","recommendation":{"zh":"看边际收益曲线和与重采样的 token 效率对比就够：能直接指导上线时修复轮数/何时停，但注意不同基准下结论波动，别当通用定律。","en":"Just read the marginal-gain-by-iteration plots and the token-efficiency vs resampling comparison: it’s actionable for choosing repair rounds/stop rules, but treat cross-benchmark variance as a warning."}},{"id":"2604.11556","title":"FM-Agent: Scaling Formal Methods to Large Systems via LLM-Based Hoare-Style Reasoning","starred":false,"priority":"p2","source":"arxiv","sources":["arxiv"],"published_at":"2026-04-13T14:42:44+00:00","category_id":"coding_agent","cover_url":"/covers/2604_11556.png","hf_upvotes":0,"arxiv_categories":["cs.SE","cs.AI"],"summary":{"core_problem":"面向由 LLM 生成/辅助开发的超大规模系统（>100k LoC），如何在可扩展的前提下做“组合式正确性推理”。传统 Hoare 逻辑能把系统拆到函数级别验证，但关键瓶颈是：每个函数都需要人写形式化规格（pre/post），而在 LLM 生成代码场景下开发者往往并不理解每个函数的真实/期望行为，导致规格难写、难准、难覆盖。","importance":"随着 LLM coding agent 能产出编译器等大型系统，幻觉与隐性 bug 的风险上升；同时现有自动证明技术进步使“证明生成”不再是唯一瓶颈，规格生成成为规模化验证的主要障碍。若不能把规格负担降下来，Hoare 风格的组合式验证就难以落地到真实大系统与自动生成代码上。","technical_approach":"提出 FM-Agent：用 LLM 在函数粒度自动生成规格，并以 Hoare 风格进行组合式推理与缺陷定位。核心由三条洞见驱动：\n1) 规格应从“调用者如何使用被调函数”自顶向下推断，而不是从被调函数实现自底向上抽取（避免被 buggy 实现误导）。FM-Agent 让 LLM 读取 caller 的调用点：由实参/上下文推 pre-condition，由调用后续代码对返回值/状态的使用推 post-condition；多 caller 场景对期望行为做合并，得到更全面规格。\n2) 将 Hoare 推理规则“泛化到自然语言规格”：开发者意图多在文档/提示词中以自然语言表达，而传统验证器只吃逻辑公式。FM-Agent 利用 LLM 对小代码块执行语义的高准确预测能力，把 pre/post 允许为自然语言；然后沿控制流对语句逐步推导路径末端的 post，并检查是否能蕴含规格中的 post，不能则报告潜在 bug。\n3)（引言中给出方向性描述）利用 LLM 捕捉系统入口输入与内部函数行为的相关性，通过能触发失败的测试/反例来辅助定位与修复（用于应对“验证失败不等于有 bug、也不给原因”的不完备性问题）。","experiments":"从给出的全文片段可确认的实验要点包括：作者用 Microsoft VerusBench 的函数做随机输入，要求 LLM 预测函数输出，报告对 98.6% 的函数预测正确，用以支撑“LLM 可用于小块语义推断，从而支持自然语言 Hoare 推理”的关键假设。其余关于大系统端到端验证、缺陷触发测试生成/定位效果等细节在当前提供的截断内容中未完整呈现。","reading_guide":"must_read（精读）：\n- 重点读 Introduction 中三大 Challenge 与三条 Insight 的对应关系：I（自顶向下规格生成）、II（自然语言 Hoare 推理）、III（验证失败时的 bug 触发/定位）。\n- 精读“Insight I”的规格生成机制：caller→callee 的 pre/post 推断信号分别来自哪里、如何合并多 caller 期望、如何避免被 callee 实现误导；这是论文相对现有“从实现抽规格”的关键差异。\n- 精读“Insight II”的推理流程：自然语言 pre/post 如何表示、如何沿语句迭代推导 post、在分支/路径上如何检查蕴含关系、失败时如何报告“潜在 bug”。同时关注 VerusBench 98.6% 结果对应的设置（随机输入、输出预测任务）以判断外推边界。\n- 若正文后续包含系统架构图/流程图（通常会有 Agent pipeline、spec synthesis、path reasoning、counterexample/test generation），建议逐图对齐：输入（代码+文档/提示）→规格→路径推理→失败解释/测试。\n\nskim（泛读）：\n- 先读 Introduction：问题动机（LLM 生成大系统+规格瓶颈）与三条 Insight。\n- 快速扫“规格生成（top-down）”与“自然语言 Hoare 推理”的方法概述段落，抓住两点：规格来源从 caller 来、推理对象允许自然语言。\n- 只看关键实验数字（如 98.6%）与结论，判断该框架的可行性与适用范围。","authors_note":"作者的核心立场是：在证明自动化逐渐成熟后，规模化形式化方法的主要瓶颈转向“规格获取”；而在 LLM 生成代码时代，规格更应从系统意图与调用关系中提取。FM-Agent 试图把 Hoare 逻辑的组合式优势与 LLM 的语义/自然语言理解结合起来，以降低规格门槛并提升大系统可验证性。"},"metadata":{"institutions":["Institute of Parallel and Distributed Systems, Shanghai Jiao Tong University"],"authors":["Haoran Ding","Zhaoguo Wang","Haibo Chen"],"notable_authors":[],"tags":["formal-methods","hoare-logic","llm-for-verification","program-correctness"],"links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11556","pdf":"https://arxiv.org/pdf/2604.11556","github":null,"project":null,"source_url":null}},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"For very large systems (100k+ LoC) produced or heavily assisted by LLMs, how can we scale compositional correctness reasoning. Hoare logic enables function-level decomposition, but it fundamentally relies on human-written formal pre/post specifications for each function. In LLM-generated codebases, developers often lack precise understanding of each function’s intended behavior, making accurate specifications hard to write and preventing Hoare-style verification from scaling.","importance":"LLM coding agents can now generate compiler-scale systems, increasing the risk of hallucination-induced and subtle bugs. Meanwhile, proof automation has improved substantially, shifting the main bottleneck from proof construction to specification generation. Without reducing the spec burden, compositional verification remains impractical for real-world large systems and auto-generated code.","technical_approach":"$a7","experiments":"From the provided full-content excerpt, the clearly stated empirical evidence is: on Microsoft VerusBench, with random inputs, LLMs correctly predict function outputs for 98.6% of functions, supporting the feasibility of LLM-driven small-block semantic inference used in NL Hoare-style reasoning. Additional end-to-end evaluations on large systems and bug-triggering/diagnosis are not fully visible in the truncated content provided.","reading_guide":"$a8","authors_note":"The paper’s stance is that as proof automation matures, specification acquisition becomes the dominant bottleneck for scaling formal methods—especially for LLM-generated systems. FM-Agent aims to combine Hoare logic’s compositional structure with LLMs’ code-and-language understanding to lower the spec-writing barrier and make large-system verification more practical."},"reading_tier":"skim","recommendation":{"zh":"值得扫一眼其“规格生成+Hoare 组合验证”的流水线：如果你在做大代码库 agent，这给了把验证瓶颈从证明转到 spec 的可操作分解，但复现成本偏高。","en":"Skim the pipeline for spec generation + Hoare-style compositional checks: it’s a practical decomposition for large-code agents (verification bottleneck becomes specs), though reproduction looks heavy."}},{"id":"2604.09952","title":"SLM Finetuning for Production","starred":false,"priority":"p3","source":"arxiv","sources":["arxiv"],"published_at":"2026-04-10T23:11:57+00:00","category_id":"coding_agent","cover_url":"/covers/2604_09952.png","hf_upvotes":0,"arxiv_categories":["cs.LG"],"summary":{"core_problem":"在生产环境做“自然语言→领域特定语言（DSL）代码生成”时，LLM+RAG 虽然效果好，但检索与长上下文带来显著推理延迟与系统复杂度；而小语言模型（SLM）推理快、部署轻，但知识与推理能力不足，容易输出脆弱、幻觉、对提示敏感。论文要解决的是：如何用可部署、低延迟的 SLM 在生产中稳定生成结构化 DSL，并尽量减少对运行时长上下文与检索的依赖。","importance":"大量企业级场景（工作流自动化、API 编排等）对延迟、成本、隐私/安全与可运维性要求极高。RAG+大模型会引入外部文档库维护、检索质量波动、长上下文 prefill 延迟等工程负担。若能用微调后的 SLM 在保持质量的同时显著降低延迟与架构复杂度，将更适合大规模在线产品落地。","technical_approach":"论文主张用参数高效微调（PEFT）将领域知识“写入权重”，以减少运行时上下文：\n- 选用数十亿参数级 SLM，通过 LoRA/QLoRA 等 PEFT 在不全量训练的情况下进行领域适配，提升 NL→DSL 生成的准确性与一致性。\n- 与 RAG 方案对比：RAG 适合知识动态/广覆盖，但需要检索组件与更长上下文；微调 SLM 则通过缩短 prompt/context 来降低 prefill 延迟，并简化系统。\n- 任务场景是低代码工作流平台的 DSL：用函数式 API 调用表达步骤编排、条件逻辑与嵌套调用；论文强调真实 API 生态的规模、命名不一致与条件/嵌套结构是生成难点。\n（注：在当前截断内容中，关于数据构造、训练细节、验证检查点/结构化提示等“具体配方”尚未完整展开。）","experiments":"从提供的片段可知作者以生产系统为背景，基线是 GPT-4 + RAG 的 NL→DSL prefill）、运维复杂度（外部文档库/检索质量）、以及 SLM 的固有限制（知识/推理/上下文）。\n- 重点关注方法章节（若正文后续展开）：(1) 训练数据如何从真实工作流/日志/模板构造与清洗；(2) DSL 的语法约束与语义约束如何在训练或解码时注入；(3) LoRA/QLoRA 的具体插入层、rank、训练超参；(4) 结构化 prompt 与“实时验证检查点（validation 快速看任务示例（NL→DSL flow）理解 DSL 结构与难点。\n- 若时间有限，优先扫实验结论与延迟/成本对比图表（如果正文提供）。","authors_note":"作者从工程落地视角强调：在稳定领域边界的 DSL 生成任务上，与其依赖 RAG 在运行时“搬知识”，不如用 PEFT 把知识固化到 SLM 权重中，以换取更低延迟、更简单架构与更可控的生产部署；RAG Small language models (SLMs) are faster and easier to deploy, but tend to be brittle, hallucinate more, and struggle with reasoning and long context. The paper addresses how to make SLMs reliably generate structured domain-specific code in production while reducing dependence on runtime retrieval and large prompts.","importance":"Enterprise workflow automation and API orchestration are latency-, cost-, privacy-, and operability-sensitive. RAG introduces external stores to maintain, retrieval-quality variance, and longer contexts that increase prefill latency. If a fine-tuned SLM can deliver acceptable quality with much lower latency and simpler architecture, it is a strong path for scalable real-world deployment.","technical_approach":"The paper advocates parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) to embed domain knowledge into SLM weights:\n- Use LoRA/QLoRA-style PEFT on a few-billion-parameter SLM to improve NL→DSL accuracy and consistency without full retraining.\n- Contrast with RAG: RAG is useful for dynamic/broad knowledge but adds retrieval components and longer contexts; fine-tuning reduces required context per request, lowering prefill latency and simplifying the system.\n- The target DSL represents workflow automation as sequences of API-call functions with conditional logic and nesting; the paper highlights real-world challenges like API scale, naming inconsistency, and complex control structures.\n(Note: the provided excerpt is truncated before many concrete “recipe” details such as dataset construction, training specifics, and validation checkpoints.)","experiments":"From the excerpt, the production baseline is a GPT-4 RAG pipeline for NL→DSL.
